title: Kopion Culling Request
description:
We’ve recently received reports from our team in <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, that a particularly virile pack of kopions are causing a surge in numbers. As a result, their prey is being over hunted, and if left unattended, will ultimately lead to the starvation of the kopion population there.

We are looking for a skilled contractor to cull this pack of kopions in a swift and efficient manner, assisting with bringing a natural equilibrium back to <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. Access to combat equipment, transport, and a familiarity with wild and unpredictable animals are all required for this job.

For further details on the targeted creatures, please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

title: Pest Control
description:
There’s a growing <EM4>~mission(Creature)</EM4> problem at <EM4>~mission(Location|address)</EM4>. Looking for a contractor to quickly and professionally take care of this infestation issue.  

For further details on the targeted creature, please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

title: Pest Control
description:
A client has contacted us about resolving a <EM4>~mission(Creature)</EM4> infestation issue before it gets any worse. Several locations around <EM4>~mission(Location|address)</EM4> are currently beset by the creatures. There’s a growing concern that if this goes on for too much longer, then the natural habit will be ravaged beyond repair. Are you available to take care of this issue?

You can refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal for more specific information on the targeted creature.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

title: Reduce Overpopulation
description:
We’ve been monitoring a situation at <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4> regarding an uptick in the <EM4>~mission(Creature)</EM4> population over the past few months. Our models indicate that if this continues many of the native plants and animals will be adversely affected. It’s imperative that the <EM4>~mission(Creature)</EM4> population is reduced before that happens.     

If you can help, please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal for more specifics on the targeted creature.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

title: Cull Invasive Creatures
description:
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists are dedicated to keeping the delicate ecosystems of the empire in balance. A client recently hired us to evaluate the environmental impact of a number of invasive creatures near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. We’ve determined that to preserve the natural order of the region a conscientious culling of these species is necessary.  

Looking for someone able and willing to help in this effort. Please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal for further information on the creatures being targeted.     

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

title: Intensive Eradication Effort
description:
Native plants and animals near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4> are on the verge of environmental collapse due to the dramatic population spikes of several invasive species. We’ve been contracted to dramatically reduce the current population of these species to help avoid an environmental collapse. We need a dedicated and highly skilled exterminator to carry out this contract.     

You can better acquaint yourself with the creatures in question by referencing <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal.     

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

title: Cull Irradiated Kopions
description:
As a consequence of the ongoing radiation storm on Pyro I, some of the invasive kopions have become irradiated. This poses a threat to the health of the indigenous wildlife and to those who live and work in <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. 

We are seeking out a skilled contractor who can cull any irradiated kopions in and around <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Do not accept this contract unless you have the proper weapons and equipment that can reliably function in a radioactive environment. 

Your compensation will be adjusted to match the risks associated with this contract.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

title: Reduce Valakkar Breaker Station Population
description:
If you have any work that's going to be bringing you to one of those old QV Breaker Stations in the Keeger Belt, we have something else that we could use your help on while you're there.
 
We've recently been contacted by the People's Alliance to assist with an initiative to help prepare these abandoned stations for repairs. Unfortunately, a Valakkar infestation is creating serious problems for not only the stations' infrastructure, but also for the chances of them being brought back online one day. Due to Valakkar's status as an invasive species, we have decided that culling them is the only viable option.
 
Reduce the Valakkar numbers at any of the old QV Breaker Stations and we will offer you payment.
 
Best,
 
Wanda Werkheiser

Contract Manager

Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

title: Yellow Level Contract: Routine Patrol
description:
Time to knock out a routine patrol for one of our long-term clients. The route is a series of waypoints that need to be visited and scanned to confirm everything’s as expected. Should be simple enough.  

If interested, please accept and head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD to start. Pull this off and the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>


Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Yellow Level Contract: Security Sweep
description:
Need someone to knock out a security patrol. You’ll need to go to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and then scan several designated waypoints ensuring that they’re safe and secure. 

Satellites in that region have been acting up recently. Not exactly sure what’s going on out there, but best be prepared in case there’s any trouble.

Complete this contract and the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Orange Level Contract: Security Patrol
description:
A client is concerned about activity near some of their interests. We’ve been contracted to patrol the area and run scans at several locations. Interested? If so, head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD to start the patrol.

The client wasn’t specific about the threats, but they don’t think everything’s on the level out there. Hopefully we’ll be able to bring them some peace of mind.

Additionally, the client arranged for us to offer a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor.


Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Orange Level Contract: Potential Security Threat
description:
Several unknown ships have been spotted in areas frequented by haulers delivering goods for our client. They’re worried these ships are monitoring their haulers in preparation for an ambush, so they’ve hired us to patrol the area. 

Start by going to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan it to ensure it’s clear. After that, we’ll send you to some other areas to scan for potential threats. We recommend that you bring a <EM4>wingman</EM4> and plenty of supplies to be ready to handle whatever might come your way.     

Also know that successfully completing this contract will earn the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Red Level Contract: High-Risk Security Patrol
description:
A client needs our help. Outlaws are roaming certain sectors where they do business and attacking anyone they come across. Our client has already lost several ships and can’t afford to lose anymore. 

We need someone to patrol those areas and draw out any hostile forces. The job begins with you heading to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scanning. Then we’ll share a handful of other patrol points for you to scan. 

From the sound of it, these packs of ships feature skilled and aggressive pilots. Best be ready to rumble if you run into any of them. Would be good to have at least <EM4>two trusted pilots</EM4> by your side for this one.

At the end of a successful patrol, the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>

Stay chilly,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Red Level Contract: Secure Threatened Space
description:
Need a battle-hardened pilot for an important patrol. A prominent client is fed up with outlaws targeting their ships and satellites. We’ve been hired to scan the areas in question and deal with any hostile forces. The patrol begins at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD before moving to a number of other locations we’ll expect you to clear.

Not sure what you’ll run into out there, but based on intel shared by the client, they’re frequently seeing fighter groups of five to seven ships roaming the region. Some even have larger ships leading the charge. That means you better be ready for a serious fight. If you can, try to recruit at least <EM4>three friends</EM4> to the cause. Even a seasoned pilot will need all the help they can get against this crew.   

Since this is going to be a tough one, the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> at the end of the patrol.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Strategic Detatrine Reserve – Small Resupply
description:
Following the brutal attack on Pyro and our efforts to combat the vigilante group the Frontier Fighters, our strategic reserves across the system are at an all-time low. Citizens for Prosperity are eager to replenish our stocks before we reach a point of desperation. 

To that end, we were hoping that you would be able to resupply<EM4> ~mission(Destination|Address) with detatrine. </EM4>

This rare chemical compound is a key ingredient in several vital medical supplies, so it is important that replace what we used up treating local civilians and CFP members injured in the wake of the Frontier Fighter assault.

Normally we would direct you to reputable sources to acquire detatrine, but our contacts have informed us that several <EM4>depots</EM4> around the system have suddenly decided to sell the chemical at a significantly reduced price. In fact, it’s inexpensive enough that I suspect it will draw some unwanted attention. If you decide to seek out this potentially deadly deal, please do so with caution.

Your support of our efforts is much appreciated,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Strategic Resource Reserve – Medium Resupply
description:
Following the brutal attack on Pyro and our efforts to combat the vigilante group the Frontier Fighters, our strategic reserves across the system are at an all-time low. Citizens for Prosperity are eager to replenish our stocks before we reach a point of desperation. 

To that end, we were hoping that you and a team of your choosing could deliver the needed supplies to<EM4> ~mission(Destination|Address). </EM4>We have arranged shipment to Pyro from there.

I leave it up to you to decide how best to procure and refine the resources, but Daymar or Aberdeen might be good places to start mining.

Your support of our efforts is much appreciated,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Strategic Detatrine Reserve – Small Resupply
description:
Following the brutal attack on Pyro and our efforts to combat the vigilante group the Frontier Fighters, our strategic reserves across the system are at an all-time low. Citizens for Prosperity are eager to replenish our stocks before we reach a point of desperation. 

To that end, we were hoping that you would be able to resupply<EM4> ~mission(Destination|Address) with detatrine. </EM4>

This rare chemical compound is a key ingredient in several vital medical supplies, so it is important that replace what we used up treating local civilians and CFP members injured in the wake of the Frontier Fighter assault.

Normally we would direct you to reputable sources to acquire detatrine, but our contacts have informed us that several <EM4>depots</EM4> around the system have suddenly decided to sell the chemical at a significantly reduced price. In fact, it’s inexpensive enough that I suspect it will draw some unwanted attention. If you decide to seek out this potentially deadly deal, please do so with caution.

Your support of our efforts is much appreciated,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Out of Detatrine – Small Resupply
description:
Kicking the crap out of those Frontier Fighter bastards seriously depleted our supplies and now our stash of detatrine is practically out of stock. 

That’s why you’re going to do a detatrine resupply run to<EM4> ~mission(Destination|Address). </EM4>

Not sure if you’re familiar with it, but the chemical’s what we use to make our batches of sludge. We can’t really afford to let our sales of the stuff dry up right now. Not when we need credits so bad.

The good news is that <EM4>depots</EM4> across the system are offering detatrine and rock-bottom prices. Hell if I know why they’re doing it, all I know is that everyone with a lick of sense is trying to get their hands on the stuff so be ready for fierce competition. 

I’m trustin’ you to get it done,
Stows

title: Hunt the Polaris
description:
*FOR IMMEDIATE SYSTEM-WIDE RELEASE*

This is a call to arms for all available Civilian Defense Force volunteers. An RSI Polaris corvette on its way to Invictus Launch Week festivities has been hijacked by the terrorist organization the Frontier Fighters. Initial intelligence reports indicate they’re attempting to escape into the Pyro system.

The Navy has officially requested for any CDF volunteers to help provide combat support immediately to neutralize this threat and prevent the Frontier Fighters from escaping with the stolen capital ship.  Additionally, as a further incentive, those who assist us in this endeavor will be awarded <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> along with a small token of our appreciation.

SAIC Rowena Dulli from the Advocacy is the official attaché to the CDF and will be running the operation.

title: Happy Invictus
description:
Hello Citizens and Civilians,

The United Empire of Earth is proud to acknowledge the start of this year's Invictus ceremony. Originally started in 2542, the United Planets of Earth dispatched Naval ships to each of the settled planets to pick up the latest group of volunteers entering military service.

Now, over four hundred years later, Invictus continues this proud tradition of celebrating those among us who are standing up for others and protecting the Empire as well as showcasing the latest additions to the Naval fleet.

This year's festivities can be found on <EM4>ArcCorp in Stanton</EM4> and feature a great hall with some of the newest ships on display as well as the new <EM4>Idris Experience Tour</EM4> where you can tour an active-duty Idris, accessible at the top of the IO-North tower.

Accept this contract if you would like guidance to the festivities. As a special thank you, in partnership with the Mercenary Guild, attendees will be awarded ~mission(ScripAmount) scrip.

Thank you and enjoy your Invictus.

title: Navy Patrol Training – Scenario #1
description:
If travelling to different star systems around the Empire, helping those in need, and protecting our borders sounds like a rewarding career to you, then maybe you’re ready to become a pilot in the UEE Navy.

The overall demand for naval pilots has increased in recent years which means there’s now more opportunity than ever before. However, to become a Navy pilot, you need to go through specialist training and gain many hours of flight experience.

To give you a small taste of what life as a combat pilot would be like, Gilly’s Flight School has partnered with the UEE Navy to offer a unique opportunity to take a special Patrol Training course that will run you through three scenarios covering a basic patrol. 

<EM4>SIGN UP NOW FOR SCENARIO #1 – Scanning a Patrol Point</EM4>

I believe that folks learn best by doing, so don’t expect a lot of hand holding out there. This is about throwing you into the deep end and giving you a chance to swim. You never know what you’re capable of until you’re given the chance.

As a bonus on completion of the scenario, the original contract holder will be awarded ~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip. Plus, completing all three will get you a special keepsake.

Can’t wait to see you out there,
Instructor Gilly


ABOUT GILLY FLIGHT SCHOOL
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

title: Navy Patrol Training – Scenario #2
description:
Congrats on completing part one of this three-part course.

For your next patrol scenario, things are going to become even more intense.

Be prepared to encounter some hostiles and dogfight them in a realistic combat scenario just like real Navy pilots do while out on patrol.

The hostile ships are all specially equipped rigs made specifically for training purposes and will be piloted by graduates of the flight school to provide an engaging and educational experience.

<EM4>SIGN UP NOW FOR SCENARIO #2 – Neutralizing a Hostile Threat</EM4>

As a bonus on completion of the scenario, the original contract holder will be awarded ~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.

Make sure you pick a ship ready for combat and I’ll see you out there,
Instructor Gilly


ABOUT GILLY FLIGHT SCHOOL
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

title: Navy Patrol Training – Scenario #3
description:
Congrats on completing part two of this three-part course.

For your next and final lesson, you will learn how to assist a ship in distress just like real Navy pilots do while out on patrol. They will be under simulated attack by our specially trained hostile pilots and it will be up to you to neutralize them as quickly and effectively as possible.

<EM4>SIGN UP NOW FOR SCENARIO #3 – Ship in Distress</EM4>

As a bonus on completion of the scenario, the original contract holder will be awarded ~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip and a special keepsake.

I know you’re going to do great out there,
Instructor Gilly


ABOUT GILLY FLIGHT SCHOOL
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

title: Low Risk Protection Detail
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client has requested a contractor with immediate availability to provide extra support to a number of ships leaving an asteroid base located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>). Once you’ve accepted, rendezvous there and await further instructions. In this instance, your job is to provide support for their safe passage. Hostiles may be present, but they shouldn’t be too challenging to deal with.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Executive Protection Detail
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A group of ships located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> are requesting an escort. If you accept, head to the location immediately and await instructions. The client claims that this escort is purely a precautionary measure, but that doesn’t mean you should drop your guard. Expect some hostile forces and deal with them appropriately.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Experienced Protection Detail Needed
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of my clients needs an immediate escort through dangerous space. Rendezvous at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and they’ll meet you after they launch. Reports indicate increased outlaw activity in the area, so don’t let your guard down.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: VIP Client Needs Protection
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

In need of a contractor who can report in now. A client has found themselves in hot water over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and a protection detail to get away from an asteroid base. They’ve reported multiple, well-armed hostile ships meaning you’ll need a crew of your own to deal with them. Based on the client’s account, these attackers seem highly motivated so they will likely not back down easily.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Protection Detail Needed. High Risk.
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

I’m in need of a highly competent pilot who can gather a crew of equally capable pilots for an escort mission. The mining base at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is currently under attack from a group of outlaws and the crew there is unable to leave without assistance. Our scouts have reported that the attackers are armed with exceptional weaponry and ships.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Top Tier Operator Needed
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

This contract should only be considered by the most capable of pilots. A highly valued client is currently under attack at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and requires immediate extraction. They’re sitting in the hangar ready to leave, but are unable to move until the hostile ships in the area have been neutralized. 

I don’t see the outlaws stopping any time soon and our client’s reporting they’re packing high-grade weaponry on their ships. This will be a test of your skill as much as your endurance. Assemble whoever you need and head there immediately to assist them.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Steal Some ~mission(Item)
description:
We’re getting ready to take our ops in Stanton to the next level. Our scouts tracked an outlaw ship that unloaded some <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> at an old Hathor platform facility at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Whole thing feels like a prime target for a raid. 

Need someone to hit the site, grab the <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> stashed there, and bring it to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. That old Hathor facility is buzzing with activity. Go in unprepared and you’ll regret it. 

- Stows

title: Show Them Who's Boss
description:
Word’s gotten out that we’re expanding into Stanton and a local crew has hit a few of our safe houses. We managed to track the bastards back to some old Hathor mining site. 

You up for showing them how the Headhunters handle things? If so, head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and show them that we mean business. 

 
- Stows

title: Ghost ~mission(TargetName)
description:
Can’t believe how many criminals are crawling around this damn system. Guess we’ll have to make some room for ourselves. 

Got a list of high-level leaders here. Nothing brings chaos and disorder to the existing gangs like a good decapitation attack. The next target is <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>, who we’ve tracked to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Feel like ghosting ‘em?   

These old Hathor platform facilities are big and spread out. Doubt there’s a way to do this and not attract the attention of their foot soldiers. Ain’t gonna be easy but sure sounds like fun.

- Stows

title: Opportunity Knocks at ~mission(Location)
description:
With the Frontier Fighters stirring up shit in Pyro, Headhunters figured that it’d be good to take a look at our operations in Stanton. We want to be smart about it though. Don’t want to raise red flags by bringing too much gear through the jump, or hit civilian targets and get security forces on our ass. Instead, the plan is to work over the local outlaws first.  

Been picking up a lot of activity around <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Guess it just got a delivery of <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> that has our name all over it. You wanna grab it for us?

Once you’ve got the stuff, bring it to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. I’d get geared up before going. Sounds like the locals are pretty entrenched there.  

Stows out.

title: Deliver a Message
description:
Surprise, surprise. Seems like not everyone’s happy that the Headhunters are making inroads in Stanton. One crew in particular has been hitting our people and then scurrying back to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. 

Want you to go there and give ‘em a taste of their own medicine. Removing these lickboots should send a pretty clear message about what happens if you screw with us. 


Stows out.

title: Settle a Grudge
description:
Not everyone is cut out to be a Headhunter. Some folks have too many screws loose even for us.  

<EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> ran with us in Pyro until they beat another member to death over a stupid game of Trigger. They fled to Stanton to hide out, but now that we’re expanding our footprint here, figure it’s the perfect time for payback.    

<EM4>~mission(TargetName|Last)</EM4> has been busy though. They’re running a crew that’s currently hunkered down at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Head there and settle this grudge once and for all. I can’t imagine any of ‘em will go quiet, so best come prepared.

Stows out.

title: A Swift Reprisal
description:
Hey,

Some two-bit thugs are holed up in ~mission(Location|Address). Wouldn’t pay them any mind, except the arrogant skags tried to hit an outpost under our protection.

We chased 'em off with little trouble, but we can't let that kind of disrespect go unpunished. Our Clips are busy with some bigger fish, so we'd like you to take care of this for us. 

Stows out.

title: Reputation Management
description:
Some assholes are refusing to pay us what we’re owed. Problem is, these idiots are bragging about it. Had they kept it quiet, we could’ve taken care of this more surgically, but now we need to send a message.

The fools are operating from ~mission(Location|Address). We need them all gone. Make it as loud as you can. We’ll send your payment once everyone’s taken care of.

- Stows out.

title: ~mission(Location|Address) under attack
description: Some geniuses thought it would be a good idea to try and knock over ~mission(Location|Address), so we're putting together a response to put them in the ground and also show everyone else what happens if you touch Headhunter turf.\n\nStows out.

title: ~mission(Location|Address) under attack
description: Some geniuses thought it would be a good idea to try and knock over ~mission(Location|Address), so we're putting together a response to put them in the ground and also show everyone else what happens if you touch Headhunter turf.\n\nStows out.

title: Block XenoThreat Expansion
description:
XenoThreat are on the warpath right now. They’ve launched simultaneous attacks on several Headhunters sites and stretched our fighters thin. Got word they’re planning to storm ~mission(Location|Address) next, and we can’t get anyone there to defend it. 

I’m looking to pay someone to pull together a crew, gather supplies, and mount a strong defense for us. Gonna be honest with you, this is shaping up to be a hell of a fight. Xenos are sending some of their most experienced forces there. Not much else I can say except that they’ll probably stagger the arrival of their forces, wipe them all out and you’ll be paid handsomely. 

Think you can rise to the occasion?  

-Stows

title: The Yard's under attack
description:
Putting the word out. We got a Headhunter outpost near ~mission(Location|Address) under attack and could use some backup. Haven't quite figured out who's doing the attacking but don't really care. You step to the Headhunters, get ready to get clapped back.

Get over there pronto and take them down.

Stows out.

title: Don't let Windfall Fall
description:
Need some triggers to get over to ~mission(Location|Address) and defend one of our places that's under attack. Not sure who's looking for an early death, but we can figure that out once they're cold and still.

Bring some people if you want just make sure we take it back.

Stows out.

title: Take back Carvers Ridge
description:
I swear all the local scumbags have gotten a lot bolder since Citizens for Prosperity moved into here. Now we got a group attacking ~mission(Location|Address), so I need someone to take it back and remind them that Headhunters are still the power in the system.

If you take them out, I don't have to figure out who they are, so get to it.

Stows out.

title: Rally at ~mission(Location)
description: Call's out for anybody itching to cause some violence. Some stupid skags thought they could knock over ~mission(Location|Address) and we wouldn't kick back. Go show them how wrong their thinking was.\n\nStows out.

title: Halt XenoThreat Expansion
description:
Not sure how familiar you are with what’s going down in Pyro, but we’re currently in a hell of a turf war with XenoThreat. It’s been pretty brutal lately, and I just learned that XenoThreat are about to attack ~mission(Location|Address). Thing is that I can’t rally any Clips to get there in time to defend it, so I need you to do it for us. 

Grab your gear, get some friends, and get to the location as fast as you can. Xenos like to stagger the arrival of their troops, so don’t blow through all your ammo during the initial defense ‘cause there’s a good chance more are coming. 

Keep them from taking over the site and I’ll pay you for the trouble.

-Stows out

title: ~mission(Location) has been greenlit
description:
Word came down from the Judge that we're to hit ~mission(Location|Address). It's owned by CFP and security there have been less than hospitable to some of the locals, so they gotta go.

They may talk a big game about bringing security, but they got guns and are more than happy to use 'em.

Stows out.

title: Hitting a CFP site
description:
Need someone to sweep ~mission(Location|Address). CFP security forces seized the outpost from a group of locals that'd been there for years. Beat the hell out of 'em from what I heard, so they came to Headhunters asking for revenge. 

Need it done fast and clean. 

Stows out.

title: Wipe ~mission(Location) out
description:
Caught wind that a crew of hardcore shipjackers are holed up around ~mission(Location|Address). They swiped a couple of Headhunter ships a few months ago after dumping the crew out the airlock, so we've been keeping an eye out for them ever since.

Want you to go there and show them the same kinda mercy they showed our people. Clear?

Stows out.

title: Turf War
description:
One of our Judges caught wind of XenoThreat trying to move in on our territory. Seems like they’re trying to take over ~mission(Location|Address). We don’t want to let those psychos get any more of a foothold in system than they already have, so we’re putting some creds on the line to get ‘em to back off.

We want you to come down on them hard. Don’t let up till the whole place is a graveyard. We’ll send your payment once the bodies are ready to bury.

- Stows out.

title: Hit XenoThreat at ~mission(Location)
description:
One of our people stumbled across a group of XenoThreat hiding out over near ~mission(Location|Address). Not sure if they're dug in or just passing through, but we want to hit them before they move.

Maybe bring some people if you got 'em because XenoThreat don't tend to go down easy. Get there and remind them who the power is in this system.

Stows out.

title: Deal with Kopions at ~mission(Location)
description: Headhunters need someone to take out a pack of kopions that've been giving our guys a hard time. Last saw the things at ~mission(Location|Address). There's some creds in it for you if you finish the job.\n\nStows out.

title: Kill Kopions at ~mission(Location)
description:
Bunch of kopions set up shop in Headhunter territory. Mean ones. Having to fight off wild animals every few hours is making it tough to do business. 

If you get rid of them for us, you get paid. Do it however you want – as long as they end up dead. 

You can find them at ~mission(Location|Address).

-Stows

title: Butcher Kopion Pack at ~mission(Location)
description:
Huge swarm of kopions ran down one of our Clips the other day. Never found the body. Word is they ate the poor bastard. 

We need someone to head to ~mission(Location|Address) and shoot every kopion they see. Don't stop ’til the assholes are all dead. 

Watch your back when you go in. If you can’t guess, these bastards are mean. If you get yourself killed, that's on you. 

Stows out.

title: Need a hitter
description:
So here's the deal, we got some small time dirtbags who think they're hotshots running out of a base near ~mission(Location|Address). I don't know what toxic shit they're drinking but they thought it'd be a good idea to step to some Headhunter Clips. Killed one, injured three more. So I'm looking to send someone there to blast their ambition right out of their skulls.

Head over and get it done. You'll get a nice bump of creds for it.

- Stows

title: Need a hitter

So here's the deal, we got some small time dirtbags who think they're hotshots running out of a base near ~mission(Location|Address). I don't know what toxic shit they're drinking but they thought it'd be a good idea to step to some Headhunter Clips. Killed one, injured three more. title: Death and cargo
description:
Local crew decided to hit one of our convoys and steal our shit. They got away, but we aren't gonna let them celebrate for long. I want you to head out to ~mission(Location|Address) where they got a base, blast them into ash, and get our stuff back. 

Once you got the cargo, take it over to ~mission(Destination|Address) and we can all forget these assholes ever existed.

Stows out.

Stows out.

title: A tricky tricky task
description:
One of the local Judges has been trying to get info on some of new gangs in the area. You know, see if anyone's got eyes on what we got. That kinda thing. Anyway, we sent ~mission(TargetName) undercover to try and suss out if anyone's getting bright ideas to try and make a move.

Anyway, ~mission(TargetName|First) was heading to ~mission(Location|Address) to make a deal with some local grunts or whatever but we haven't heard back. Judge is afraid ~mission(TargetName|Last) might've been sniffed then snuffed, so we want you to head there and see what's what.

Go find what happened to ~mission(TargetName|Last) and get our cargo back. Odds are you'll need to shwack anyone you come across because if ~mission(TargetName|Last) is dead, these assholes killed a Headhunter.

Once you get the cargo, drop it off at ~mission(Destination|Address) and get a nice little payday.

Stows out.

title: Green light on ~mission(Location)
description:
It's sad to say but we lost one of our outposts to XenoThreat. Appalling if you ask me, but that's why we're looking for someone who's got the time and ammunition to take it back.

If that's you, head over to ~mission(Location|Address) and take it back.

Stows out.

title: Green light on ~mission(Location)
description:
It's sad to say but we lost one of our outposts to XenoThreat. Appalling if you ask me, but that's why we're looking for someone who's got the time and ammunition to take it back.

If that's you, head over to ~mission(Location|Address) and take it back.

Stows out.

title: Looking for a little revenge
description:
Here's the deal. Some of those mercs that CFP hired as security went and shot up some Headhunters that were just moving through the system. They weren't even doing anything, just flying.

Anyway, we tracked them back to ~mission(Location|Address) and want to dish out some payback. Grab your gear and be our weapon, we'll make it worth your while.

- Stows

title: Looking for a little revenge
description:
Here's the deal. Some of those mercs that CFP hired as security went and shot up some Headhunters that were just moving through the system. They weren't even doing anything, just flying.

Anyway, we tracked them back to ~mission(Location|Address) and want to dish out some payback. Grab your gear and be our weapon, we'll make it worth your while.

- Stows

title: Back up needed at outpost
description:
Those XenoThreat punks launched an attack against ~mission(Location|Address) so we're looking for people to go fend them off. 

Get out there and waste every XenoThreat you see.

Stows out.

title: Back up needed at outpost
description:
Those XenoThreat punks launched an attack against ~mission(Location|Address) so we're looking for people to go fend them off. 

Get out there and waste every XenoThreat you see.

Stows out.

title: Reputation Management
description:
Some assholes are refusing to pay us what we’re owed. Problem is, these idiots are bragging about it. Had they kept it quiet, we could’ve taken care of this more surgically, but now we need to send a message.

The fools are operating from ~mission(Location|Address). We need them all gone. Make it as loud as you can. We’ll send your payment once everyone’s taken care of.

- Stows out.

title: Time to roll on CFP
description:
Looking for anyone with an itchy trigger finger. We're looking to move against some CFP at  ~mission(Location|Address) and take it for ourselves. You gotta play this smart though. There are a bunch of satellite outposts around the main one and all of 'em got security, so you should take out each of these before you take the main base.

But hey, if you wanna jump right in the deep end and fight off all the reinforcements, that's on you. As long as you get it done.

Stows out.

title: Time to roll on CFP
description:
Looking for anyone with an itchy trigger finger. We're looking to move against some CFP at  ~mission(Location|Address) and take it for ourselves. You gotta play this smart though. There are a bunch of satellite outposts around the main one and all of 'em got security, so you should take out each of these before you take the main base.

But hey, if you wanna jump right in the deep end and fight off all the reinforcements, that's on you. As long as you get it done.

Stows out.

title: Go on the warpath
description:
Looking for some hitters to go drop some violence on some local dipshits who've been pulling jobs in the system against Headhunters. We tried reaching out to explain the error of their ways, but they shot our messenger, so now we go with option B.

You'll find them holed up near ~mission(Location|Address). Go there and repaint the walls with their blood.

Have fun.

Stows out.

title: Taking out some XenoThreat trash
description:
Just got clearance from my Judge to start banging back against XenoThreat. Been eyeballing some spots under their control near ~mission(Location|Address).

I'll give you the targets to hit, you kill everyone you find. Hell, I'd love to go myself, sounds like fun.

-Stows

title: A little retaliation
description:
Been getting word that CFP security have been getting a little more aggressive and started pushing people out of the homes they've built out of the scrap in the system and they want payback, so they came to us.

Head out to ~mission(Location|Address) and clear out the CFP there. Should be pretty cut and dry with a nice payday.

Stows out.

title: Driving CFP out
description:
We've been trying to play nice with these Citizens for Prosperity people, but they've made it abundantly clear that we don't have a place in their 'safe system.' Their use of mercs for security have been causing all kinds of unreasonable violence like when this asshole ~mission(TargetName) opened fire on a group of settlers to drive them away from an outpost they'd been eyeing. So now the gloves are coming off.

I need some hard workers to go hit ~mission(Location|Address) and take out ~mission(TargetName|Last). Odds are, they'll stay hidden until you prove you're enough of a threat, so make sure you do some damage.

Stows out.

title: Sweep and clear some CFP haunts
description:
Got word from my Judge that we're to take back some of the outposts that CFP have taken over. They're a little pissed that CFP's getting as much of a foothold in the system as they are and think it's making the Headhunters look weak.

Found a couple candidates near ~mission(Location|Address) that could use a sweep. Icing on the cake is that the head of security there is ~mission(TargetName). Not sure if you've heard of 'em, but they shot up a handful of Clips last month, so it's a win-win. Get some territory back and punch out someone who could really stand to get got.

Stows out.

title: Hit a CFP Complex
description:
Got a big one here. We need a team to head out to ~mission(Location|Address). Word is CFP are dug in at three different clusters in the area. Our judge wants them all cleared out. Seems one of their mercs, a real mean skag named ~mission(TargetName), is holed up at one of them. We want you to go there, clear them all out and take out ~mission(TargetName|Last).

Get yourself a nice little payday in the process.

Stows out.

title: Taking XenoThreat Turf
description:
Need some good soldiers with a taste for violence to hit some XenoThreat hideouts located around ~mission(Location|Address). I'll get you the specifics if you're down, but you'll have to wipe out two separate clusters of hideouts. 

We've also gotten word that ~mission(TargetName) is lurking around down there. If you take out enough XenoThreat dirtbags, they'll pop they're head up. 

When they do, put a round in it.

Stows out.

title: Taking down a XenoThreat Hideout
description:
Got a juicy assignment for any big-time enforcers who want to clear a big payday. Over at ~mission(Location|Address) we got some XenoThreat turf run by a real bastard named ~mission(TargetName). Now if you've been in the system long enough, you've probably either heard of ~mission(TargetName|Last) or at least seen their work. Skag has a tendency to leaves bodies wherever they go.

Anyway, Judge wants this area swept clean, that means you gotta hit all three clusters and kill every XenoThreat dirt you find. Kill enough and ~mission(TargetName|Last) won't be able to hide.

Take them all out and have one on us.

Stows out.

title: Hit on XenoThreat command
description:
These XenoThreat assholes are like aloprats. Every time you thing you wipe them out, they just pop back up again. They seem to be back to their usual shit and trying to put together something big. No idea what, but we've been cleared to stop it before it starts.

A group of XenoThreat biggies are supposedly meeting at ~mission(Location|Address) to plan or just rage or whatever it is they do, but we're gonna bust it up. Or you are.

Head over there and wipe out everyone you find. Sure enough I'm sure the biggies will jump into the fight. That's what they always do.

This'll be a tough one. As much as I hate XenoThreat, they're damn good in a fight, so watch yourself and bring help if you can.

Stows out.

title: Need a death at ~mission(Location)
description:
Need someone taken care of. They're holed up near ~mission(Location|Address). Not sure if you care who they are, but their name's ~mission(TargetName). Not much to tell, local thug who killed someone who was connected.

They've been on the run, so they're gonna be skittish. I'd approach with caution.

Stows out.

title: Kill the king
description:
Looking for any hitters available for a quick gig. Over at ~mission(Location|Address), they're getting hit by some geniuses led by ~mission(TargetName). We've tussled against ~mission(TargetName|Last) in the past so it's no surprise they haven't wised up. 

We want you to head there and take them down. Kill whoever you like, but ~mission(TargetName|Last) should be your focus.

Stows out.

title: Kill the king
description:
Looking for any hitters available for a quick gig. Over at ~mission(Location|Address), they're getting hit by some geniuses led by ~mission(TargetName). We've tussled against ~mission(TargetName|Last) in the past so it's no surprise they haven't wised up. 

We want you to head there and take them down. Kill whoever you like, but ~mission(TargetName|Last) should be your focus.

Stows out.

title: Need someone taken out
description:
Got a crew that's been hitting Headhunter ships lately. Their leader's a real piece of work named ~mission(TargetName). We've tracked them to  ~mission(Location|Address), so we're looking for someone to put them down for good.

This group likes to fight, but shouldn't be a problem for someone like you. 

Get over there and get it done.

Stows out.

title: Need a CFP taken down
description:
Need an available trigger to take down a target in a CFP outpost. They're a real piece of work named ~mission(TargetName). Old school merc filled with lead-pipe cruelty. 

Heard they're posted over at ~mission(Location|Address). Swing by and take them out. Try not to cause too much damage. They're the target, not anyone else.

Stows out.

title: Green light on ~mission(TargetName|Last)
description:
Word's come down through my bosses that we're settling old debts. I've got an open line on this old-time hitter named ~mission(TargetName) who's racked up a hefty kill list. We caught wind that they were hiding out with some people over at ~mission(Location|Address) who aren't the biggest fans of us, so they probably won't take kindly to you. ~mission(TargetName|Last) is the target here, but you might have to mix it up with them.

Again, whenever we've tried to take out ~mission(TargetName|Last), they've killed their killer. I feel like you'll fare better, but I'd bring backup if you got it.

Good luck.

-Stows

title: Kill the king
description:
Looking for any hitters available for a quick gig. Over at ~mission(Location|Address), they're getting hit by some geniuses led by ~mission(TargetName). We've tussled against ~mission(TargetName|Last) in the past so it's no surprise they haven't wised up.

Stows out.

title: Plug a traitor
description:
This shit saddens me. Not sure if you've ever crossed paths with ~mission(TargetName) in your dealings with us. Thought they were a real good one. Been with the Headhunters for years, but something must have happened because they went running to CFP for protection. Sold out some of our brothers and sisters along the way.

All the Judges are furious and wants blood. That's where you come in. Go to ~mission(Location|Address), find ~mission(TargetName|Last), and kill them.

Doesn't have to be anything fancy. Just want the result.

Damn shame.

Stows out.

title: Drop a XenoThreat
description:
Got a line on a XenoThreat that's been a pain in the ass. Not sure if you've heard the name, but ~mission(TargetName) is a scumbag even by XenoThreat standards. Vicious, sadistic, and a prick to boot. We want someone to punch their number. You up for it?

Last word was that they were somewhere around ~mission(Location|Address). Head there and take 'em out. Pretty simple.

Stows out.

title: Hit on XenoThreat at the Yard
description:
Not sure if you've heard but ~mission(Location|Address) is getting hit by XenoThreat. Situation's not good, but under control. Here's the deal though, the assholes attacking are being led by some real trash named ~mission(TargetName). We've dealt with ~mission(TargetName|Last) before and they continually slip away before we can put them down.

That changes. We want you to head there and take out ~mission(TargetName|Last) before they squirm out of this noose.

Stows out.

title: Head of the snake
description: Clashing with some XenoThreat scumbags over at ~mission(Location|Address) and learned that ~mission(TargetName) is leading them. I ran it by my Judge and she lit up at the chance to take this asshole down, so we want you to head out there and make sure they don't walk away from this attack.\n\nStows out.

title: Need a scalpel at Carver's
description:
Got some people over at ~mission(Location|Address) weathering the storm of a XenoThreat assault. That sucks, sure, but turns out it's providing an opportunity for some payback. Those XenoThreat pukes are being led by ~mission(TargetName) who's been on the shit list of my boss for weeks now.

I'm looking for you to head out there and put 'em down.

Stows out.

title: Need a hit on the Riviera
description:
So we got a situation over at ~mission(Location|Address). One of our outposts is getting hit by XenoThreat. While that kinda blows, it is giving us an interesting opportunity. See the attack's being led by ~mission(TargetName) who's been on the Headhunters shit list for some time now.

We want you to head there and take them out. Feel free to kill any other XenoThreat assholes you want, but ~mission(TargetName|Last) is the target. Lotta people have tried before so it definitely won't be easy. I'd even recommend bringing some friends, whatever it takes to finally put ~mission(TargetName|Last) down.

Stows out.

title: Need a CFP taken down
description:
Need an available trigger to take down a target in a CFP outpost. They're a real piece of work named ~mission(TargetName). Old school merc filled with lead-pipe cruelty. 

Heard they're posted over at ~mission(Location|Address). Swing by and take them out. Try not to cause too much damage. They're the target, not anyone else.

Stows out.

title: Shot in the chaos
description:
My boss is looking for an available hitter. Headhunters are looking to retake ~mission(Location|Address). The CFP Mercs there have been digging in for a long fight. Look, we don't want to kill anyone we don't have to, so we're looking into other options.

Security there's being run by ~mission(TargetName) and my Judge thinks that if they're taken out, the rest'll scatter. Shedding a little blood's better than a lot, right?

-Stows

title: Need someone taken out
description:
Got a crew that's been hitting Headhunter ships lately. Their leader's a real piece of work named ~mission(TargetName). We've tracked them to  ~mission(Location|Address), so we're looking for someone to put them down for good.

This group likes to fight, but shouldn't be a problem for someone like you. 

Get over there and get it done.

Stows out.

title: Wanted: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
Here's the deal, we just got word that a XenoThreat power player named ~mission(TargetName) just came out of hiding and was spotted at ~mission(Location|Address). 

Headhunters have been hungry to put this asshole in the ground for months, so we launched an assault against the outpost, but the Judge wants to make sure ~mission(TargetName|Last) doesn't slip away, so they want to use you as insurance.

This'll be a tough kill in the middle of a warzone, but we'll pay out if you pull it off.

Stows out.

title: XenoThreat Lieutenant needs some killing
description:
Headhunters just rallied up a crew to go hit ~mission(Location|Address) and wipe out the XenoThreat there, but I'm looking to add some extra insurance. 

See there's this heavy hitter there named ~mission(TargetName) who's up in the XenoThreat command structure and we want them taken out. Every other one you kill is gravy, but they're your prime target.

-Stows

title: Deep space hit
description:
Got word of crew that's been pulling jobs and building a rep for themselves. Since they've said they don't want anything to do with Headhunters, we're looking to break 'em apart before they become a problem. Their leader is some punk named ~mission(TargetName) and we figure if they met the wrong end of a bullet, the rest of them would break apart.

We're told you can find ~mission(TargetName|Last) around ~mission(Location|Address). Head over and take care of it.

They shouldn't pose much of a problem to a pro like you.

Stows out.

title: Paid Target in CFP
description:
Headhunters are launching an attack near ~mission(Location|Address). This ex-Marine asshole named ~mission(TargetName) has been sending their mercs to clear out nearby encampments if they don't surrender their weapons.

While all the security have been greenlit, ~mission(TargetName|Last) has been singled out. In their last raid, they beat a squatter to death for talking back. Turns out that squatter was the cousin of one of our Clips, so they're paying extra to make sure justice is done.

Watch yourself though, ~mission(TargetName|Last) may be a scumbag who has this coming, they're still ex-military so they won't be easy to take down.

-Stows

title: Intercepted Supply Run
description:
Life is tough on the frontier, and every delivery to our settlers is important. We really can't afford to lose any more this year.

One of our key suppliers has been hit by a group of outlaws over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and gone silent on us. I fear the worst, but if we can still recover the supplies they were transporting, it could make a huge difference.

Chances are the outlaws who attacked them are still lurking around there so be on your guard. Once you've dealt with them, grab the cargo and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Make sure you're flying a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> too.

Fly safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Intercepted Supply Run
description:
Life is tough on the frontier, and every delivery to our settlers is important. We really can't afford to lose any more this year.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Recovering Valuable Supplies
description:
A Citizens for Prosperity ship has been ambushed by a group of outlaws over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and we need a skilled pilot to help them out.

We lost contact with them mid comms, but it sounded like they were taking heavy fire. It may be too late for them, but the vital supplies they were carrying could still be put to good use. Fly over there, take out any hostiles, and recover the shipment. You'll need a ship that can support <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to transport the supplies onto your ship.

Take them to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I'll guarantee they'll be put to good use.

Be safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Crucial Supplies Need Retrieving
description:
We were in the process of delivering an urgent shipment to the folks over at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> when our pilot ran into a group of outlaws. They tried to run, but it was already too late.

There is silver lining though. The trackers are showing the cargo is still intact, located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. There's a good chance the outlaws are guarding it while they locate a ship big enough to transport everything. While I don't want to risk losing another pilot, the need of the cargo aboard is desperate enough that it justifies the decision to send someone to recover it.

This won't be easy, these outlaws showed our pilot no mercy. You'll need to take them out first before getting the cargo back. Bring a ship that can store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> for the moving. Deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination)</EM4>  and let's make this right.

Fly safe,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Cargo Shipment Must Be Completed
description:
More and more CFP ships are being targeted lately, and despite our best efforts to keep our trading routes quiet, we're still losing haulers to outlaw attacks.

Our pilot over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is the latest casualty. It pains me to think about how much we've lost, but as long as there are people who need our help, we have to keep on fighting.

If you have a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>, we need you to head to the above location and recover that cargo.

This won't be easy, the pilot was one of our best and wouldn't go down without a fight. Let's not underestimate these outlaws, bring a trustworthy crew and watch each other's backs.

Once you've got the cargo, deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I'll get it processed.

Good luck and take care,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Special Recovery Operation
description:
I wouldn't normally ask someone to do something so risky, but these are exceptional circumstances.

Our pilot was transporting some vital cargo when they were targeted by a group of outlaws. Under no circumstances can we allow them to get their hands on the cargo.

With the size of the hostile force who attacked, you won't be able to do this on your own, you'll need to bring a skilled crew with you to  <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> in order to  take out these outlaws and get the cargo back. Make sure at least one of you has a ship that can store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>.

If by some miracle you can get that cargo back, take it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

It's a lot to ask, but if you can pull this off you'll have my and the whole organizations appreciation.

Best of luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Retrieve Supplies
description:
Hi,

It appears an electrical issue caused us to lose track of a ~mission(Ship) carrying medical supplies. Thankfully, I received word that the ship was found at ~mission(Location|Address). We really need someone to get out there and recover the supplies onboard before someone else does. Those provisions are desperately needed at ~mission(Destination|Address). Any chance you could grab them and complete the delivery? 

Makes me nervous seeing that the ship is at a lagrange point. Lots of folks scour them for stuff like this. Would be smart to come prepared to defend yourself if someone else comes looking to steal it.

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you.    

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Find Lost Supply Ship
description:
Hey,

I’m concerned a ~mission(Ship) moving medical supplies for us might’ve come under attack. The signal was lost around ~mission(Location|Address), which has seen a spike in outlaw activity recently. Losing that ship alone would be bad enough, but it’ll be even worse if those supplies don’t make it to ~mission(Destination). 

We would need you to search for the ship at its last known position, recover the supplies, and then take them to ~mission(Destination|Address). Your help would make a bad situation better. 

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Reclaim Stolen Cargo
description:
Hey,

Outlaws used a fake distress beacon to lure one of our cargo ships into a trap and steal the supplies onboard. Thankfully, we placed trackers in the cargo containers, because the stuff is valuable mining and construction materials needed at ~mission(Destination). 

Looks like the goods ended up at ~mission(Location|Address). Need someone to head there, reclaim the supplies, and take them to ~mission(Destination|Address). Doubt they’ll make it easy for you, but if it helps, they didn’t show any mercy to our ship crew. Reclaiming those supplies will not only help the CFP but ensure that our crew didn’t die in vain.   

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Recover Cargo
description:
Hi,

Someone knocked out one of our supply ships and towed it to ~mission(Location|Address). We really need the cargo onboard. You available to head over there and recover that cargo? 

Once you’ve got the goods, we need them taken to their original destination at ~mission(Destination|Address). Did a little digging into this group, and let’s just say, they don’t come off as very professional. Shouldn’t give you too much resistance, but still best to show up ready to throw down.

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Fly Safe, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Raid to Recover Supplies
description:
Hey,

Outlaws in the system have been getting aggressive lately, targeting more of our convoys. They recently ambushed one of our cargo ships and stole supplies desperately needed by our operations. If we don’t get it back, we’re worried that the locals will start losing faith. They need to know that Citizens for Prosperity can’t just be bullied out of operation.

We managed to track the outlaws to ~mission(Location|Address). Now we need someone who isn’t afraid of crossing these criminals to recover the shipment and deliver it to ~mission(Destination|Address). 

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

So, do you think you could make the run for us?

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Regain Supplies from XenoThreat
description:
Hey,

One of our supply ships fell prey to a XenoThreat ambush. I’ll spare you the grisly details, but all that really remains is the cargo our people were carrying to ~mission(Destination|Address). Trackers hidden within the cargo shows that XenoThreat collected the goods and then took them to a few locations spread out across ~mission(Location|Address).
 
We can’t let the XenoThreat get away with what they did to our crew and keep all those goods too. That’s why we want to strike back on both fronts. We need someone who can raid that location, retrieve the stolen cargo, and teach the Xenos that there will be consequences for their horrendous actions. Can you help us fight back?

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Easy Pickings
description:
Get this, we were sifting through some comms and picked up some excitement about a big score. It was easy work to figure out where they're hiding a ship loaded with cargo and we figured, hey, why keep this profitable knowledge to ourselves? 

Send us a few creds in finder fees and we'll send you the coordinates of the asteroid base where the ship is stashed. It’s locked inside a hangar, so you’ll need to get to it via the station’s elevators. But once inside, you’ll be able to override the lockdown at a console. Do that and it should be easy pickings.

57 65 65 76 69 6c

title: Goods for the Getting
description:
You'd figure that if people were planning a big heist they wouldn't leave all the details laying around spectrum where just about anybody could hack them? 

But hey, their loss is your gain. Currently, a cargo-heavy ship is locked down in the hangar of an asteroid base. Only way to access it is via the station’s elevators. Once inside, you’ll be able to use a console to override the lockdown to get everything out of there. We’ll happily sell you the coordinates, but the rest is up to you. 

Guess their loss will be our gain too.

57 65 65 76 69 6c

title: XenoThreat = GoodLoot
description:
You know who probably deserves taking down a peg or two? XenoThreat. 

We pulled some intel off a server that had details of all their upcoming operations, and for the right price, we could send you the exact coordinates of where an XT ship fully loaded with primo cargo is waiting. 

Here’s a little taste of what info we have so you know we’re not messing around. XenoThreat stashed the ship in a locked asteroid base hangar that can only be accessed via the station’s elevators. We can’t get the hangar doors open for you but have adjusted the security protocols so you’ll be able to use a console in the hangar to override the lockdown.  

Interested?

57 65 65 76 69 6c

57 65 65 76 69 6c

title: XenoThreat = GoodLoot
description:
You know who probably deserves taking down a peg or two? XenoThreat. 

We pulled some intel off a server that had details of all their upcoming operations, and for the right price, we could send you the exact coordinates of where an XT ship fully loaded with primo cargo is waiting. 

Here’s a little taste of what info we have so you know we’re not messing around. XenoThreat stashed the ship in a locked asteroid base hangar that can only be accessed via the station’s elevators. We can’t get the hangar doors open for you but have adjusted the security protocols so you’ll be able to use a console in the hangar to override the lockdown.  

Interested?

57 65 65 76 69 6c

description:

Send us a few creds in finder fees and we'll send you the coordinates of the asteroid base where the ship is stashed. It’s locked inside a hangar, so you’ll need to get to it via the station’s elevators. But once inside, you’ll be able to override the lockdown at a console. Do that and it should be easy pickings.
