title: Plenty of Cargo to Share
description:
Hey, 

We got the details on the location of a ship fit to burst with cargo. Sure, there may already be other people on the way to steal it, but there's probably more than enough loot to share, right?

It’s sealed up in an asteroid base hangar that you’ll need to access via the station’s elevators. Once inside, you’ll be able to use a console to override the lockdown to get everything out of there. 

If you want in on this free-for-all, just pay our administration fee and we'll send you the coordinates.

57 65 65 76 69 6c

title: Enough For Everyone
description:
In some of the darker corners of spectrum, rumors are flying about a ship that’s overflowing with cargo and would make for the perfect score. But here’s the thing, we’ve accessed the location’s network and dug up some info these amateurs don’t have. The ship is locked down in an asteroid base hangar that can only be accessed via the station’s elevators. Once inside, a console can override the lockdown of the hangar to get everything out of there.

We figure everyone in the system deserves a shot if they pay the price. Just send us a few credits and we'll share the coordinates with you.

57 65 65 76 69 6c

title: XenoThreat Grab Bag
description:
So, in a bit of good luck we got the details on a XenoThreat ship that's overflowing with cargo. Now, as it turns out, we're not the only ones who are thinking this sounds ripe for the taking and it seems there may be a few others looking to take advantage of the situation already, but a little competition never hurt anyone, right?

Thing is that the ship is locked down in an asteroid base hangar that you’ll need to access via the station’s elevators. Once inside, you’ll be able to use a console to override the lockdown to get everything out of there. If you're interested in getting one over on these xenophobic thugs, or are just looking for a top-notch score, then pay our admin fee and we'll send you the coordinates.

57 65 65 76 69 6c

title: Claim XenoThreat ~mission(Ship)
description:
Been given some primo info that could be a boon for both of us. Someone took out a XenoThreat hauler near ~mission(Location|Address). It must have some sweet, sweet salvage because a Xeno recovery team was there and working that site almost immediately. Would be a real shame if someone else showed up, knocked out the other Xeno ships, and then claimed all that salvage for their own. 

I’ve got a few colleagues interested in the action themselves, but Rough & Ready members getting caught there would only look like we’re taking sides. Would be much better if an unaffiliated force stepped in to deliver the surprise strike. 

Figure we can all win here. I’ll sell you the coordinates to the wreck, and you can clear out the XenoThreat forces and then pick it all apart. Pretty sure they’ll put up a fight for it, but just come in prepared and consider all that collateral damage as more profit off salvage. 

- Smokey

title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #1
description:
Looking to gain critical hands-on experience battling a variety of targets and situations? Then my Combat Gauntlet might be the perfect fit for you.

Please understand that this course is intended for pilots who have already mastered flying basics and are ready to take their abilities to the next level. If you’re starting off and want to learn the ropes, I’d recommend logging some hours in an Arena Commander simpod. But for those ready to face a real challenge, I firmly believe that students learn best by doing. 

That’s why I’ve designed these eight scenarios to be as realistic as possible. I promise you this is the closest thing to Navy combat pilot training you can get without enlisting, so don’t expect a lot of hand holding. <EM4>The risk of injury to yourself or your ship should be taken very seriously.</EM4>

GAUNTLET SCENARIOS:
1. Single Targets
2. Multiple Targets
3. Target Priority
4. Target Stealth
5. Missiles and Countermeasures
6. Multi-Crew Targets
7. Corvette with Escorts
8. Capital Ship Encounter

So, if you’re ready to challenge yourself and prove you got what it takes to be a great pilot, the first scenario will focus on handling a single target. Head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to begin.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Situational Awareness – Don’t get so focused on taking a target that you aren’t watching your flight path. No good taking out the enemy if you fly headfirst into an asteroid.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly    


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL 
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #2
description:
Congrats on completing part one of this eight-part course.

Scenario two will focus on how to deal with multiple targets at the same time. Goal here is give you a better handle on how to balance offense and defense.   

Whenever you’re set, grab a combat ship, and head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to begin.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Pick Your Fight - For situations where you’re coming up against multiple targets of equal threat, your best strategy is to focus on neutralizing one target at a time to gradually reduce the amount of incoming fire.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #3
description:
Congrats on completing part two of this eight-part course.   

The third scenario throws tactical considerations into the mix. This time around the attacking ships are from distinct classes with distinct battlefield applications. Knowing what targets to prioritize is vital to surviving engagements against multiple ships.      

Whenever you’re ready, head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to get started.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Bigger They Are – Try to evaluate which threat is the most dangerous and take them out first.
- Shields – If you’re taking a lot of damage, don’t be afraid to boost away and let your shields regenerate.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #4
description:
Congrats on completing part three of this eight-part course.

Good combat pilots know not all threats are apparent. It’s the threats you don’t expect that can be the most devastating. Scenario four is focused on how to identify and deal with stealth targets. Hopefully by the end, you’ll understand just how important your radar is in determining who you’re really up against. Expect to have regular and stealth ships hunting you down.    

Make your way to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> whenever you’re ready, and remember to keep your eyes on your radar.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Surprise Attacks - Pinging your surroundings can sometimes reveal hidden ships. Be ready for contacts to show up unexpectedly.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #5
description:
Congrats on completing part four of this eight-part course.   

The fifth scenario focuses on defensive tactics. Knowing when to take evasive measures and deploy either decoys or noise countermeasures is essential to your survival. That’s why the aggressors in this exercise will be armed with missiles.   

Ensure your countermeasures are fully stocked and then go to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to start.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Ready to Launch - Easy access to your decoys and countermeasures can be critical in your success in dealing with incoming missile fire. 
- Stand and Fight - Resist the temptation to hit the afterburner to escape as you’ll increase your signature and make it easier for the missile to hit you. They’re almost certainly much faster than you anyway.
- Close the Gap – While it may seem counterintuitive, getting closer to an enemy ship can be an advantage. Missiles have a minimum range and if you’re inside of it they won’t be able to get a lock on you.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #6
description:
Congrats on completing part five of this eight-part course.

I’m bringing out the big guns for scenario six. Time for you to go up against larger, multi-crewed ships, which provide a few new challenges. Not only will you have to contend with their enhanced firepower but their multifaceted shields means you’ll have to target one shield face continually to do real damage. Easier said than done when both of y’all are moving at such fast speeds.      

Find your way to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> whenever you're ready.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>. 

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Size Advantage – When going up against a larger ship, try to stay away from their front as typically this is where the majority of their offensive fire is located. 

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL   
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #7
description:
Congrats on completing part six of this eight-part course.

You’ve gained a lot of experience across the past six scenarios, and now it’s time to put it all to practice. Scenario seven puts you up against a corvette-class ship and its escorts. This extended encounter will push you to the limit and test everything you got.   

The only thing left is to understand the limit of your skillset. To put it simply, you can’t do everything yourself. Developing and maintaining relationships with fellow pilots that you can call upon for support is really the last piece of the puzzle. Not saying you can't overcome encounters like this by yourself, but even the Navy doesn’t send their ace pilots on a patrol alone.    

Once you decided whether to do this alone or call in some support, head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to kick off the encounter.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE
- Strength in Diversity – Think about the roles your allies will be filling and choose who to bring carefully to help balance strengths and weaknesses. You’ll want ships capable of taking on the Corvette while others deal with the escort.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL   
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

title: Combat Gauntlet - Scenario #8
description:
Welcome to the final scenario of the Combat Gauntlet.

Throughout this course, you’ve gotten to experience the advanced combat and defensive tactics needed to survive a variety of encounters. Time to take all those new skills and knowledge and see how they hold up against a large capital vessel and some escort ships.

You know the drill by now. Once you and all your allies are set, find your way to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to see how you do when truly pushed to the limits.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE
- Patience is a Virtue – If you’ve balanced your squadron properly, you should be able to come out on top, just don’t expect it to be a quick fight. Ships this big don’t go down quickly.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     


ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL   
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

title: New Defense Contract: ~mission(TargetName) Elimination
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has been hired to combat the rising number of outlaws using Nyx as a staging ground for their operations, with the intention of attacking neighboring UEE systems.

As a preventative measure, we require you to travel to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and eliminate the ringleader <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> to deter their planned attack on Stanton. They and their crew are highly dangerous and you are <EM4>advised  to bring a wingman</EM4> for support.

Contractors who can prove themselves reliable and competent in executing operations will be eligible for future missions with InterSec.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has identified more outlaws who are planning an operation against UEE interests from within Nyx. Your mission will be to neutralize this potential threat before they can enact their plans.

Travel to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and dispatch the leader of these outlaws, <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> without hesitation. We have scouted a small number of ships, but our report suggest these are competent pilots - <EM4>bringing back up is advised.</EM4>

Remember that eliminating these outlaws not only serves the people of Nyx, but the UEE too.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin

description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: Seemingly unsatisfied with their takings in Nyx, an outlaw group lead by <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> has been planning a major strike against the UEE. This cannot be allowed to come to pass.

Thanks to the work of our Intelligence team, we've been able to track them down to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

Head there as soon as you can and engage before they have a chance to leave the system. Based on our strategic analysis, we recommend a <EM4>well-armed and skilled fleet</EM4> will be necessary for the successful completion of this mission.

InterSec Defense Solutions

title: Preemptive Strike On ~mission(TargetName)
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec requires a skilled contractor to eliminate a highly dangerous group of criminals based in Nyx who are planning a coordinated strike on a prominent member of the UEE Navy.

We have intercepted a crucial piece of intelligence suggesting a known terrorist by the name of <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> intends to carry out this assassination along with the help of local criminal elements.

They are currently located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, making this an ideal time for us to strike. Be warned, these outlaws are experienced killers - bringing a <EM4>group of trustworthy allies</EM4> is advised.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

title: Neutralize Vanduul Target
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec is in need of a highly skilled combat pilot who can locate and neutralize a dangerous Vanduul target.

An operator of ours has identified a Vanduul ship flying within the vicinity of <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We've been given strict instructions to eliminate any Vanduul spotted on the fringes of UEE space, for fear of encroachment into the Empire's territory.

Bring a <EM4>small fleet of competent pilots</EM4> with you to engage and neutralize the target.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

title: Eliminate Vanduul Ship
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship
Briefing: InterSec requires the services of a skilled pilot who’s prepared to assist in taking down a dangerous Vanduul target that has been involved in numerous attacks.

Vanduul incursions have been on the rise recently, posing not only a threat to the system of Nyx, but the UEE as a whole. It is imperative that these sightings are responded to in a swift and efficient manner. 

We require you to fly to the last known sighting of the Vanduul ship at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and eliminate them immediately.  

Vanduul pilots are highly skilled and extremely dangerous. Engage the enemy immediately and do not hesitate – they will not show the same mercy.

Compensation proportionate to the risk of the contract will be awarded.


Respectfully,
Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

title: Recover Vanduul Corpses
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: <EM4>Cargo Capable Ship</EM4>, Personal Arms, <EM4>Heavy-Duty Tractor Beam</EM4>
Briefing: 
Our latest intel shows that the Shattered Blade have replenished their stock of Vanduul corpses and will shortly be transferring them from the old <EM4>QV Logistics station</EM4>they're operating from to an interested buyer. The UEE can't have another incident like what happened with ASD so they're eager for us to <EM4>recover the cryopods</EM4> and deliver them to <EM4>the freight elevator at ~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

While the Shattered Blade members present at the site might offer resistance, they are not the focus of you mission. Deal with them as needed and get the cryopods. 

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

title: Recover Vanduul Tech
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: 
To prevent the Shattered Blade from flooding the black market with xeno-contraband, the UEE has charged InterSec with <EM4>recovering a stash of Vanduul Plating and Metal.</EM4> from the old <EM4>QV Logistics station</EM4> the gang has been occupying. Once you have the materials in your posession, deliver them to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Following from your previous experience, it would not be surprising if the Shattered Blade offer resistance, but ensure that your focus is on recovering the materials.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

title: Low Risk Cargo Retrieval
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo

title: They Will Be Missed
description:
A security officer by the name of ~mission(TargetName) is in desperate need of an early retirement. They are currently stationed at ~mission(Location|Address) along with a host of other eager types in uniforms. 

Feel free to indulge your violent whims, but it is only the death of ~mission(TargetName) which will earn you my credit and thanks.

Earnestly,
Vaughn

title: All Things Come To An End
description:
They say there is no honor among thieves. Today, it seems, you're targeting one of your own. 

Please head to ~mission(Location|Address) and kill ~mission(TargetName). What you do with the others there is entirely up to you.

Earnestly,
Vaughn

title: A Challenging Contract
description:
I've been conscripted to provide a trigger pull for a very motivated client. The target is <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>, a loathsome character by all accounts who's seemed to relish the temporary authority that their mercenary position affords them. They believe their sadism to be righteous and my client would like to remind them otherwise.

They have recently been hired by ASD as part of a mercenary team at <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>, so it won't be an easy approach as there will undoubtedly be other armed individuals. I'll expect you to react accordingly, but ~mission(TargetName|Last) is your target.

You will be paid upon completion.

All the best,

Vaughn

title: A Challenging Contract
description:
I've been conscripted to provide a trigger pull for a very motivated client. You will be paid upon completion.

All the best,

Vaughn

title: A Well Deserved Break
description:
A request has made its way to my desk regarding the untimely end of one ~mission(TargetName), a member of the Claw Salamander who is currently scuttling around an old QV Breaker Station. 

It is highly likely that you will find them at ~mission(Location|Address).  Be mindful though that with a station this large it may take a bit of searching to track them down. 

Hope you enjoy your time in Nyx,
Vaughn

title: A Well Deserved Break
description:
There is a member of the Nyx gang the Claw Salamanders, ~mission(TargetName), who has made it on to my naughty list. They had been on the run for quite awhile, but just recently popped back up at an old mining station in the Keeger Belt. Our lucky day shall be their last.  

Word is that you can find them at ~mission(Location|Address).  Unfortunately, there is a strong chance you may have to do some repairs to the station itself before you can gain access to that particular area.

But I'm sure you're more than up to the challenge.

Sincerely,
Vaughn

title: A Well Deserved Break
description:
I've been having a hard time tracking this target down. They're part of a gang known as the Claw Salamanders who tend to be quite itinerate. However, it seems the group has been trying to get an old QV Breaker Station operational again and I think this just may be the chance to take out ~mission(TargetName) once and for all. 

Start your search at ~mission(Location|Address).  These stations can apparently be quiet cavernous at  times so it may take a bit of effort to locate the target once you're on site.

However, I have all the confidence in your abilities,
Vaughn

title: A Well Deserved Break
description:
There is a member of the Nyx gang the Claw Salamanders, ~mission(TargetName), who has made it on to my naughty list. They had been on the run for quite awhile, but just recently popped back up at an old mining station in the Keeger Belt. Our lucky day shall be their last.

Sincerely,
Vaughn

title: They Will Be Missed
description:
A senior security official by the name of ~mission(TargetName) is about to have their long career come to a very violent and sudden end. While they are currently at ~mission(Location|Address), they will not be easy to get to. I fear that a bit of work will be required to draw them out.  

I recommend killing enough of their underlings that they will be forced to face you personally. Of course, once they do decide to finally show their face, it should be a rather straightforward matter. 

Earnestly,
Vaughn

title: All Things Come To An End
description:
I am not sure if you’re acquainted with ~mission(Location|Address), but ~mission(TargetName) is the one who calls the shots there. I need them eliminated.

That is easier said then done, I'm afraid. They are notoriously reluctant to see to matters personally, preferring their underlings to handle the dirty work. That said, eliminate enough of the underlings and they will have no choice but to deal with you themselves.

Earnestly,
Vaughn

title: End of a Salamander
description:
One of the leaders of the mysterious Claw Salamanders gang, a ~mission(TargetName), has worn out their welcome and has now become our problem to deal with. It's hardly a surprise figuring no one except their friends could understand what they're saying. 

Unfortunately, it won't be as easy as heading to ~mission(Location|Address) and dealing with them directly. Not only will you have to ensure the station is operational to reach them, it seems that you will have to draw them out of hiding too by taking out a fair number of their compatriots first.

Not the simplest of jobs, but I'm sure you'll rise to the occasion.

All the best,
Vaughn

title: Alliance Aid: Treatment Cargo Haul - Small Scale
description:
Hi,

We’ve joined the effort to help those affected by the Molina mold outbreak. There’s a small scale haul of urgently needed treatment waiting to be picked up from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and delivered to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Any chance you’re available?  
   
All you’ll need is a ship that can fit <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to make moving the stuff easier on you. 
 

Safe Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

title: Alliance Aid: Treatment Cargo Haul - Medium Scale
description:
Hey,

Pretty heartbreaking hearing what's happening to the people out in Levski with this Molina mold outbreak? Our family has decided to do all we can to help out with Alliance Aid.  Got a medium scale haul of antifungal waiting to be picked up at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and taken to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Think you can handle this for us?

Before you go, please make sure you bring a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. You'll also need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to deal with the containers. 
 

Safe Hauling,  
Reyes Ling

title: Alliance Aid: Treatment Cargo Haul - Large Scale
description:
Hi,

People are breathing a sigh of relief that a treatment for the People's Aliment has been found, but we're not out of the woods just yet. There's still plenty of folks suffering . We're hoping you can help the cause by handling a large scale haul of the stuff.  

If you're available, we need you to pick up from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and then fly it over to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. 
 

Safe Hauling,  
Reyes Ling

title: Alliance Aid: Medical Cargo Haul - Small Scale
description:

Seems like folks burned through their medical resources trying to figure out how to treat the People's Aliment. Alliance Aid is overwhelmed with requests for medical supply hauls right now. Can you help me clear one of them out?

Here's a small scale ready to go. The supplies are sitting at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> with delivery going to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Safe Hauling,  
Reyes Ling

title: Alliance Aid: Medical Cargo Haul - Medium Scale
description:
Hello,

We need your help! Medical supplies are in high demand after the Molina mold outbreak exhausted stockpiles. Thankfully, there's a medium scale haul of the stuff at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> ready to be brought to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

This run needs a hauler with a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. You'll also need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to deal with the crates.    

Please let me know if you can handle this for us.   

Safe Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

title: Alliance Aid: Interstellar Small Cargo Haul (Cryopods)
description:
Hello,

I’ve got an extremely important and sensitive hauling order here that I’m hoping you can handle. To reduce fatalities from the Molina mold outbreak, those suffering from the People’s Ailment are being put into cryopods to keep the disease from progressing before they receive the necessary treatment.   

Can you head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to pick up a small scale haul of cryopods and bring them to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> so they can get the help they need?   

If you haven’t dealt with a cryopod before, you’ll need a ship with a hold that can fit a container up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size. A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> will also be needed to move them around.  

Thanks for joining us and Alliance Aid to help bring this crisis to an end!

Ella Tieno

title: Alliance Aid: Small Supply of Research Resource
description:
To all available contractors,

Rayari needs your assistance. As part of the Alliance Aid effort, our scientists have shifted their entire focus to assisting Levski deal with Molina mold. Unfortunately, the team’s progress has stalled due to a lack of a key resource.

Obtaining it from our regular distributors could take weeks. Considering how many people desperately need help, stopping research for that long would seriously impact our effort. We’re hoping to find motivated individuals willing to procure and deliver a small scale haul of it for delivery to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

Please remember that contracted goods are tracked by their legal owners and can't be accepted. 

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

title: Alliance Aid: Med. Supply of Research Resource
description:
To all available contractors,

Good news! Rayari is working hard to help cure the People’s Ailment. Unfortunately, it has been extremely difficult to procure one key resource through our normal sources. To help us expand our access to it, we will be offering an excellent rate for those who help find and deliver it to our scientists at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Please remember that contracted goods are tracked by their legal owners and can't be accepted. 

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

title: Alliance Aid: Large Supply of Research Resource
description:

Rayari scientists are working around-the-clock to assist with the treatment for the current fungal outbreak in Levski. Losing production at that location would hamper the Alliance Aid’s effort to cure people suffering from this terrible affliction in a timely manner.

That’s why we're eager for the help of anyone who can find and deliver this vital supply to <EM4>~mission(Destination)</EM4>.

Please remember that contracted goods are tracked by their legal owners and can't be accepted.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem

title: Alliance Aid: Collect Manufacturing Resource - Small Scale
description:
POSTING: Resource Gathering 
LOCATION: Pyro System, Stanton System
WORK EXPERIENCE: Mining, Commodity Trading
TERMS*: 
As a member of Alliance Aid, Shubin Interstellar is dedicated to assisting in the production of as many high quality ventilation filters as possible. These filters are key to stopping the spread of Molina Mold and keeping more people from being stricken with the People’s Ailment. 

We’ve just received word from our facility at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> that their stockpile of a vital resource is getting low. Our normal supplier won’t be able to do a resupply run for a while, so we’re hoping you might be able to do a small scale run of it now to bridge the gap. 
 
If you’re available, simply acquire it as you see best and bring it to our facility, and we’ll compensate you well.

Resources tied to another contract will not be accepted.

*Shubin Interstellar is an equal opportunity contractor. By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

*Shubin Interstellar is an equal opportunity contractor. By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

title: Alliance Aid: Attempted Cargo Theft
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Cargo Retrieval 
APPROVAL CODE = JJ-11

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

With all these Alliance Aid ships hauling valuable cargo around, outlaws in the area have gone into a feeding frenzy. We just got word of one of their latest targets via emergency beacon and need you to go over to the <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, assess the situation, <EM4>neutralize any remaining hostiles</EM4> in the area, and if needed, secure the shipment for delivery to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Be sure to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to handle the cargo. 

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Alliance Aid: Stop Cargo Heist
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Cargo Retrieval 
APPROVAL CODE = JJ-12

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Nothing like an emergency to bring out the worst in people. This Molina mold is killing people left and right, and what do the scum of this system decide to do? That's right, they're out there trying to highjack vital shipments. Alliance Aid wants us to make sure they don't get away with it. 

You're going to head to the <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, assess the situation, <EM4>neutralize any remaining hostiles</EM4> in the area, and secure the shipment for delivery to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. I expect these jackers to put up a good fight, so feel free to take along some backup if you want.

Be sure to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to handle the cargo.  

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Alliance Aid: Thwart Cargo-jacking
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Cargo Retrieval 
APPROVAL CODE = JJ-13

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Alliance Aid just comm'd in a panic. A vital shipment that they were counting on hasn't shown up. All signs point to it getting jacked by thieves along the way so they're counting on us to make sure it gets delivered.  

You're going to head to the <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, assess the situation, <EM4>neutralize any remaining hostiles</EM4> in the area, and secure the shipment for drop off at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Be sure to have a <EM4>few support ships</EM4> with you just in case things get extra rough. 

Be sure to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to handle the cargo.  

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Alliance Aid: Supply Thief
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Neutralize Ship 
APPROVAL CODE = RT-04

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

With valuable shipments being transported to Levski thanks to this whole Alliance Aid thing, outlaws have been happy as clams targeting the loaded-up haulers. One particular scumbag, <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>, has hit a half-dozen ships so far and everyone's pretty eager to stop their spree in its tracks.

They were last spotted harrassing ships over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Head there and take out their ship. Payment will be issued once they're neutralized. 

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Alliance Aid: Resource Raiders
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Neutralize Ship 
APPROVAL CODE = RT-05

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

It seems that the People's Alliance aren't the only ones eager to get their hands on the resources needed to fight their Molina Mold outbreak. The Moraine gang has been hitting the shipping lanes hard trying to get their hands on as many haulers as they can. One particular member, <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>, and their crew have been especially successful, knocking over over a dozen ships. The folks organizing Alliance Aid are pretty eager to see this growing problem dealt with.

Recent reports have their hunting grounds over near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Head there with any support ships you want to take and neutralize them before any more vital supplies are lost. 

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Alliance Aid: Hauler Hunters
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Neutralize Ship 
APPROVAL CODE = RT-06

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of Nyx's local gangs, the Moraine, have been taking advantage of the current emergency happening in Levski and have one of their best pilots, <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>, leading attacks against any Alliance Aid haulers they can get their hands on. At the rate they've been stealing supplies from the effort, unless they're stopped soon, its going to lead to whole bunch of sick people on Levski not getting the help they need.

We've been able to track the group to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, but before you head out, you're going to need to some recruiting of your own. Unless you <EM4>take a few wingmen with you</EM4>, not sure you'll be able to neutralize this particular outlaw pack. 

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Alliance Aid: Escort Needed
description:
Citizens for Prosperity need a combat-experienced pilot to provide extra support to an Alliance Aid pilot who is making a vital trip from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> for the ongoing relief effort. 

Outlaws have been launching more attacks thanks to the increased activity brought on by the Molina Mold outbreak, so it’ll be your job to make sure that they stay safe while they’re completing their work. This route is relatively safe, so I'm not expecting too much trouble, but its better not to take the risk.

If you’re interested, you’ll rendezvous there and await further instructions.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Alliance Aid: Security Needed
description:
I was just contacted by an Alliance Aid rep who is deeply concerned for one of their contractors heading out from  <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. The ships helping the relief effort have been drawing a lot of outlaw attention and they're worried that without extra protection they won't be able to finish their vital work.  

Owing with the increased risk level and the value of the ship, it might behoove you to <EM4>bring some combat support</EM4> of your own along.

If you’re interested, head to the rendezvous and await further instructions.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Alliance Aid: Protection Detail Needed
description:
Alliance Aid has a ship vital to the relief effort leaving from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. They have received credible threats that they may be attacked and are looking to bring on additional security.

When you're ready, head to the rendezvous with yourself and <EM4>any additional combat ships you can recruit</EM4>  and await further instructions.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Alliance Aid: Ship in Trouble
description:
We’ve lost contact with an Alliance Aid supply convoy and are concerned it might be under attack from outlaws. We need you to hurry to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and support them. Any delays to the ongoing relief efforts could cost lives in Levski.


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Alliance Aid: Ship in Distress
description:
You figure these outlaws would have the decency not to interfere with relief efforts but unfortunately we've gotten word that an Alliance Aid convoy is under attack. These criminals seem to be a serious threat so it would be recommended to <EM4>bring some support along</EM4> with you. 

Once you're ready, head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and face these criminals head on.


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Alliance Aid: Ship Under Attack
description:
Everyone has been joining with Alliance Aid to help with the ongoing crisis in Levski, but it seems you can't do good in this 'verse without attracting the bad. One of the critical relief convoys was just attacked by a powerful outlaw fleet. We need you to <EM4>put together a fleet of your own</EM4> and deploy to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> as soon as possible. With any luck, you may be able to right this wrong before it's too late.


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Alliance Aid: Vital Package Retrieval
description:
ATTENTION ALL FTL COURIERS
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS** 

PICKUP LOCATION – An FTL ship carrying a delivery for Alliance Aid has not completed it's contract. The last known location has it still over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. A courier needed to retrieve package and continue delivery.

DROPOFF LOCATION – Package must be taken to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Target|Address)</EM4>. 

THREAT LEVEL – It is unclear what happened to the ship, but we expect a malfunction. Still, caution is advised. <EM4>Low level engagements</EM4> expected.

TRAVEL –  All transportation needs should be arranged by courier. 

FTL Courier Services is proud to be assisting in Alliance Aid efforts to help fight the Levski outbreak.

title: Alliance Aid: Courier Needed
description:
ATTENTION ALL FTL COURIERS
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS** 

PICKUP LOCATION – An FTL ship carrying a delivery for Alliance Aid went down at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Courier needed to retrieve package and continue delivery.

DROPOFF LOCATION – Package must be taken to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Target|Address)</EM4>. 

THREAT LEVEL – There is a strong chance that the courier was attacked by outlaws eager to acquire the vital supplies needed to stop the Molina mold out break in Levski. <EM4>Medium level engagements</EM4> expected.

TRAVEL –  All transportation needs should be arranged by courier. 

FTL Courier Services thanks you for helping us do our part for Alliance Aid.

FTL Courier Services thanks you for helping us do our part for Alliance Aid.

title: Alliance Aid: Double Interstellar Med. Haul (Medical / Filters)
description:
All right, this one is going to be a bit different. See, with everything going on with Alliance Aid, we had a screw up with our contracts and an important shipment got overlooked. Since lives are at stake, and you've already done so much to help the Transport Division, I was kinda hoping that you'd be able to step up and do a double run for us?

There's a medium scale haul of <EM4>Molina Mold treatment on microtech</EM4> and shipment of <EM4>ventilation filters on Hurston</EM4> waiting for pick-up. You'll need to make both stops, load up everything, and bring it all to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 
 
To handle the cargo, your ship should be big enough to carry cargo containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size. 

And I would double check to make sure you have your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you before heading out. Would be a huge headache if you forgot to bring one!  

It's really amazing of you to be helping out like this,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

title: Alliance Aid: Molina Mold Samples
description:
Let me start by saying that your continuing work helping the Alliance Aid efforts so far have made a considerable difference not only to us at Rayari, but to the rest of the organizations coordinating with the Collections Division. It's why I wanted to reach out to you directly. 

While we have been making great strides in combating this ongoing health crisis, there is concern amongst our researchers that Molina Mold has the potential to mutate into a new fungal strain. 
In order in ensure that our ongoing investigation into the mold is as accurate as possible, we would like you to head to the source of the growth in Levski and <EM4> harvest new samples of the Molina Mold </EM4> there directly. 

Once you have the samples collected, you will then need to deliver them to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

Thank you for your assistance at this vital juncture. 

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

title: Alliance Aid: Urgent Rescue Mission
description:
Since you've been doing so much work helping out the Defense Division I wanted to come to you with this contract direct. It's a bit of a delicate one. Two VIPs fell ill and the worry was that if word got out they were being transported they would become major targets.

Unfortunately, it seems that's exactly what happened. Our attempts to smuggle them from Nyx to Stanton for medical treatment have failed, and now the ship carrying them is under attack. 

We need you to hurry to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, neutralize the attackers and ensure that the cryopods make it safely to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

In fact, I want you to make sure you have a ship that can carry the cryopods just in case their original transport is too damaged to go on.

I sincerely hope you manage to pull this rescue mission off. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Help Deal with Outlaw Hunting Party
description:
Recently we've had incident reports of numerous Citizens for Prosperity contractors in the system having run-ins with an outlaw hunting party operating out of ~mission(Location|Address). 

To help re-establish safer routes through that sector, you will be dispatched to head there and engage with these outlaws. The group is known to travel in smaller packs, so its important that you and whatever backup you bring wait in the area to deal with all of them or else there's a chance the threat will remain. 

Thank you for helping us,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Clear CFP Route of Hostiles
description:
To help protect our pilots, Citizens for Prosperity will often recommend the use of less traditional routes through the system. However, it seems that a gang of outlaws has gotten word and has begun to stage repeated ambushes along one such flightpath. Rather than just go around the problem and risk it persisting along the new route, we feel it we be prudent to meet these outlaws head on.

You and whatever support ships you enlist will head to ~mission(Location|Address) and neutralize any hostiles you find laying in wait there. They have been known to operate in smaller packs, so it's vital that you wait until all of the hostiles have been dealt with.

Your assistance is much appreciated,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Remove Upstart Gang From Sector
description:
It feels that whenever we start to make real progress in the system, the outlaws are there to push one step back. We had recently cleared out ~mission(Location|Address) only to learn that a new outlaw gang has taken root there, using it as a launching point for various criminal enterprises. 

Since we can't afford to let this rot spread, you and a few support ships are being charged with heading there to clear out all the gang's packs. After you deal with one pack, be sure to wait until all of the hostile packs have been dealt with.

Know that you are helping to make a real difference,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Neutralize Dangerous Criminal Fleet
description:
A criminal fleet has taken up root in a sector that Citizens For Prosperity is trying to develop and all forward progress has stopped thanks to their violent actions. It is imperative to a long term goals that we find a way to neutralize this fleet before that cause any further damage.

You and your most trusted support ships will head to ~mission(Location|Address) and neutralize any hostiles you find laying in wait there. They have been known to operate in smaller packs, so it's vital that you wait until all of the hostiles have been dealt with.

Your assistance is much appreciated,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

description:
--------------------------------------------------------

--------------------------------------------------------

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: Unknown
NOTES: This particular target has proven very difficult to capture. They tend to remain hidden unless there is a big enough threat to demand their attention. That's why you and your support crew will need to take out enough of their underlings to catch their ire. Just stay put, take out any hostiles that show up, and the target should eventually show themselves.

title: QV Breaker Station Mining Rights (Exclusive)
description:
CONTRACT: Mining Rights Transfer
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
Shubin Interstellar prospectors have recently discovered the location of an abandoned QV Planetary Service Breaker Station near the Keeger belt. These stations were originally used by the defunct company to harvest valuable resources from inside asteroids but knowledge of their exact locations has been lost over the years. 

While this particular station is offline, our scout team believes that it could be made functional again with the necessary repairs. Additionally, if it was brought back online, there's already a resource-heavy asteroid in place ready to be cracked by the station's mining laser. 

Unfortunately, with all the various challenges that come with operating in Nyx, Shubin doesn't currently have the available bandwidth to handle the aforementioned repairs ourselves. This however has created an opportunity for an interested independent mining operation such as yourself. 

<EM4>TERMS*: </EM4>
We are making available the <EM4>exclusive mining rights</EM4> to this QV Breaker Station. Upon purchase, we will provide the coordinates of the station to only you and your crew. Your team will then be free to head there with a <EM4>mining vessel</EM4>, restore the <EM4>station's mining laser</EM4> to an operational status, crack the asteroid, and <EM4>harvest the resources</EM4> inside. 

Please note that while we guarantee that these coordinates will be exclusive to you, we cannot assure that other interested parties, such as outlaws, may not discover the station's location on their own. Caution is advised. 

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

title: QV Breaker Station Mining Rights (Shared)
description:
CONTRACT: Mining Rights Transfer
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS: 
Shubin Interstellar prospectors have recently discovered the location of an abandoned QV Planetary Service Breaker Station near the Keeger belt. These stations were originally used by the defunct company to harvest valuable resources from inside asteroids but knowledge of their exact locations has been lost over the years. 

While this particular station is offline, our scout team believes that it could be made functional again with the necessary repairs. Additionally, if it was brought back online, there's already a resource-heavy asteroid in place ready to be cracked by the station's mining laser. 

Unfortunately, with all the various challenges that come with operating in Nyx, Shubin doesn't currently have the available bandwidth to handle the aforementioned repairs ourselves. This however has created an opportunity for an interested independent mining operation such as yourself. 

<EM4>TERMS*:</EM4>
We are making available the <EM4>shared mining rights</EM4> to this QV Breaker Station. Upon purchase, we will provide the coordinates of the station to you and your crew. (Remember, any other interested parties who purchase the mining rights will get access to the station as well.) Your crew will then be free to head there with a <EM4>mining vessel</EM4>, restore the <EM4>station's mining laser</EM4> to an operational status, crack the asteroid, and <EM4>harvest the resources</EM4> inside. 

Please note that since this is a shared contract we are able to offer these mining rights at a reduced prices, but the resources in the asteroid will be available on a <EM4>first come, first serve</EM4> basis with any other mining crews at the site. Also, there is also a chance that other interested parties, such as outlaws, may discover the station's location on their own. Caution is advised. 

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

title: Defend InterSec Operative
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship 
Briefing: Require urgent assistance for an InterSec operative who is currently under fire at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

A group of outlaws had previously taken our operative captive with the intention of extracting sensitive information from them, but miraculously they were able to escape. Unfortunately, the pursuing outlaws now have them pinned down.

Due to the number of the ships assaulting them, we're offering additional compensation to accommodate the added danger. <EM4>Recruiting additional ships</EM4> to support you in this mission is highly advised.

Respectfully,   

Deacon Tobin

InterSec Defense Solutions

title: Yellow Level Contract: Stand Up to Aggressors
description:
Outlaw ships are harassing anyone attempting to land or leave our client’s operations at <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4>. Need someone to fly there to defend the site and protect our client’s ships before the situation gets out of control. Get there, get after those aggressors, and I'll keep you updated on the situation. 

Help take care of this and we'll pass along a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Yellow Level Contract: Defend ~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation)
description:
Ships coming and going from <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> are being targeted by hostile forces. The folks there have hired us to deal with this problem immediately.

Need someone to get there pronto and start fighting off these ships. The situation appears to be constantly evolving, so I’ll keep you updated on where you’re needed most. 

For the hustle and effort, we’ll also be paying a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for dealing with this.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Orange Level Contract: Ship Protection Needed
description:
We’ve got clients reporting outlaw attacks on ships around <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4>. They got locked down tight and anybody heading in or out is a target. Any attempts to solve the issue have just been met with more outlaw reinforcements appearing. 

The client is desperate for a solution, so we’re hiring a contractor to go and restore peace in the area. If any other issues flare up once you're there, I’ll comm you directions on how to help.  

Really need someone on this fast. So to sweeten the pot, the main contractor will also get a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Orange Level Contract: Protect Our Client’s Interests
description:
The folks at <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> are under attack and need our support. Their ships in the wider area are being targeted and there’s a growing concern that this is only a precursor to something bigger.  

The situation is evolving, but I’m being fed constant updates on what’s going on and will keep you informed as the contract progresses. 

Are you available to come to their aid? Would be smart to recruit some friends to help. These are important clients and we can’t afford to fail them. The main contractor will earn a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> if you get the job done.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Red Level Contract: Save Ships at ~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation)
description:
Ship support is needed at <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> immediately. Our client’s interests in the area are under fierce attack by outlaw forces. Looking for someone who can grab their gear, a few support ships they can trust, and deploy before it’s too late. Once you arrive, I’ll send any sitrep updates your way.  

Don’t mess this up. These clients are paying for and expecting top tier protection. If anything goes wrong, we could lose this contract. That’s why we’ll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> if all goes down without a hitch.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

description:

We’ve got VIP clients at <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> who are facing extremely aggressive and motivated outlaws targeting ships around their location. title: Finish Interrupted Ling Delivery
description:
Hey,

Here's the thing: one of our haulers has run into some trouble over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and had to ditch their ship. Could you head over there and help us finish the delivery?

Not a huge job by any means, but you'll still need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship with enough space to store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.
 
Drop the cargo off at the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll send you the creds.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

title: Ling Shipment Recovery
description:
Hello,

Looking for a quick job? Got a client who's waiting on a shipment but our hauler ran into some engine trouble. Can't seem to get them up and running so we need someone to take over.

Fly out to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and you'll spot their ship. You can't miss it - it's the one that's sitting still in the middle of space. Make sure you bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> along with a decent ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Once you've picked up the goods take them to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator

title: Rescue Incomplete Ling Delivery
description:
Hi,

Got a relatively straightforward one for you if you're interested.

One of our pilot ignored a maintenance warning and sure enough, a couple of hours later their ship broke down over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. They're on their way back to the office now but we could do with a reliable hauler whose got a ship big enough to transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> to complete the haul for us.

Think you could help us out? You just need to pick up the stranded shipment and deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.  And I probably don't have to say this, but a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> would probably be handy to have along.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling

To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

title: Complete Stranded Ling Shipment
description:
Hello,

Some sad news. Unfortunately our hauler ran into some trouble and had to abandoned the cargo they were due to deliver. We haven't heard anything back from them so we're assuming the worse.

We're in the process of contacting their family and are conscious this is a very sensitive time, but also can't afford to leave a job incomplete. Our trackers show the cargo is still intact over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

If you could finish the delivery we would be really grateful. We're not picking up on any nearby ships so it should be safe for you to collect. Bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Deliver the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll take care of the rest.

Thanks,

title: Delivery of Abandoned Ling Cargo
description:
Hey,

Need a reliable contractor to help us out with a bit of a situation.

Our of our haulers has dropped out mid-contract and now our client's cargo is stuck in transit. Think they were trying to negotiate a better rate with us, but that's not how Ling does business. Anyway, they're done and we desperately need the shipment finished.

Petra and I have been working with this client for years now and have built up a good rapport. Be a shame to throw that all a way because of an unreliable hauler. Can you head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and collect the shipment? You'll need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Take the shipment to the freight elevator over at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll get you paid as soon as. We'd really appreciate your help with this and I'm sure our client would too.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator

title: Stuck Ling Shipment Pending Delivery
description:
Hey,

Just our luck that we land one of the biggest contracts of our life and our hauler's engines seize up. They've tried their best to fix it but seems like it's just not happening.

Can you fly out to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and grab the cargo for us? It's really important that we show our client that we're just as reliable as the other big players out there.

Just so you know this is a large shipment. You'll need a ship that can handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it all. Once you've transferred it to your ship, deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll send confirmation to the client.

Considering the circumstances, we're paying above market rates to whoever can complete this.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator

To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

title: Delivery of Abandoned Ling Cargo
description:
Hey,

Need a reliable contractor to help us out with a bit of a situation.

Our of our haulers has dropped out mid-contract and now our client's cargo is stuck in transit. Think they were trying to negotiate a better rate with us, but that's not how Ling does business. Anyway, they're done and we desperately need the shipment finished.

Petra and I have been working with this client for years now and have built up a good rapport. Be a shame to throw that all a way because of an unreliable hauler. Can you head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and collect the shipment? You'll need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Take the shipment to the freight elevator over at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll get you paid as soon as. We'd really appreciate your help with this and I'm sure our client would too.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator

title: Stuck Ling Shipment Pending Delivery
description:
Hey,

Just our luck that we land one of the biggest contracts of our life and our hauler's engines seize up. They've tried their best to fix it but seems like it's just not happening.

Can you fly out to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and grab the cargo for us? It's really important that we show our client that we're just as reliable as the other big players out there.

Just so you know this is a large shipment. You'll need a ship that can handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it all. Once you've transferred it to your ship, deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll send confirmation to the client.

Considering the circumstances, we're paying above market rates to whoever can complete this.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling

description:
Hello,

Looking for a quick job? Got a client who's waiting on a shipment but our hauler ran into some engine trouble. Can't seem to get them up and running so we need someone to take over.

Fly out to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and you'll spot their ship. You can't miss it - it's the one that's sitting still in the middle of space. Make sure you bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> along with a decent ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

title: Rescue Incomplete Ling Delivery
description:
Hi,

Got a relatively straightforward one for you if you're interested.

One of our pilot ignored a maintenance warning and sure enough, a couple of hours later their ship broke down over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. They're on their way back to the office now but we could do with a reliable hauler whose got a ship big enough to transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> to complete the haul for us.

Think you could help us out? You just need to pick up the stranded shipment and deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.  And I probably don't have to say this, but a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> would probably be handy to have along.

Thanks,

title: Complete Stranded Ling Shipment
description:
Hello,

Some sad news. Unfortunately our hauler ran into some trouble and had to abandoned the cargo they were due to deliver. We haven't heard anything back from them so we're assuming the worse.

We're in the process of contacting their family and are conscious this is a very sensitive time, but also can't afford to leave a job incomplete. Our trackers show the cargo is still intact over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

If you could finish the delivery we would be really grateful. We're not picking up on any nearby ships so it should be safe for you to collect. Bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

Deliver the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll take care of the rest.

Thanks,
