title: ~mission(title)
description: ~mission(description)

title: limited supply
description:
Seems there’s a new upstart in the sector who hasn’t been paying the right dues to the right people. To teach them a little lesson, my client wants you to go down to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy all the drugs on site.

The low-level lugs they got on site will probably make a stink about it and try to stop you. Handle them however you want but getting rid of the product is the most important thing.

title: out of stock
description:
One of my clients has been unhappy to learn that someone's been muscling in on their territory. Now rather than going down the more traditional route of killing some people and starting a whole thing, they’ve opted to send a different kind of message instead.

You’re gonna go down to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy all the drugs on site. 

Of course, if someone does wanna pick a fight with you, feel free to defend yourself, but getting rid of the product is the most important thing.

title: inventory clear out
description:
A client of mine‘s trying to negotiate a deal, but isn’t having much luck. The other party feels like they got all the leverage because they’re sitting comfortably on a pile of inventory. To help move the negotiations along, I’m gonna need you to head down to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy all the drugs on site. 

Now, I should probably tell you that the site’s being protected by some very serious people, so getting to the stash is going to be a bit tricky, but I trust you’ll find a way.

title: makin’ a mess
description:
This is a bit aggressive for my taste, but credits are credits, right?

Got a client who's looking for a highly motivated individual to head over to ~mission(Location|Address) and kill everyone who’s there. 

Basically, start shooting and don’t stop. You'll get paid once the site's clear.

title: too many cooks
description:
A client is getting out produced by a new competitor and is looking to throw a wrench into the works.

You’re going to head to ~mission(Location|Address) and kill all the civies who work there. 

Do what you want with the gun-toting goons guarding the workers, but remember that they aren’t the priority.

title: live and let an independent contractor deal out revenge
description: Everybody holds grudges, right? I mean, when you get popped pulling a crime, I get that you’re a little sour, but that’s pretty much the game, right?

title: good help’s hard to find
description:
I know someone who’s looking to start up a new business, but they’re having a hard time hiring the skilled workers they need.

Now the thing is, they found the perfect crew over at ~mission(Location|Address), but the people they work for won’t let them go. Even hired extra armed guards to make sure of it.

What I want you to do, is go there and kill all the guards while making sure all the workers remain unharmed.

title: let's help each other
description:
Hey there. I heard you ended up in Klescher which is a real drag. But it might actually be a lucky day for both of us.

Long story short, I had somebody sneaking a datachip out of the prison, but they never got back to me. I know for a fact they haven’t left the facility, so I think something might have happened to them. While tragic, business must carry on. If you can get the chip and finish the job, I can clear your crimestat for you. What do you say?

Of course, I don't know exactly how far they got, but I can tell you that the prison's got a whole network of hidden tunnels my guy was planning on using to make his escape. My guess is his corpse is rotting away somewhere there.

Once you find the body, I’m hoping the chip will still be on him. When you’ve got it, finish escaping and get the data to me. There’s a spot nearby you can upload the chip’s contents. 

One warning though, you might want to watch out for Hurston Security. They've been a hassle lately, so I wouldn't be surprised if you ran into them.

When I've got the data I’ll wipe your crimestat and then, voila, you’ll be free and clear. What you do after that is entirely up to you.

title: need an out?
description:
Hi there. We haven’t had a chance to work together yet but I’m in a bit of a bind here and I could use another body. Not for nothing, of course. I’m all for a good quid pro quo.

One of my associates who was serving some time in Klescher was supposed to bring me a datachip, but then they went quiet. Now I’m assuming they’re dead, but here’s the deal: if you finish his job, I wipe your crimestat. Not bad, right?

Your predecessor was apparently planning on using some old tunnels to make his escape. He made it sound like they weren't exactly the easiest thing to access, but I trust you can figure it out. I'm guessing you'll find his body somewhere in there and if we’re lucky, he'll still have the chip on him.

Once you get it, finish getting out however you can. Then get the data to me. There’s a spot nearby you can upload the chip’s contents. You might want to watch out for Hurston Security, though. They've been a hassle lately, so I wouldn't be surprised if you ran into them. After I get the data and validate it, I’ll wipe your crimestat. 

Then you can go and enjoy your newfound freedom. If you do this right, maybe I’ll have more lucrative work for you down the line.

title: ~mission(Contractor|SearchBodySpaceTitle)
description: ~mission(Contractor|SearchBodySpaceDescription)

title: Wanna be a Headhunter?
description:
You know us. You know what we do. System’s getting a little crowded, so we’re looking for some good soldiers to help keep our place here.

If you’re up for it and don’t mind getting your hands dirty, we’ve got something to prove you’ve got the stuff we’re looking for.

~mission(TargetName) was a former member who sold us out to XenoThreat and got some of their brothers and sisters killed. Now they think they can just live their life without consequence.

You take them out. You get boosted in. Sounds like a fair trade.

They’ve been spotted around ~mission(Location|Address), so get there and take care of it.

Stows out.

title: ~mission(TargetName) needs stomping
description:
Got a small fry who thinks they can hit the Headhunters and get away with it. So ~mission(TargetName) tried to knock over one of our stashes and think they can get away with it. 

Last we heard they were spotted around ~mission(Location|Address). We need someone to head over and send a very clear message who is the reigning power in the system.

Do it quick and clean.

Stows out.

title: Simple Hit
description:
Got another scumbag who needs their ticket punched. ~mission(TargetName) is just a low level thug who doesn't seem to learn. We've warned them to either throw in with us or move system, but they don't seem to be listening so we're out of patience.

Head to ~mission(Location|Address) and you should find ~mission(TargetName|Last) flying around. 

Stows out.

title: Treat yourself to a fight
description:
Another gang tried to make a move and carve out some territory for themselves. They failed but Headhunters don't forget. We've taken out most of them but one of the last members named ~mission(TargetName) has been spotted flying around ~mission(Location|Address).

Odds are they're getting desperate, so don't underestimate them in the fight.

You'll get paid when it's done.

Stows out.

title: Wanted: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
We got a greenlight to finally take out ~mission(TargetName). They've been a pain in our ass ever since they came to the system a few years ago and it's finally time to take them out once and for all. 

We've gotten word that ~mission(TargetName|Last) was spotted flying near ~mission(Location|Address) and the Judge wants this handled now.

Take 'em out.

- Stows out.

title: Hit a CFP Ship
description:
CFP Security forces have been attacking locals and we're looking to balance the scales. Caught wind of one in particular named ~mission(TargetName|Last) who's been causing some damage and we need them taken out.

You can find them flying around ~mission(Location|Address). Go introduce yourself.

Stows out.

title: Kill Order
description:
Need another CFP ship taken out. It belongs to ~mission(TargetName), who's been  driving locals out of their homes if they don't accept Citizens for Prosperity help. They're a real piece of work and we've been given the go-ahead to take them down.

Their ship was spotted around ~mission(Location|Address), so head out there and do the deed.

Stows out.

title: Primo Target
description:
Got a platinum target that needs to get taken down. ~mission(TargetName) is a heavy hitter who's one of the people running security for Citizens for Prosperity. Although ~mission(TargetName|Last) might have forgotten, the Headhunters remember their work with a merc company a few years ago that lead to the deaths of five brothers and sisters. We want blood for blood.

They've been spotted poking around ~mission(Location|Address), so you should still be able to find them there.

They're a mean bastard, so bring some friends but make sure they end up dead.

Stows out.

title: Ghost some XenoTrash
description:
Need you to move quick on this one. There's a XenoThreat lieutenant named ~mission(TargetName) who's popped up for air. Judge thinks this is a big chance to mess with XenoThreat's command by taking them out. I heard ~mission(TargetName|Last) was spotted flying around ~mission(Location|Address), so get there quick before they disappear again.

I'd bring some support, I doubt they'll go down without a fight. 

Stows out.

You'll get paid when it's done.

Stows out.

title: Wanted: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
We got a greenlight to finally take out ~mission(TargetName). They've been a pain in our ass ever since they came to the system a few years ago and it's finally time to take them out once and for all. 

We've gotten word that ~mission(TargetName|Last) was spotted flying near ~mission(Location|Address) and the Judge wants this handled now.

Take 'em out.

- Stows out.

title: Hit a CFP Ship
description:
CFP Security forces have been attacking locals and we're looking to balance the scales. Caught wind of one in particular named ~mission(TargetName|Last) who's been causing some damage and we need them taken out.

You can find them flying around ~mission(Location|Address). Go introduce yourself.

Stows out.

title: Kill Order
description:
Need another CFP ship taken out. It belongs to ~mission(TargetName), who's been  driving locals out of their homes if they don't accept Citizens for Prosperity help. They're a real piece of work and we've been given the go-ahead to take them down.

Their ship was spotted around ~mission(Location|Address), so head out there and do the deed.

Stows out.

title: Primo Target
description:
Got a platinum target that needs to get taken down. ~mission(TargetName) is a heavy hitter who's one of the people running security for Citizens for Prosperity. Although ~mission(TargetName|Last) might have forgotten, the Headhunters remember their work with a merc company a few years ago that lead to the deaths of five brothers and sisters. We want blood for blood.

They've been spotted poking around ~mission(Location|Address), so you should still be able to find them there.

They're a mean bastard, so bring some friends but make sure they end up dead.

Stows out.

title: Ghost some XenoTrash
description:
Need you to move quick on this one. There's a XenoThreat lieutenant named ~mission(TargetName) who's popped up for air. Judge thinks this is a big chance to mess with XenoThreat's command by taking them out. I heard ~mission(TargetName|Last) was spotted flying around ~mission(Location|Address), so get there quick before they disappear again.

I'd bring some support, I doubt they'll go down without a fight. 

Stows out.

title: Target takedown for a fast track in
description:
So here's the deal, Headhunters are looking to expand their talent pool and have a few openings for anyone who's got the stones.

There's a real piece of work named ~mission(TargetName) who thinks they've been really clever pinching cargo off of haulers moving through the system. We asked for a cut of their profits as a licensing tax to continue operating. When ~mission(TargetName|Last) responded, they were very disrespectful.

We've tracked their ship to ~mission(Location|Address) and need them taken out. You should know, they're being smart and sticking close to some allies so they won't be alone.

Do this and we'll consider you for future Headhunter work.

Stows out.

title: Target at ~mission(Location)
description:
There's a nest that needs to be taken out around ~mission(Location|Address) that has been taken over by some squatters. We don't care about most of them, but word's gotten back to us that they're sheltering ~mission(TargetName) who has a long history of stealing Headhunter loot. Time's come to take them out.

Word is that ~mission(TargetName|Last) is in a ship, but may rely on the base's defenses to protect them, so be careful. You kill 'em, you get paid. 

You know, the usual.

Stows out.

title: Crash some ships
description:
A lotta wannabe gangs have stepped to the Headhunters over the years thinking that they could force their way into the system. We're still here. They aren't. But it seems the survivors of these groups have decided to band together and try again. Guess some people never learn.

Latest group hit a couple of our convoys while on supply runs. Shouldn't be a surprise that the Judge wants to stomp them out quick. We've learned they're out near ~mission(Location|Address) and likely rearming for another attack. 

We want you to go there and make them wish they died with their old gang.

Stows out

title: @headhunters_killship_ff_title_001
description: @headhunters_killship_ff_desc_001

title: Red Wind Easy Cargo Recovery
description: @redwind_recovercargo_easy_description

title: Red Wind Straightforward Cargo Recovery
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

A Red Wind hauler has been ambushed by some outlaws and now our clients’ cargo is sitting still whilst they prepare to steal it. We need a pilot with a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a combat ready ship to head to the location below and recover the cargo before it’s gone for good.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>

The pilot reported multiple hostiles so make sure you take this seriously. 

EVERY OPPORTUNITY COUNTS – Make the most of what’s given to you, show us that you can handle more work.

title: Red Wind Challenging Cargo Recovery
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We’re having trouble completing a hauling mission and need a reliable contractor who has experience working in dangerous environments to complete the job. Just as a heads up, the cargo is in an abandoned ship surrounded by multiple, highly dangerous outlaws. We strongly advise you bring some backup with you and <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to retrieve the client’s goods. Details follow:

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>

Since this is a bit risky, we’re offering proportionate pay. I’ll leave it up to you to decide how to distribute it to your crew.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

title: Red Wind Dangerous Cargo Recovery
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Putting out a call for a highly skilled pilot who can recover our client’s cargo. Please only accept this contract if you have experience dealing with extremely hostile situations involving multiple combatants. Additional crew members and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> are highly recommended.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>

The cargo should be in the bay of the abandoned ship. The client has already expressed frustration regarding the cargo’s delay so please work quickly and efficiently.

BE RESILIENT – Life is hard and sometimes you have to roll with the punches. Keep going and don’t let it bring you down.

title: Red Wind Special Cargo Recovery
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We have a special assignment for only the most competent contractors. One of our haulers who is sadly no longer with us failed to complete their last job. The cargo they were supposed to deliver is sitting stationary in their former ship in the location listed below.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>

I’m not going dance around the issue, this is an extremely challenging job. You’ll need to bring a strong team of skilled pilots with you to deal with the outlaws that killed the previous contractor and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to retrieve the client’s cargo. That said, if you take on this contract, we will make it worth your time.

HOW DID WE DO – Complete our short feedback survey on our Spectrum page for a chance to enter our monthly prize draw.

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
Citizens for Pyro is concerned about one of our local contractors, ~mission(TargetName). They finished up a trade at ~mission(Location|Address) and haven’t been seen since. We’re hearing reports that outlaws have been frequenting the area, so I suspect that the worst might have happened.

Either way, ~mission(TargetName|Last) has done good work for us in the past and I’d hate for them to wind up as just another one of the system's missing. If you’re willing to find them for me, I’ll see that you get a reward.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
One of our people, ~mission(TargetName), was supposed to be doing some preliminary scouting work over at ~mission(Location|Address), but they never reported in. We’re hoping that they just ran into some bad luck, but too often out here even the smallest misstep can prove fatal.

I’d appreciate someone heading that way and seeing if they can be located. It’d be great if you find them alive, but if not, some closure is the least we can do for their family.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
Unfortunately, one of our community partners, ~mission(TargetName), has been missing for a few days. Their family contacted Citizens for Prosperity for help and I told them we would do what we could. That said, with so much time passed, I’m not too hopeful.

Whatever their current state is, we're looking for someone to be our eyes on the ground for this one. There’s a strong chance that they were headed to ~mission(Location|Address), an area known to be very dangerous.

If you can track them down and confirm their status, one way or another, I’ll see that you’re properly compensated.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
~mission(TargetName) is a local who only has done a few jobs for Citizen for Prosperity, but they had promise. That is, until they went missing while exploring ~mission(Location|Address) last week. Unfortunately, we didn’t hear about it until today. Chances of survival at this point are pretty slim, but we still think its worth confirming what happened to them.
 
CFP could use help on this if anyone is interested. And besides being a good deed, the payment should make it worth the effort. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
Junior surveyor ~mission(TargetName) fell out of contact with their team while identifying potentially viable mineral seams in a cave near ~mission(Location|Address). Wild animals have been known to frequent this location, which has led Citizens for Prosperity to believe that the surveyor may have been attacked while on the job and is currently stranded. 

We need someone to find them and render aid if at all possible. If it's too late and they're beyond help, it will at least comfort the rest of the team to know what happened to their friend. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
We’ve been trying to get in contact with community member ~mission(TargetName), but haven’t heard from them in a few days. From what Citizens for Prosperity has been able to find out, they were scouting out near ~mission(Location|Address) which is a known outlaw hotspot.

We need someone to go there for us and try to locate them, or worst case scenario, their remains. 

If you are able to find them, there’s a reward on offer.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

I’d appreciate someone heading that way and seeing if they can be located. It’d be great if you find them alive, but if not, some closure is the least we can do for their family.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
Unfortunately, one of our community partners, ~mission(TargetName), has been missing for a few days. Their family contacted Citizens for Prosperity for help and I told them we would do what we could. That said, with so much time passed, I’m not too hopeful.

Whatever their current state is, we're looking for someone to be our eyes on the ground for this one. There’s a strong chance that they were headed to ~mission(Location|Address), an area known to be very dangerous.

If you can track them down and confirm their status, one way or another, I’ll see that you’re properly compensated.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
~mission(TargetName) is a local who only has done a few jobs for Citizen for Prosperity, but they had promise. That is, until they went missing while exploring ~mission(Location|Address) last week. Unfortunately, we didn’t hear about it until today. Chances of survival at this point are pretty slim, but we still think its worth confirming what happened to them.
 
CFP could use help on this if anyone is interested. And besides being a good deed, the payment should make it worth the effort. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
Junior surveyor ~mission(TargetName) fell out of contact with their team while identifying potentially viable mineral seams in a cave near ~mission(Location|Address). Wild animals have been known to frequent this location, which has led Citizens for Prosperity to believe that the surveyor may have been attacked while on the job and is currently stranded. 

We need someone to find them and render aid if at all possible. If it's too late and they're beyond help, it will at least comfort the rest of the team to know what happened to their friend. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
We’ve been trying to get in contact with community member ~mission(TargetName), but haven’t heard from them in a few days. From what Citizens for Prosperity has been able to find out, they were scouting out near ~mission(Location|Address) which is a known outlaw hotspot.

We need someone to go there for us and try to locate them, or worst case scenario, their remains. 

If you are able to find them, there’s a reward on offer.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
Two locals we work with were out salvaging at ~mission(Location|Address) when they had some issues with faulty equipment. One managed to escape, but their partner, ~mission(TargetName) was unfortunately left behind.

With the state they were last reported to be in, I’m guessing they didn’t make it, but I’d like to know for sure. If you’re willing, I could use your help in finding their remains.

If you can track them down, I’ll see that you’re properly compensated for the effort.

Lima Endicott

description:

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
Last night, the homesteader ~mission(TargetName) was abducted by Headhunters for unknown reasons. Citizens for Prosperity has not received a ransom note, nor has the victim's family. However, we have just received word from an informant that the abducted party was most likely taken to ~mission(Location|Address). 

We need someone to determine the validity of this information, and to report back to CFP. A reward will be provided whether your findings are good or bad. 

You may need to utilize a ground vehicle to help you search the area. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
We've received disturbing news: ~mission(TargetName), the scout that was reported missing last week has been seen in Headhunter custody. According to the witness, they were spotted being loaded into a transport headed to ~mission(Location|Address) this time yesterday. 

If anyone out there can confirm their whereabouts, there's a reward in store. Citizens for Prosperity maintains hope that they are alive and well. If not, their families deserve to know their fates either way. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
During what should have been a routine cargo run, hauler and long-time friend of Citizens for Prosperity ~mission(TargetName) was ambushed and abducted by XenoThreat. The coded distress signal we received from the victim just before their comms went dark gave us just enough information to pinpoint their most likely location: ~mission(Location|Address).

CFP needs someone to slip into the outpost, confirm the whereabouts of ~mission(TargetName|Last), and relay this information back to us so we know exactly where to send our rescue team. Or, in the worst possible scenario, deliver news to the hauler's family that their loved one didn't survive. 

We understand how dangerous it is to approach a XenoThreat stronghold, and are prepared to offer a sizeable reward for putting yourself at risk.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
Unfortunately, one of our community partners, ~mission(TargetName), has been missing for a few days. Their family contacted Citizens for Prosperity for help and I told them we would do what we could. That said, with so much time passed, I’m not too hopeful.

Whatever their current state is, we're looking for someone to be our eyes on the ground for this one. There’s a strong chance that they were headed to ~mission(Location|Address), an area known to be very dangerous.

If you can track them down and confirm their status, one way or another, I’ll see that you’re properly compensated.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Find Missing Cargo Hauler
description:
Hey, 

One of our veteran haulers got sick and backed out of a run that we desperately needed. ~mission(TargetName) stepped up and offered to do it. I was hesitant to give it to ‘em because it’s riskier than the routes they normally do. Seems like my concern was warranted. Last update we got from ‘em was near ~mission(Location|Address), which is XenoThreat territory.

Can’t have this hanging over my head much longer. Any chance you’d be willing to head to their last known location and see if you can find out what happened? It’d mean a lot to me and others. Not only to know the status of ~mission(TargetName) but also the cargo, which is really needed at ~mission(Destination|Address). If you find it and complete the delivery, it would be a huge help to the CFP members there.   

Fly safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Find XenoThreat Captives and Stolen Data
description:
A small group of Citizens for Prosperity members were supposed to be delivering sensitive data back to our headquarters in Stanton, but they never arrived. 

We now believe that they were captured by XenoThreat before they could leave the system. I'd like you to investigate ~mission(Location|Address) to discover what happened to the missing crew and then destroy any servers they could be using to store the stolen data.

Your help is very appreciated,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Critical Intelligence Lost
description:
One of our most dedicated people, ~mission(TargetName) has gone missing and I'm beside myself thinking what might have happened to them. They had been working undercover to gather intelligence on some local outlaws and managed to track down where some critical data was being stored. 

We need you to go, discern what happened to them, and if the worst has happened, continue their mission to destroy the sensitive data before it can be used against us.

From their last check in with their handler, we believe they were headed to ~mission(Location|Address). I suggest you start your search at the small outposts near there.

Please hurry,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing Volunteers
description:
Two of our volunteers vanished while on a recent foraging expedition. It has been over two standard days since their disappearance, and their families have begun to fear the worst and are willing to offer a reward if someone can help trace their whereabouts.

They were last seen in the vicinity of ~mission(Location|Address). It is possible that they may have been injured and sought shelter in an abandoned building or a cave. The area is full of potential hiding spots, so your search will need to be thorough. 

Thank you for taking this on. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing Volunteers
description:

title: Personnel and Data Captured by XenoThreat
description:
One of our most trusted datarunners, ~mission(TargetName), has found themselves the victim of a XenoThreat assault. Now both they and the data they were ferrying have been captured and taken to ~mission(Location|Address). 

I am charging you with heading there to ascertain what happened to ~mission(TargetName|First) and to destroy data servers which may be housing the stolen information.

Even if the worst has happened, I think they would want us to make sure they data they were charged with protecting isn't used for nefarious gains.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Find XenoThreat Captive and Stolen Data
description:
The family of ~mission(TargetName), a Citizens for Prosperity courier, has been in contact with me with the terrible news that they never arrived back home. We learned that ~mission(TargetName|First) was captured by XenoThreat while transporting some critical data. 

We need you to search ~mission(Location|Address) and see if you can learn what has become of ~mission(TargetName|First) and then destroy any XenoThreat servers that may contain stolen data.

Thank you,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Find Headhunter Captive and Stolen Data
description:
I just have received confirmation that ~mission(TargetName), a Citizens for Prosperity courier, was captured by the Headhunters while transporting some critical data. 

We need you to investigate ~mission(Location|Address) to discover what happened to ~mission(TargetName|First) and then destroy any Headhunter servers that may contain stolen data.

We're counting on you,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Find ~mission(TargetName) and Missing Supplies
description:
Hey,

Wondering if you can help me. I’ve lost touch with a dedicated CFP volunteer named ~mission(TargetName) who was tracking down supplies taken by XenoThreat. Their last comm said they believed our stuff was being held at ~mission(Location|Address). I told them to be careful, but haven’t heard anything since.

Any chance you can head out and try to locate ~mission(TargetName|First)? While there, if you spot the supplies, please bring them to ~mission(Destination|Address). I’ll give you the same warning I gave ~mission(TargetName|First), that spot is a known Xeno stronghold. Better be prepared. Would hate for you to disappear too after visiting that spot. 

Be Safe, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Search a XenoThreat Remote Outpost
description:
Hi,

Got a tough assignment here. There’s a small, satellite outpost near ~mission(Location|Address) that needs to be investigated. I received intel that it’s housing some of our stolen supplies and sent ~mission(TargetName) to retrieve them. Haven’t heard anything from them in a while and am worried they ran into trouble.

XenoThreat controls that location, but I hoped ~mission(TargetName|First) could slip in and out without getting noticed. Seems like that spot might be more heavily guarded than expected. Looking for someone to take a look and see what happened to ~mission(TargetName|First). Also, if any of our supplies are found there, I need them taken to ~mission(Destination|Address). 

Do you think you can give it a shot? I’m guessing that the Xenos are entrenched there. Prepare accordingly and don’t expect them to make this easy on you.  

Thanks, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Investigate Headhunters Outpost
description:
Hey,

I’ve been tracking Headhunters activity at ~mission(Location|Address). Recently, they stocked it with supplies we believe were stolen from one of our cargo convoys. ~mission(TargetName) offered to go get our goods back but hasn’t checked in since. Really need to know what happened to them and if our supplies are there.

Think this is something you could handle? You’ll probably have to deal with Headhunters forces to get to the bottom of this. Also, any goods you grab should go to ~mission(Destination|Address) once you’re out of there.

Thanks, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Investigate Missing Pilot and Cargo
description:
A local courier who has been working for Citizen for Prosperity, ~mission(TargetName), was reported missing earlier this week. We believe that they may have been captured by members of XenoThreat who were after the encrypted data-drives and important cargo they were transporting for us.  

We would like you to go to ~mission(Location|Address) to ascertain what has happened to ~mission(TargetName|First), destroy any servers which may be housing the stolen data,  and deliver the recovered cargo to ~mission(Destination|Address).

It's a lot to ask, but I believe you're up to the challenge.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
~mission(TargetName), a member of the Citizens for Prosperity family, vanished two standard days ago while attempting to find a buyer for some old farming equipment. CFP regrets to report that we have just discovered the wreckage of a vehicle registered under the name of the missing person in an area known to be frequented by pirates. 

We found evidence at the crash site that the victim survived and is most likely being held at ~mission(Location|Address). We are offering a reward to anyone who can track down ~mission(TargetName|First) on our behalf. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
~mission(TargetName), a mechanic who has performed countless services for our community, was abducted by a group of outlaws three standard days ago. CFP has received a ransom comm, but we refuse to negotiate with the types of people who actively work to destroy the peace in this system. If we open that door even once, we will never be safe. 

The outlaws known to have abducted ~mission(TargetName|Last)  were last seen entering ~mission(Location|Address). CFP needs someone to infiltrate the base and confirm our missing person's whereabouts.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Find ~mission(TargetName|Last)\n
description:
Last night, some no-name drifters threw down with our enforcers and ran when things got too hot. Didn't find out 'til they were long gone, but they made off with one of our Prospects when they split. Goes by the name of ~mission(TargetName). 

Last we saw, they were headed in the direction ~mission(Location|Address). We need someone to head there and track down our missing Prospect. 

If you take any of them down while you're at it, all the better.

Stows out.

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
An upstanding member of the Citizens for Prosperity community, Doctor ~mission(TargetName), was recently abducted by XenoThreat while distributing vital medical supplies to one of our settlements.

The kidnappers were last seen entering their base at ~mission(Location|Address), but we are uncertain whether they will remain there for long. XenoThreat maintains multiple outposts throughout this system and has been known to swap locations at a moment's notice. 

Considering the danger and the distance you may have to travel, CFP is prepared to offer a substantial reward for determining what happened to Dr. ~mission(TargetName|Last).

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Med. Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
description:
Hi,

Looking for a contractor with a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> to run a delivery for us across Stanton.

This isn't a particularly long delivery route, but you will be moving between couple of different locations. To make sure things go smoothly, bring enough fuel and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to speed up moving the boxes.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

description:

Good luck. I'm counting on you.

title: Yellow Level Contract: Ambush An Amateur
description:
Care to help us ghost a bad guy? 

We’ve been hired to hunt down an outlaw flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>. Shouldn’t be too hard since they take the same flightpath each day. That makes them a prime target for an ambush if I ever saw one. I’ve analyzed the route and determined that <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is the ideal spot to strike. There’s an emission cloud there that’ll be perfect to hide your ship’s signature while you wait.   

Job is simple if you’re interested. Head to the location, hide out, power down, and then wait for them to fly by. Sometimes they roll alone but they often have other single-seat ships with them. Shouldn’t be too hard to handle for a pro. Plus, we’ll still have reinforcements nearby and ready to deploy once it pops off.

Pull this off and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,


Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Yellow Level Contract: Surprise Strike
description:
An outlaw who’s been on the run finally returned to the system. Seems like they hoped that disappearing for a bit would make us forget about them. They’re not even trying to hide their identity or vary their routine which means we know exactly where they’re going to be.

Latest intel indicates that they’re flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and will be passing by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> soon. I’ve already scoped out an emission cloud that’s a perfect place for you to find cover, power down your ship, and wait. Only real variable is if they’ll be alone or not. We’ve heard they sometimes roll with friends that all fly single-seaters. Landing that first surprise strike will be important as this crew is battle-tested, but we’ll have reinforcements at the ready to provide support if you need them.

Get this done and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Orange Level Contract: Spring a Trap
description:
Foxwell has been tracking a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> used by outlaws and discovered a pattern to its movements. The ship should be passing by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> soon.

Looking for a contractor willing to hustle there, hide in the emission cloud, and then spring the trap when the time is right. There’s usually escort ships with the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>. Careful not to jump the gun and blow your cover. The element of surprise is crucial from what I’ve read.

Pull this off and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Orange Level Contract: Return the Favor
description:
Recently, a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> baited Foxwell forces with a bogus rescue beacon. By the time our forces realized what was happening, a squad of ships unleashed a devastating attack and only one Foxwell contractor survived. Their scan logs identified the bait ship, and we’ve had scouts monitoring them ever since.

Our surveillance has revealed the squad has a regular flight pattern that we think we can exploit. There’s a sizable emission cloud at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that makes it an ideal spot to post up. Think you have what it takes to handle this for us? 

It’ll be you against the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>, other large craft, and a sizable escort. Wish I could be more specific than that but this crew regularly rotates ships in and out of the squad. Would be smart to bring some support, so you don’t get overwhelmed by their numbers.   

Complete the job and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Red Level Contract: Ambush Attack Squad
description:
Foxwell got word from an important client that outlaws have put together a squad that’s been stalking the system with sub-capital ships and escort fighters. Our client is concerned that if left unchecked, outlaws will create more of these attack squads and destabilize system security. We’ve been hired to wipe out this group before that happens. 

We need a confident and skilled contractor for this task. Good news is that we have a plan in place. One of the ships used by this squad, a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>, was stolen from our client, who’s still able to track its movements. They’ve shared the location data with us and we’ve discovered that this squad often goes by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We’ve scouted the location and discovered a large emission cloud makes an ideal spot for an ambush.  

Not going to lie, this isn’t going to be easy. We don’t have any additional forces available to deploy, so it would be good to bring your own support. 

You manage to pull this off, I've arranged for a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Red Level Contract: Surprise Attack
description:
We’ve received a handful of comms about recent attacks undertaken by an <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and its escort ships. After opening a file, we started tracking the ship’s movements and noticed that it frequently passes an emission cloud near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We want to use that to our advantage to launch a surprise attack. 

Once on site, you should hide in the emission cloud to cloak your signature enough to allow you to make the first strike. Unfortunately, Foxwell can’t provide additional reinforcements for this operation, so you’ll be responsible for bringing any support forces. You might need the help too. The crew of the ~mission(AmbushTarget) is aggressive and battle hardened.        

You get this taken care of for us and there's a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> in it for the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Our surveillance has revealed the squad has a regular flight pattern that we think we can exploit. There’s a sizable emission cloud at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that makes it an ideal spot to post up. Think you have what it takes to handle this for us? 

It’ll be you against the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>, other large craft, and a sizable escort. Wish I could be more specific than that but this crew regularly rotates ships in and out of the squad. Would be smart to bring some support, so you don’t get overwhelmed by their numbers.   

Complete the job and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Red Level Contract: Ambush Attack Squad
description:
Foxwell got word from an important client that outlaws have put together a squad that’s been stalking the system with sub-capital ships and escort fighters. Our client is concerned that if left unchecked, outlaws will create more of these attack squads and destabilize system security. We’ve been hired to wipe out this group before that happens. 

We need a confident and skilled contractor for this task. Good news is that we have a plan in place. One of the ships used by this squad, a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>, was stolen from our client, who’s still able to track its movements. They’ve shared the location data with us and we’ve discovered that this squad often goes by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We’ve scouted the location and discovered a large emission cloud makes an ideal spot for an ambush.  

Not going to lie, this isn’t going to be easy. We don’t have any additional forces available to deploy, so it would be good to bring your own support. 

You manage to pull this off, I've arranged for a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Red Level Contract: Surprise Attack
description:
We’ve received a handful of comms about recent attacks undertaken by an <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and its escort ships. After opening a file, we started tracking the ship’s movements and noticed that it frequently passes an emission cloud near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We want to use that to our advantage to launch a surprise attack. 

Once on site, you should hide in the emission cloud to cloak your signature enough to allow you to make the first strike. Unfortunately, Foxwell can’t provide additional reinforcements for this operation, so you’ll be responsible for bringing any support forces. You might need the help too. The crew of the ~mission(AmbushTarget) is aggressive and battle hardened.        

You get this taken care of for us and there's a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> in it for the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Danger: Contraband Weapons Inbound
description:
This is a general warning. We have learned that the Headhunters are transporting a large amount of weapons into the system with the intent of launching attacks against CFP-owned settlements.

While we believe that change can only come to this system through nonviolence. The presence of these weapons will undoubtedly cause considerably more bloodshed and devastation so we want to remove them from the equation.

Any of our supporters with appropriate combat training are asked to undertake this dangerous assignment out near ~mission(Location|Address). We will compensate you for the tremendous risk you are taking.

Thank you and be safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Finishing The Job
description:
One of my haulers has run into some trouble over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and was forced to ditch their ship. I need someone to go there with <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to grab the cargo and finish the job.

They were carrying a decent supply of gear for me, and the last thing I need is for some do-gooder to come across it and trace it back to us.

If you do run into anybody, no need to be friendly. Just shoot the asshole and get my gear. Understood?

Take it to the freight elevator over at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I’ll make sure you get a cut of the sale.

-Twitch

title: Cleaning Up Someone Else’s Mess
description:
You know when you ask someone a question and you have a feeling they’re lying, but you choose to give them the benefit of the doubt? Yeah. That’s what I’m dealing with right now.

Two “expert” haulers I hired to transport some gear for me ran into some trouble and ended up ditching my goods over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Needless to say, I’ve ordered a hit on them, but what I need from you is to go recover that cargo. The tracker says the cargo’s still on the ship, so you’ll just need a <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and your own ship to recover it.

You might run into a couple of scavengers lurking around there, but I doubt you’ll have any trouble with them.

When you’re done, take the stuff to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I’ll sort you out with a reward.

-Twitch

title: Retrieval Op
description:
You got a ship and <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>? Good. I’ve got work for you.

Don’t know how they knew we were coming, but one of my haulers got jumped over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. The pilot’s gone silent so I assume they’ve been ghosted, but the cargo tracker is stationary for now.

Expect the bastards who took out my pilot to still be around, so bring backup. Get the cargo and get out, don’t need to risk anymore good haulers on this mess.

Get the goods to the freight elevator to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I’ll send your payment.

-Twitch

title: Taking Back Our Goods
description:
Some upstarts hit my hauling crew on their way to do a delivery. Our tracker is telling us that our ship’s still located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> so I need you to head over there and get the cargo. You’ll need <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to lug the goods from the ship.

I’d bet that whoever attacked us is still there waiting. Arm up, bring your crew, and if you can, give them one from me.

Once you’ve taken back our goods, drop it off at the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

-Twitch

title: Finishing The Job
description:
We got a situation. Some gang that no one’s heard of are trying to make a name for themselves by targeting our transport ships. They think they can make a big show of how tough they are raiding our haulers and acting like they’re big shots. Amateurs.

Problem is, they got lucky during their last attack. Our pilot barely made it out alive, but their ship is still sitting full of supplies over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

Grab a crew you can trust and your <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and get your ass over there.

After, drop the gear off at the freight elevator in <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. You do this for me and I’ll give you a good cut of the sale.

-Twitch

title: Lost But Not Gone
description:
A rival crew was able to get their hands on our delivery routes and now they have one of my cargo ships pinned down at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

Now the ship’s sitting there being guarded by a full crew of these assholes. They must be waiting for someone to show up with a transport ship, but you’re going to get there first.

Head there with a crew of your own and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to take the goods away. Make sure they’re the best people you got. It’d be a mistake to underestimate these bastards.

Ghost them and bring my cargo back to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I’ll make sure you’re seriously comp’d for this.

-Twitch

title: PURGE ASD SERVERS
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client has asked us to infiltrate an old ASD research site and wipe the contents of a few specific servers there.

We believe the servers are located somewhere within the <EM4>Xenotech Lab, in the Research wing</EM4>. The client has also informed us that despite the facilities being publicly declared as closed, you're still likely to find hostile forces there.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: INFILITRATE ASD SITE AND DESTROY SERVERS
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Our client has requested the immediate destruction of a group of servers located at a long-shuttered ASD research site. The servers in question contain information that our client considers extremely damaging and is eager to see the data completely eliminated.

Initial surveillance indicates the servers are within the facility’s <EM4>Energy Lab, located in the Research wing</EM4>. We’ve also picked up on a number of hostile forces, so be on alert.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: FIND SERVERS AT ASD SITE AND DESTROY
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

This a simple seek and destroy contract. The client has requested that several servers located at an ASD research site be destroyed as soon as possible. Under no circumstances should these servers be accessed, or copies of the data made.

The client believes that the servers are somewhere in the <EM4>Engineering wing</EM4>, most likely in the <EM4>Management</EM4> area. In addition to this, there is a strong chance you won’t be the only presence on-site so be wary of potential hostiles.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: SEEK AND DESTROY ASD DATA
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Client has requested a discreet contractor to infiltrate an ASD research site, locate a group of servers, and destroy the information stored on them permanently.

The client was able to share the location of the servers within the facility: the <EM4>Control Center in the Engineering wing</EM4>. The site has officially been shuttered, but there still may be hostile forces there. Be on your guard.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Hauler Needed for ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Shipment
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind needs an experienced pilot to transport a large shipment of raw revenant tree pollen from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to these locations:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)

This might seems self-evident, but the rep from CFP asked us to assure you that it's okay under UEE law to transport revenant tree pollen as long as it hasn't been processed. 

Be sure that your ship can carry up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> before you accept the contract. And buy a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> if you don't have one already to make loading and unloading as painless as possible.

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Hauler Needed for ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Shipment
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

CFP has an urgent request for a pilot with combat experience. A few of their settlements are under immediate threat and may soon be under attack, so they need supplies ASAP. 

If you're confident that you can navigate a potential combat zone, please head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, grab the cargo, and bring it to these locations:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)

You'll need enough room for <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded and unloaded.

Keep in mind that it's always best to run if someone tries to ambush you. But if you get cornered, don't hesitate to defend yourself.

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Hauler Needed for Direct ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Shipment
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Have a run here that could become a lucrative regular thing if we can pull it off.  This’ll take you into Pyro, so you’ll have to be ready to tangle with some of the locals. 

You’ll need to grab the stuff from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, make the jump to Pyro, and then get to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

All you need to do is bring a ship with space for <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, and be ready to do some damage if someone picks a fight with you.

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Hauler Needed for Direct ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Shipment
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Guess some companies see danger when offered a run in Pyro. We see profits. Got one here that starts in the system at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and then goes to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.  

The client warned us that outlaws in Pyro regularly target this run, which has scared other hauling concerns. Be sure your ship is all geared up and can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. And don't forget to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Hauler Needed for ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Shipment
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a request from a farmer in Pyro for specialized agricultural supplies - namely, ranta dung. Apparently, normal fertilizers aren't cutting it. They've put in orders from multiple distributors and need someone to bring everything back to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Here are all the places you can collect the dung:

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

 ~mission(MultiToSingleToken)

The client says your ship needs to be able to carry at least <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. Don't forget to bring your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for loading and unloading.

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Hauler Needed for Direct ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Shipment
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a contract from a major client who needs a skilled pilot to move a large load of luxury items from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

You'll need room for at least <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> in your hold. You'll also need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded and unloaded. 

And as a fair warning, the things you'll be carrying are pricey enough that you might attract some unwanted attention. <EM4>Be ready to defend yourself</EM4> if you can't evade.

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Hauler Needed for Direct ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Shipment
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------  

Need a pilot for a straightforward haul going from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Should be easy enough as long as you got a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size. 

Credits don't come much easier than this. Just be careful as the route's not exactly in the safest of sectors. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

title: Red Wind Seeking New Haulers
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind is looking to bolster our roster of haulers. Need someone who can keep their wits about them and keep quiet. If you check those boxes, and have a ship that can handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, then give this trial run a shot.  

PICK UP
Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. 

DROP OFF
Freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Complete this contract and we’ll send more hauling opportunities your way. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Hauler Needed for Direct ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Shipment
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------  

Need a pilot for a straightforward haul going from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Should be easy enough as long as you got a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size. 

Credits don't come much easier than this. Just be careful as the route's not exactly in the safest of sectors. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

title: Cargo Transfer from Shuttered Facility
description:
RED WIND LINEHAUL 
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS' 
----------------------------    

ASD reached out to us as it seems one of their old labs, <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, still has some cargo being stored there they want to get their hands on.

You would fly there in a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4> in size, land in the hangar, load up from the freight elevator, and then transport it all back to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. 

Just be sure to keep your head on swivel while you’re at the facility and try not to let your curiosity get the better of you Abandoned sites like this can be home to all sort of nastiness.  And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along. 

BE YOUR BEST – Take pride in the work you do and you’ll do work to be proud of.

title: In the Wake of Disaster
description:
Fortune has shined upon us once again. I’ve just learned of a battle near ~mission(Location) that’s just transpired far from the prying eyes of any meddlesome comm arrays, and reinforcements from either of the forces involved have yet to be dispatched. This means that there is a window of opportunity for an enterprising soul to pick the graveyard clean.
 
I’d like to extend this opportunity to all my trusted contacts. Any and all interested parties can have the location… for the right price. Coordinates will be provided once you accept the contract and will remain available until you choose to terminate it.

Of course, speed will be of the essence as you will not only face potential competition from other salvagers, but also the looming possibility of reinforcements arriving to survey the battlefield. 

If you’re still hesitating, just remember, fortune favors the bold.

-cd

title: ~mission(Contractor|PrisonerBreakTitle)
description:
Here’s the deal - A couple of long timers got snagged pulling a job for me and I want you to spring them. 

A friendly mechanic has arranged for their prison transport to run into some trouble en route, venting the front door and bringing the ship to a halt. You’re gonna go, dispatch any security escorting the transport, find the prisoner manifest aboard, and use it to locate my crew’s cryopods.

The popsicles I’m after are ~mission(NameSave2), ~mission(NameKill1), ~mission(NameSave3), and ~mission(NameSave1). All have been loyal and deserve better than rotting in jail.

At least I think they've been loyal... I'm still wondering how they got pinched in the first place. I can't shake the feeling that one of them may have been doubling dealing. Tell you what, if you find any proof that one of my crew has been working with the Advocacy, liquidate their cryopod and I’ll see you get a bonus. 

Once you've activated the right pods and my people are starting to thaw, get the hell out of there and let the retrieval team handle the rest. This last bit is important. See, once they’re defrosted, they're gonna be sent off to retirement. No sense in them knowing any more about my business than they already do, i.e. I don’t want these lunks seeing your face or even knowing you exist. 

Once you’re back on your way, I’ll send you a hefty pile of well deserved creds.

Now just in case you’re getting any ideas along the lines of “Why don’t I just free everyone?” or “Wouldn’t it be easier to shut them all up permanently?” Forget it. The politics of this whole thing is more complicated than you need to know. Just trust me when I say that if any extra prisoners get freed or die without me ordering it, you’ll be the one who pays. Want all your money? Do what you’re told and that’s it. 

-Twitch

title: Yellow Level Contract: Clear Shipjacking Group
description: Yellow Level Contract: Clear Shipjacking Group

title: Yellow Level Contract: Neutralize Shipjacking Gang
description:
Okay, this might be a bit of stretch to do on your own, so if you got any favors to call in, it could be good to cash those chits now. There's a group of desperados striking delivery ships up and down this sector and we've been tasked with cleaning them up. 

Once your crew is ready, head over to ~mission(Location|Address) and take the hostiles there down. Now, these bastards are a bit clever so they tend to split up into smaller packs. Make sure you wait around to clear every last one of them out.
 
Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives."

title: Orange Level Contract: Destroy Outlaw Threat
description: Orange Level Contract: Destroy Outlaw Threat

title: Orange Level Contract: Take Out Criminal Fleet
description:
It seems that a couple of different small-time gangs have decided to pool their resources and start doing coordinated attacks. Alone, they weren't much, but all together they're proving to be a serious threat that has to be dealt with.

Recruit some backup you can rely on and the fly over to ~mission(Location|Address). Once you attack the initial gang members you find there, the other groups will arrive to support them. Make sure you wait around to take out all of them.
 
Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Yellow Level Contract: Ship Under Attack
description:
Foxwell is looking for an available combat pilot to provide immediate assistance to a ~mission(Ship) under attack over by ~mission(Location|Address). We have not identified the perpetrators in the attack, but have been assured it is a small force.

Please dispatch quickly and clear out all hostiles. We need the client to make it through this as they haven't paid us yet.

Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Orange Level Contract: ~mission(Ship) Needs Assistance
description:
Got an orange level contract for any available combat pilots. A ~mission(Ship) is under attack around ~mission(Location|Address) and is in desperate need for assistance. We're not sure how many perpetrators there are, but they seem motivated and dangerous so exercise caution.

Once on site, engage and destroy any hostiles you encounter and protect the client. Once they've transferred the credits, we'll route you your payment.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Red Level Contract: Ship Under Attack
description:
An emergency contract just came in about a fight near ~mission(Location|Address). Apparently a group of ships were ambushed by outlaws led by ~mission(TargetName), who's been wanted on multiple planets for murder and ship theft. Foxwell's looking for top tier combat pilots to go and protect the clients against them.

This one's been flagged as a red level contract so it's really dangerous. If you have people you could bring, you probably should. If you do, you should also let them know about Foxwell's hiring policies. 

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
