title: Armor with horn and string
description:
Hello, know many humans want saldynium for regen problem. Credits good, yes, but Wikelo can use that, kopion horn, and other things to make special armor. 

Once done, you be very tough. Very scary.

You see items needed. Bring to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and I make for you.

Bye.

title: Fun Kopion Skull Gun
description:
Hello. Can make fun change to gun if you want. Use kopion skin for pattern and little skull dangle. Very effective. Shoot much better.

All you need is bring me parts to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will make. 

Bye.

title: Fun Kopion Tooth Gun
description:
Hello. Can make fun change to gun if you want. If you no like saying it not baby skull, have other choice. Use kopion skin for pattern but use tooth instead dangle. Still effective and shoot better.

Bring parts to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will make. 

Bye.

title: Fun Military Skull Gun
description: Hello. Can do version of gun if you kopion soldier. Make material like soldier camouflage but with dead skull on front. Gun shoot better too.\n\nIf want, bring part to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will make.

title: Fun Military Tooth Gun
description:
Wikelo here with another way to play with type of gun. Make look like more of your soldier gun, but with kopion tooth dangle. Very nasty indeed.

If want, bring part to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will make.

Bye.

title: Want armor look like tree?
description:
Hello. You walk in woods but not want people to know? Wikelo have armor for you. 

If you bring to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>, you can get.

Interest?

title: Look at desert but don't see you
description:
You in hot desert doing things. Need to be sneaky. Don't want seen. Understand. Wikelo give you armor that make you sneaky in sand.

Bring things to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and I will make. Easy.

Bye.

title: Make space navy armor
description:
Know you humans like your navy. Wikelo understand. Very big ships. Powerful too. Wikelo can give armor set that look like navy color. Very easy to make. 

See what Wikelo need, get and bring to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and it will be yours.

Wikelo

title: Volt gun more Navy-like
description:
Wikelo hearing about new energy weapon by VOLT souli. If you want, Wikelo can make gun look better. It found in storm, it shoot storm, but Wikelo make it better for people who like human navy.

Bring things to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and Wikelo will do.

Bye.

title: Zappy gun more woodlike
description:
Wikelo hearing about new type of energy weapon by VOLT souli. Hit very hard. If you want, Wikelo can make gun look even better. It found in storm, it shoot storm, but Wikelo make it look woodier. Drop in forest? It gone.

Bring things to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and Wikelo will do.

Bye.

title: Make gun sandy
description:
Wikelo can make new VOLT gun look like sand mound. Very sneaky in desert. 

Bring things to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and Wikelo will do.

Bye.

title: Make glowy armor
description:
Wikelo had exciting idea during brief work rest. Was thinking about the little glow worms in Pyro and saw armor get changed to look like.

If you get me parts, bring to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will make for you then you can glow too.

Bye.

title: Make VOLT shotgun angrier
description:
You feel like gun not angry enough? VOLT shotgun very powerful, very dangerous, but not scary? Bring to me. Can make very scary and angry.

They respect you then. Bring to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and we make.

Bye.

title: Walk in danger. Look good.
description: Maybe you like walking on planet that very hot. Or very cold. Or many rocks. Wikelo can make suit called Novikov from Human souli Caldera work better for you. Bring things if you want, then I make. Bye.

title: Xi'an Xanthule Suit made better
description: Wikelo like Syang souli very much. Make very line-y flight suits that very useful. Can even make suits a little prettier if you want. Bring things, I do.

title: Adventure a A-Venture
description: You like adventure, right? This armor good for it. Let you go dangerous places, but not too heavy. Stay light. Wikelo found these and will trade if you want. You win, Wikelo win. Bye.

title: Prettify Karna Gun
description: Wikelo friend had to trade ship they found for credits. Wikelo surprised to find many crate of Karna guns inside. Friend must not have wanted. Anyway, Wikelo figure out how to make prettier. If you want, bring stuff. Bye.

title: Built on S71 rifle
description: Universe is dangerous in human space. Good to have a good weapon to handle bad situation. Wikelo don't have many weapon, but can make useful ones more useful. If you want, bring stuff and I will do.

title: Fix up Coda gun
description: Wikelo found crate of Coda pistols. Very strange reason, but will tell later if you want to hear. Anyway, after study have figured out nice way to make gun look better. Have a look, see if interested. Bye.

title: Snow Snipe
description:
Want to shoot long away and stay hiding. But it snowing? Wikelo have gun for you.

Bring things. I give.

Bye.

title: Hide Snow Suit
description: You want be hidden. Wikelo understand. Not ask questions why. But what do when you in snow? Wikelo have suit for that.\n\nWelcome.

title: Heavy VOLT Zapper
description: You need useful weapon. Yes, yes, understand. Wikelo make useful weapon more beautiful too. You see things I need. You bring? I do.\n\nBye.

title: Do Lava Suit
description: If you have armor, Wikelo can make it look warm. Good look for useful armor. Bring me things and will do.

title: Shiny Builder Suit
description: You need utility suit. Good for work. If you like, Wikelo can make shinier. Look real good. See what Wikelo need and bring.

title: Want Better Eyes?
description: Wikelo has best eyes for seeing far away. I give to you if you give me

title: Yormandi Gun
description: This gun has picture of amazing creature on side. Use it and it make you big and strong like Yormandi. Spit lightning. Bring my items and then you get it. Bye.

title: F55 Look Better
description: Sometimes you shoot people, but if you are last thing they see before dead gun should look amazing, right? Wikelo will make your gun look much better. Bring me items I need and then I give you the gun. Bye.

title: Test Armor
description: Bring me armor and other things and I give you special test armor. First version. Very special. Bring and I give. Bye.

title: Armor with Vanduul
description:
Vanduul have strange ways. I never talk to them, old souli used to, but not Wikelo. Anyway, though not friendly, they make interesting thing. If you like, Wikelo can make you look more like.

Bring things. Will do.

Bye.

title: Curious Weapon
description: Wikelo find very strange but functional weapon while wandering through your systems. It very simple but very effective. If you bring me things, I show you what I do to it.\n\nVery fun.

title: Hot Shot
description: You need a good weapon, yes? Have one for you. Small but powerful. Like an extra spicy balalu pepper. Wikelo make this pistol look extra spicy too. You bring things I need and I do a trade.\n\nBye.

title: Red Fight Shotgun
description: Shooting can be messy. Red Human Blood everywhere. Not a problem with this shotgun. Splashes blends right in! I give it to you if you give me everything I want on list. Good trade.

title: Red Fight Armor
description: Wikelo hear that Humans think red is the color of passion and anger. This armor good for both. You give me items on list and this red armor is yours.

title: Wikelo Arrive to System
description:
Hello, I am Wikelo. Recent addition to your system and very excited to be here. Spent many time here in UEE and happy to spent more.

Have place where I make things from other things.

Need person to bring me useful things to finish project I work on. You have list. Get, please. I am at <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>.

Will give you item for your help.

Also, when done, if you want to do more. Have many things can make in my humble shop. Come, look at pretty poster and then decide what you want me to make.

Bye.

title: Very Hungry
description:
You humans keep Wikelo very busy. Work more than when I at old souli. But Wikelo very hungry now and can't get food.

Please help. Bring food and drink to Wikelo Emporium at <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>.

Very appreciate your help. Will give thing in return.

Bye.

title: Trade Worm Parts for Favors?
description:
Have new way to get <EM4>favors</EM4> from Wikelo. Hear much about worm things in radiation storms. Made up of many interesting parts that Wikelo find use for. 

If you bring parts to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>, will trade for favor.

Bye.

title: Trade Merc Scrip for Favors?
description:
Wikelo has another way to get <EM4>favors</EM4> if you interested. 

Your Mercenary souli has <EM4>scrip</EM4> metal, used like favors, but made of very interesting metal that Wikelo need for new project.

If you bring scrips to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>, will trade for favor.

Bye.

title: Trade Council Scrip for Favors?
description:
If you want other way to get <EM4>favors</EM4> from Wikelo, have thing for you. Wikelo have need for <EM4>scrip</EM4> given out by Council group. Wikelo not part of thief souli, but has business from time to time.

If you bring scrips to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>, will trade for favor.

Bye.

title: Turn Things to Favor
description:
Maybe Wikelo not have something you want made (that strange, but okay). Old souli would give out <EM4>favors</EM4>, very good way to prove that you do work for me. Collect enough and trade when I have something you want.

Bring things to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will trade for favor.

Bye.

title: Want Polaris? Need something special.
description:
Wikelo need large amounts of <EM4>quantainium</EM4> and is willing to give you nice Polaris in exchange but also know many humans not have much space, so you trade as you go. Wikelo will you <EM4>Polaris bits</EM4> if you want trade quantainium. Work like favors. Help Wikelo remember how much you give. 

Bring quantainium to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and will trade for bits.

Bye.

title: Fortune ship for you
description: Hello, practicing on making ship fly better. Xi'an help human make ship. Fly good. Salvage good. But Wikelo can make better if you want. Bring things and will do. Bye.

title: Noxy Mod
description: Wikelo know many Xi'an. Talk slow but very interesting if you have patience. This is very fast little thing to get you across planet. Wikelo made a few tweaks to make it zippier. If you want, Wikelo will make for you. Bye.

title: Upgrade Intrepid
description: If you are looking for Intrepid ship that more intrepid. Wikelo can help. Bring things and you will get special touches on ship by Wikelo and pretty new coat to it. Bye.

title: Pulse Plus
description: Wikelo really like this little Human ship. Pulse feel very fast. Can have many configuration to make Pulse go faster. If you want, can give you configurated Pulse that I like. Have list of what I want for job. Bye.

title: Make a Ursa Mod
description: Wikelo branching into ships too. Took a look at Ursa and improved. Bring parts for me and I will make for you. Explore planet better. Go do.

title: Guardian take down ship
description: Insect ship again. This one help take down other ship but if you want it to take down better. Can make. See list and tell Wikelo. Bye.

title: Firebird Mod
description: Been digging into Aegis Sabre ship. Firebird is very bomb-y. Good build but could make some fun change to it. If you want, I can do. Have a look and tell me. Bye.

title: Build a Mod Scorpius
description: Don't know what the name mean, but ship is very fast, very good in fight. With tweak, can better. You see list of what Wikelo need, go get and I make. Bye.

title: Wikelo Navy F7
description: Know how much you Humans like Navy so Wikelo have one now. If you want Wikelo version of F7 mk2, bring me things and you are in. Very funny. Bye.

title: Zeus Special
description: Wikelo can make new version of Zeus ship. I know it important ship to Human. Not sure why, but yes, very useful ship. Anyway, can upgrade and make a little prettier. What I need listed, if you want, bring. Bye.

title: Zeus Cargo Special
description: Wikelo can make new version of cargo Zeus ship. If you want, bring what needed, then you can have ship. Fair. Bye.

title: Peregrine Wikelo Mod
description: Wikelo not want to race but can still make fast ship faster. If you want, bring me things, and go faster.

title: Spirit Cargo mod
description: Wikelo love useful cargo ship. Spirit is very useful. If you want one, can make for you. Just bring me things and I will do. Bye.

title: F8 War Mod
description: Can make you custom of F8 that take good fighting ship and make a better fighting ship. Bring things and I will make. Bye.

title: Sneaky Stabber
description: Have the pieces to build useful ship for people who like to sneak then fight. Take F8C ship and make even better. Have put what Wikelo will need to build for you. Now you decide. Bye.

title: More than a Max
description: If you want to move many things. Hercules ship, very good for that. Wikelo even know souli back in Protectorate that started to use. Very big. Wikelo can give you similar version if you get what Wikelo need. Look at list and tell me.

title: Want Taurus ship
description: Wikelo came across plans to build Constellation Taurus ship. Nice ship, but Wikelo make a little better. Prettier too. If you want, bring stuff.

title: Make ATLS shoot
description:
Hello. Know you human like strange metal suit. How about metal suit with ikti? Sorry, ikti is Banu word, you call it 'gun.' 

If want, bring things I say and I will make for you. Gun will shoot. Cause many damage.

Bye.

title: Make jumpy ATLS shoot
description:
Find very fun piece to add to big human suit that let you jump very high. Now you shoot and jump. Exciting.

If you want, bring me these to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4>. Will make.

Wikelo

title: Now make Polaris. Short Time Deal.
description:
Wikelo recently get many blueprints in trade with human who not very smart. Now can make very big ship. 

Not cheap and need many pieces but will make. If you want, go quick, this cost much to Wikelo so won't be able to do for long but I like new Human system so I want to thank you all for welcome.

Bring to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> if want.

Bye.

title: @thecollector_mod_atls_geo_grad3_name
description: @thecollector_mod_atls_geo_grad3_desc

title: @thecollector_mod_atls_geo_grad1_name
description: @thecollector_mod_atls_geo_grad1_desc

title: @thecollector_mod_atls_geo_grad2_name
description: @thecollector_mod_atls_geo_grad2_desc

title: What is Terrapin?
description: Wikelo not know this Human word but ship is very useful when things go danger. If you want, can give new version of it. Maybe more useful?\n\nYou fly and tell. Bye.

title: Golem Rocks
description:
Universe need resources so Wikelo always respect people who dig. Good profession. If you starting and want boost to Golem ship. I can do. 

Bring. 

I make.

title: New Move Big Starlancer Ship
description: If you like big space to move things, Wikelo can do useful and wonder things to MISC ship for you. Bring me pieces and I will give you version even better than what Xi'an can do.

title: Starlifter A2 War Mod
description: Bring Wikelo the things and I make you A2 Starlifter that fights better. Does war so good make you call it A1! Bye.

title: Sneaky Starfighter Ion
description: Starfighter Ion good ship, but it could be more sneak, yes? Surprise your not friends when you shoot them. I help with this for you. I need the right items and then I can give to you. Bring to me. Bye.

title: Starfighter Inferno Special
description: Starfighter Inferno good ship, but what if you want it to be better ship at fighting? Wikelo knows just what to do. You bring me the items and I make it for you. Bye.

title: Prowler More Utility
description: Wikelo work hard. You work hard. Prowler Utility work hard. But you bring me right items, I make it work more hard, then you work less hard. Bye.

title: Guardian Fight Mod
description: This ship look like insect in the Protectorate. Fun look. Painful sting. Wikelo can make custom version for you if you want. Make enemies sting. Bye.

title: Guardian WiK-X
description: You Humans enjoy strange letter combinations. It very funny. Guardian ship very useful but if you want even more useful, bring me things. I give you better ship. Look better. Act better.\n\nThank you. Bye.

title: RSI Meteor Mod
description: Meteor big. It heavy. Have many guns. But Wikelo figure out way to make even better. You have things I will take to do.\n\nThat is all.

title: Prospects Look Good
description: Wikelo loves rocks. Wants to help you get more better rocks. Made this Prospector more better for that tough job. Trade items and you can have.

title: Ready for RAFT?
description: RAFT is very useful. Wikelo take it and make it very very useful. Do work and make you happy. You want? Bring items to Wikelo for trade.

title: Asgard Fight Mod
description: Wikelo mod Asgard and so that it fights more. You in a fight, this mod is what you want. Plus, good deal on the trade. Just bring items here and I give you the ship.

title: Where Wolf? Here Wolf
description: If you want to be quiet and surprise people, this is the Wolf you want. Wikelo mod it to be extra stealth. Trade you for it when you bring me the items I want.

title: Most Special Wolf
description: You have been good trade partner for Wikelo. Offer you this very special Wolf mod. Make trade even better - Bring me what I want and I give you the special Wolf AND Antium Armor AND a VOLT LMG. Very good deal for my very good customer.

title: Special Idris For Killing
description: Since Wikelo has done good business with you, make you this very special trade. Idris is a powerful ship perfect for big important person like you. Wikelo has even done mod to make it more dangerous! Bring me a few items and the ship is yours.

title: Red Fight Apollo
description: Apollo very good ship. Would be much better if ship was red. Wikelo make all things possible. You trade for what I want and we have a deal.

title: Small Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

title: Med. Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

title: XL Purchase Order: Vehicle Mined Ore
description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for rare materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

There are only a few known locations where these materials can be sourced, mainly from now defunct Hathor Group sites on <EM4>Daymar and Aberdeen</EM4>. Our suggestion would be to head to the Platform Alignment Facilities (PAF) and attempt to reactivate their Orbital Laser Platform (OLP) to access the materials below the planet's surface.

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

title: A Chance to Impress
description:
Firstly, allow me to introduce myself. To put it rather dramatically, I deal in lives. 

People hire me when some soul needs to be extinguished, and I in return employ the perfect person to serve as the extinguishant. This provides security to all parties involved as none know the identity of the other. An ideal situation as far as these things go.

I was recently made aware that you may possess skills that would make you of service to me and decided that it would be worthwhile to pursue the validity of this claim. 
 
If you have any interest in forging a working relationship, I will need a demonstration of said skills. 

Seek out and discreetly kill ~mission(TargetName) over at ~mission(Location|Address).

Do so successfully and you will be rewarded. Not only that, but you will have proven yourself worthy of further consideration.

Sincerely,
Vaughn

title: Another Chance to Impress
description:
It is not often in life that we get another chance to make a first impression, but I am going to provide to you with just that.

To say I was disappointed in how things last transpired on your last assassination attempt would be a severe understatement. However, here is your chance to prove yourself capable of more. 

Kill ~mission(TargetName) over at ~mission(Location|Address) and I will consider the slate wiped clean. 

Sincerely,
Vaughn

title: Locate Missing Clients
description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP51643
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Looking for an operative to confirm the status of a client. They and their partner missed a scheduled meeting and all attempts to contact them have proven in vain. Last we heard they were undertaking some business in ~mission(System) and fear that they may be the victim of some unfortunate tragedy.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>~mission(MissingPersonList)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
Be cautious while conducting your search. If the client did meet harm, it would be unfortunate for you to meet the same fate.

title: Locate Missing Employee
description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP51132
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Need an operative to help us locate the current whereabouts of a client's employee. They were on assignment in ~mission(System) but has failed to report in. Our client is beginning to fear the worst.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>~mission(MissingPersonList)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
This contract has been flagged as <EM4>combat-likely</EM4> so prepare accordingly.

title: Locate Missing Team
description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP74384
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
We had sent in a two-person team to ~mission(System) to investigate a case, but have received no reports from them for several days. At this juncture we are forced to assume that they had run into an unforeseen obstacle and may be in need of rescue, or worse, have been killed.


Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>~mission(MissingPersonList)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
Consider the dangerous nature of their investigation, there is a very strong chance there will be hostiles on site.

title: Locate Missing Family Member
description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP45648
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has tasked us with tracking down with one of their family members who has gone missing. After exhibiting erratic behavior, they cut off all communications and left for ~mission(System). We were able to track down their general whereabouts but need an investigator to head there in person to assess the situation.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>~mission(MissingPersonList)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
There is a high chance that you will encounter hostiles while conducting your search. We recommend considering bringing along backup to support you.

title: Locate Missing Contractors
description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP12854
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary:
We have been asked to track down two contractors who work for a client of ours after they lost contact with them. They were last known to be traveling together in ~mission(System). Until their exact situation can be assessed, our client is stuck in a waiting pattern. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>~mission(MissingPersonList)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
You'll be heading into what is regarded as a particularly dangerous spot. Backup is highly recommended for this encounter.

title: Locate Missing Crew
description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP65648
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A whole crew has gone missing while undertaking a contract in ~mission(System) for a client that I'm unfortunately not allowed to disclose the full details of to you. Lets just say that it wasn't the safest job and the fact the crew is not responding comms is not surprising but it is concerning. It's vital that we ascertain what happened to them. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>~mission(MissingPersonList)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
This investigation has high potential for there to be aggressive and dangerous hostiles on site. Arm yourself accordingly and consider bringing other skilled associates with you.

title: Save Ship
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client is reporting trouble near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Based on their comms, it doesn’t sound like an organized, professional attack. Still, we’re paid to provide protection and it’s been requested. 

Need a contractor to fly there and secure the situation.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Support Client Under Attack
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of our clients got the brilliant idea to test their dogfighting skills in a real world scenario. Doesn’t sound like it’s going well, because they comm’d us asking for some support. 

Head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and help clean up the mess they created.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Stop Attack on High-Profile Client
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A high-profile client decided to tour Nyx system but got jumped by hostile ships around <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. 

Sounds like they’re overwhelmed. Any chance you could head to their location and provide support? 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: High-Risk Ship Encounter
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Recently, we recommended that a client use a specific route to cross Nyx safely. Turns out it wasn’t as secure as we assumed, because a group ambushed our client’s ship. We need to get this cleaned up ASAP. Are you available to help? 

Intel from the client indicates a well-organized attack, so you better be equipped to deal with experienced hostiles on this one. Hurry to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, help them survive this, and we’ll pay you well for your trouble.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Stop Deadly Ship Attack
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Despite our warnings, a client decided to fly to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Unsurprisingly, they just dropped a rescue beacon in the area, so we’re looking for a contractor to get on site, assess the situation, and hopefully rescue the client.

We warned them that extremely dangerous and well-equipped outlaws often strike ships there. That’s exactly what I assume happened here, so make sure you plan accordingly.  

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Extremely Dangerous Defense
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We have a client currently under attack at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We have a long history with this client and know that they’re a skilled dogfighter. If they’re struggling to survive, then this situation must be dire.
 
We’re looking for a top-tier dogfighter to head out there and provide support. If you’re available, then this client could really use your help. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Search Outpost for Our Supplies
description:
Hi,

Bunch of basic goods needed at ~mission(Destination|Address) were stolen while in transit. Got a tip that the supplies were taken to ~mission(Location|Address). Can you head there and reclaim them for us? 

The place is allegedly abandoned, but looks can be deceiving. My advice, prepare for the worst but hope for the best. 

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Get Supplies from Remote Outpost
description:
Hi,

We’ve got a CFP team monitoring Headhunter activity at ~mission(Location|Address). They let me know a batch of recently stolen CFP supplies were moved into it. Since there’s fewer defenses and personnel there, it feels like a good spot to strike and get our goods back. Interested?    

Do this right and the bigger outpost won’t know until it’s too late. Get in, get the goods, and then bring them to ~mission(Destination|Address). Sound like a plan?

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Fly safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Raid Headhunters Outpost
description:
Hey,

I’ve been hustling to track down what happened to a bunch of important supplies stolen from a CFP outpost. As I suspected, they were taken by the Headhunters who currently have them stashed at ~mission(Location|Address). 

My source also warned me that they might be moving the supplies to a more secure location soon. Feels like our window of getting them back is closing fast. Can you head over to that outpost and reclaim them before they disappear again?

Clearly, it’s a risky op but I wouldn’t be asking if those supplies weren’t important. Secure them and then bring them to ~mission(Destination|Address).

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Be safe out there, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

My source also warned me that they might be moving the supplies to a more secure location soon. Feels like our window of getting them back is closing fast. Can you head over to that outpost and reclaim them before they disappear again?

Clearly, it’s a risky op but I wouldn’t be asking if those supplies weren’t important. Secure them and then bring them to ~mission(Destination|Address).

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Be safe out there, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Supplies For Supplies
description:
Hey,

Get this. Headhunters raided one of our outposts and ran off with all the supplies. That’s left the folks there in a tough spot because it’s going to take a bit to get new goods to them. But a different plan came to mind that I hope you can help with. 

See, we know the Headhunters have a bunch of their own supplies stashed at ~mission(Location|Address). Feels only fair that we go get them to replace the ones they took from us. I’m looking for someone who not only feels this is fair but is skilled enough to overcome whatever forces are there. When the good are in your hands, they need to go to ~mission(Destination|Address), so our folks there can keep that outpost up and running. 

Thanks, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Get Supplies from Headhunters Remote Outpost
description:
Hi, 

Headhunters must be getting sick of us. I’ve noticed they’ve adjusted their strategy to target more of our supply convoys. Our ability to establish long-lasting security in this system will be based on the strength of supply chains, and the Headhunters know our outposts won’t survive unless they get a constant supply of goods. 

Going to be honest with you. They’re plan is working. They’re knocking out supply convoys faster than we can get new goods into the system. The only way we’ll survive is by finding another supply source. Since they’re already taking so many of ours, I feel justified in taking some of theirs right back. 

There’s one place in particular that I’ve had my eye on. It’s ~mission(Location|Address) that the Headhunter use to store goods. Need someone to go there, take care of any guards, grab whatever supplies they have, and then take them to ~mission(Destination|Address).

Think you could help us with this?

Be safe, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Return the Favor at XenoThreat Outpost
description:
Hi,

XenoThreat really has us in their crosshairs. Beefing up our defenses will help, but we can’t sit back and let them keep stealing our stuff. There’s too many CFP outposts that are already desperately low on goods.  

That’s why we need to be proactive in getting some goods back. One of our ops recently identified ~mission(Location|Address) as a spot where the Xenos store a lot of supplies. Considering the outpost’s location relative to attacks on our convoy and outposts, there’s got to be a fair share of our goods in there. 

This isn’t an easy ask for many reasons, but we really need someone who can handle any Xenos at that spot and grab whatever cargo they can. Anything you acquire can be brought to ~mission(Destination|Address) where we’ll sort it and then send to our outposts that need it the most. 

Thanks, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Get Back at XenoThreat
description:
Hey,

XenoThreat just raided one of our convoys and made off with a bunch of supplies. I’m not sure exactly where they took them, but I know they have a cache of stolen cargo not too far away. If I had to guess, that’s exactly where they took them. 

The spot is ~mission(Location|Address). Need someone to go there, grab the goods inside, and bring them to ~mission(Destination|Address). The outpost is a little ways away from their main operations hub. Normally, there’s fewer forces there than the main outpost, but don’t think this will be a walk in the park. Just be smart and prepared. 

Be safe, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Inter-Outpost Delivery at ~mission(Destination)
description:
Hey,

We’ve got an opportunity for any haulers interested in lending a hand or two to Citizens for Prosperity.

There’s a box that needs to be moved from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Shouldn’t take long, if you’re around the outpost and available. 

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher

title: Distribute Supplies Across ~mission(Destination)
description:
Hey,

We need someone to make a couple runs if you’re interested. Some important supplies need to be distributed across ~mission(Location). Here are the details. 

Everything needs to be picked up from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> then distributed to the following spots: 

Package <EM4>#~mission(Item1|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.
Package <EM4>#~mission(Item4|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.
Package <EM4>#~mission(Item5|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination1|Address)</EM4>.
Package <EM4>#~mission(Item2|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination1|Address)</EM4>.
Package <EM4>#~mission(Item3|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination2|Address)</EM4>.

Shouldn’t be too difficult. Plus, it’ll give you the chance to familiarize yourself with the outpost and see all the good work the CFP is doing.

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Gather Supplies Across Outpost
description:
Hi, 

We’re a little shorthanded at one of our outposts and could use some help. We need someone to gather supplies spread across a few buildings and bring them to one spot.

Here’s what needs to be gathered:

Pick up package <EM4>#~mission(Item1|SerialNumber)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.
Pick up package <EM4>#~mission(Item4|SerialNumber)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.
Pick up package <EM4>#~mission(Item5|SerialNumber)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location1|Address)</EM4>.
Pick up package <EM4>#~mission(Item2|SerialNumber)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location1|Address)</EM4>.
Pick up package <EM4>#~mission(Item3|SerialNumber)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location2|Address)</EM4>.
  
Each one needs to end up at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Simple enough, right?

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Rectify Delivery Error
description:
Hey,

Got word that folks are waiting for an important supply shipment that hasn’t arrived. We thought maybe it had been destroyed but turns out that it accidently got taken to the wrong place. While we look into how the mistake happened, we need someone to head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to pick up package <EM4>#~mission(item1|SerialNumber)</EM4> and deliver it to the correct location at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

You available for the run?

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Deliver Good Cheer
description:
Hey, 

Every once and awhile, Citizens for Prosperity likes to surprise members stationed at our outposts with a little gift to keep morale high. We’ve got the next box ready to go from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>, but need someone to make the delivery for us. Any interest in spreading some good cheer?

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott

description:
Hi,

title: Cross System Haul
description:
Hi,

It’s incredible how many Citizens for Prosperity locations have started to thrive throughout the system. To sustain these locations, we need to be able to move important supplies between them. Got one such important run here, if you’re interested.  

There’s a few boxes of goods waiting at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that need to cross the system to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Could you move them for us and help us all build a better future?

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott

title: Remote Outpost Run
description:
Hey, 

Some CFP members have put together a little care package for some folks living at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Unfortunately, they got called away before they could drop it off. Feel like handling this one for us?    

The remote outpost isn’t too far away from the main outpost. Guess you could walk it, if you really want, but driving or flying it there would be a lot faster. Your choice.

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott

title: Multiple Drop-Off Delivery
description:
Hi,

Keeping Citizens for Prosperity outposts stocked with supplies is key to our mission in this system. Happy folks make happy homes. Can you help us deliver some much needed provisions to a few of them? 

Everything can be collected at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Then here’s the breakdown of where everything goes: 

Package <EM4>#~mission(Item1|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.
Package <EM4>#~mission(Item4|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.
Package <EM4>#~mission(Item5|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination1|Address)</EM4>.
Package <EM4>#~mission(Item2|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination1|Address)</EM4>.
Package <EM4>#~mission(Item3|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination2|Address)</EM4>.

Great way to make some creds and see a few of the CFP’s thriving outposts.

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Package <EM4>#~mission(Item4|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.
Package <EM4>#~mission(Item5|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination1|Address)</EM4>.
Package <EM4>#~mission(Item2|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination1|Address)</EM4>.
Package <EM4>#~mission(Item3|SerialNumber)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination2|Address)</EM4>.

Great way to make some creds and see a few of the CFP’s thriving outposts.

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott

description:

All the hard work the volunteers at Citizens for Prosperity have been doing is starting to pay off. Not only have we established outposts to house and protect people looking for a peaceful life, but our goal of making each outpost prosperous in their own right is coming to fruition.

There’s a handful of outposts that have produced some valuable commodities that are ready for pick up and delivery to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Any chance you could swing by the outposts to grab the goods?

Here’s where everything needs to be picked up from: 

Pick up package <EM4>#~mission(Item1|SerialNumber)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.
Pick up package <EM4>#~mission(Item4|SerialNumber)</EM4> at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

As always, thanks for your help making this system a little brighter.

Lima Endicott

title: Raid Headhunters Cave
description:
Hi,

Our intel team intercepted a comm between Headhunters talking about how they stocked ~mission(Location|Address) with cargo stolen from us. Asked around about that cave and it’s been a known Headhunters cache for decades. Always seems to be staffed by grunts too. 

Know it’s risky but we really need to take our cargo back. You up for raiding that cave?

Do whatever you need to get our supplies back and then take them to ~mission(Destination|Address).

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Thanks, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Search Cave for Our Supplies
description:
Hey,

Some desperate crew raided one of our outposts and ran off with a bunch of essential supplies. A CFP member tracked them to ~mission(Location|Address) but didn’t have the right gear or training to raid the cave themselves. Better that we hire a skilled and well-prepared professional to take care of it for us. 

Here’s some other important intel you should know before taking the job. This crew seems to be based out of that cave and not just using it as a dead drop, so I’d expect that you’ll have to deal with them to get to the cargo. Next, you can bring everything you recover to ~mission(Destination|Address).

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Be Safe,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Return Stolen Supplies
description:
Hey,

Outlaws have been targeting CFP supply caches and we’re sick of it. We started hiding trackers in the cargo containers and some just got lifted and taken to ~mission(Location|Address).

Can you head there, get back what’s ours, and then take it to ~mission(Destination|Address)?

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Thanks, 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher

title: @headhunters_shipambush_intro_title_001
description: @headhunters_shipambush_intro_desc_001

title: Surprise Party
description:
Some numskull flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> was caught spying on our ops. We ran ‘em off with a warning only to spot ‘em doing the same shit someplace else. Since they didn’t get the message, seems we gotta send a stronger one.    

There’s an emission cloud near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that they fly by frequently. Primo place to power down, hide, and launch a surprise attack. Sometimes they fly solo, sometimes there’s other single-seaters with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.

title: Silent Strike
description:
Any interest in taking out a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> for us? 

Shouldn’t be too much trouble. We’ve already done the legwork and figured out that they're scheduled to pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> soon. Just go dark in the nearby emission cloud and you’ll get a good jump on ‘em.  

They might roll through solo or with some friends. All would be single-seaters but they can hold their own in a dogfight. We’ll drop some forces in the region who can provide support once the fun starts.

You pull this off and I'll toss <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for a job well done.

- Stows

title: Ambush Op
description:
One of our Clips put out a kill order on a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>. Feel like making ‘em happy by taking it out?

Here’s what you need to know. The target and their escort are scheduled to pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Looks like there’s an emission cloud nearby that can hide your ship’s sig. Wait there until you’re ready to strike. 

The Clip only cares about wiping out the target. Anything of value you find floating in the wreckage is all yours. 

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount)</EM4> Council Scrip to sweeten the pot. 

- Stows

title: Reprisal Attack
description:
A squad of ships recently shanked one of our convoys, and ten credits says they’re gonna try and do it again. Looking for someone to launch a reprisal attack before that can happen.  

We’ve ID’d the idiots as consisting of several large craft and a sizable escort. We believe the leader is flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and set that ship as the primary target. Since it’s a sizable and aggressive squad, a surprise attack seems like a smart play. They often pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, which has an emission cloud to hide in. Be smart and patient then strike when the time is right. 

Unless you fancy yourself a real ace, it’s probably best to bring some friends. Maybe you can entice folks by letting them know they can pick through the wreckage for valuables once the deed is done.

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to sweeten the pot.

Stows out.

title: Tactical Strike
description:
Some folks don’t seem happy with us. Got word that several sub-capital ships and a number of escorts are targeting our ops. Figured the best way to keep ‘em from causing us trouble is to hit them before they hit us. 

We got eyes on a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> that’s part of this squad, and it looks like they regularly pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, a spot tailor made for a surprise attack. A nearby emission cloud can hide you and anyone you bring along for muscle.

No sugarcoating it. This ain’t gonna be easy. But the payoff should make it worth your while. Finish the job and the main contractor gets a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4>. 

Plus, who knows what kinda good stuff you’ll find floating in all that wreckage.

Stows out.

title: Elite Op
description:
Headhunters are looking for someone with the skills and crew to execute an elite op. A military frigate and escort ships are stalking one of our Clips around the system. Don’t know their intentions but it can’t be good. Figure while they’ve got their eyes focused on their prize, we get someone to gather a crew to hit ‘em.  

Already got a spot picked out. If you get to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> there’s an emission cloud that’s exactly what we need. Head there with friends, power down your ships, and wait for the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and its escorts to pass by. 

With a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor, payment alone should make this worth your while, but you can also keep anything you scrounge from the wreckage.

- Stows

title: Surprise Party
description:
Some numskull flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> was caught spying on our ops. We ran ‘em off with a warning only to spot ‘em doing the same shit someplace else. Since they didn’t get the message, seems we gotta send a stronger one.    

There’s an emission cloud near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that they fly by frequently. Primo place to power down, hide, and launch a surprise attack. Sometimes they fly solo, sometimes there’s other single-seaters with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.

Plus, who knows what kinda good stuff you’ll find floating in all that wreckage.

Stows out.

title: Elite Op
description:
Headhunters are looking for someone with the skills and crew to execute an elite op. A military frigate and escort ships are stalking one of our Clips around the system. Don’t know their intentions but it can’t be good. Figure while they’ve got their eyes focused on their prize, we get someone to gather a crew to hit ‘em.  

Already got a spot picked out. If you get to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> there’s an emission cloud that’s exactly what we need. Head there with friends, power down your ships, and wait for the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and its escorts to pass by. 

With a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor, payment alone should make this worth your while, but you can also keep anything you scrounge from the wreckage.

- Stows

title: @headhunters_shipambush_intro_title_001
description: @headhunters_shipambush_intro_desc_001

title: Surprise Party
description:
Some numskull flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> was caught spying on our ops. We ran ‘em off with a warning only to spot ‘em doing the same shit someplace else. Since they didn’t get the message, seems we gotta send a stronger one.    

There’s an emission cloud near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that they fly by frequently. Primo place to power down, hide, and launch a surprise attack. Sometimes they fly solo, sometimes there’s other single-seaters with them. It’ll be all you for that first hit, but we’ll put some support ships nearby to help finish the job. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

Stows out.

title: Silent Strike
description:

Shouldn’t be too much trouble. We’ve already done the legwork and figured out that they're scheduled to pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> soon. Just go dark in the nearby emission cloud and you’ll get a good jump on ‘em.  

They might roll through solo or with some friends. All would be single-seaters but they can hold their own in a dogfight. We’ll drop some forces in the region who can provide support once the fun starts.

You pull this off and I'll toss <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for a job well done.

- Stows

title: Ambush Op
description:
One of our Clips put out a kill order on a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>. Feel like making ‘em happy by taking it out?

Here’s what you need to know. The target and their escort are scheduled to pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Looks like there’s an emission cloud nearby that can hide your ship’s sig. Wait there until you’re ready to strike. 

The Clip only cares about wiping out the target. Anything of value you find floating in the wreckage is all yours. 

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount)</EM4> Council Scrip to sweeten the pot. 

- Stows

description:

title: Reprisal Attack
description:
A squad of ships recently shanked one of our convoys, and ten credits says they’re gonna try and do it again. Looking for someone to launch a reprisal attack before that can happen.  

We’ve ID’d the idiots as consisting of several large craft and a sizable escort. We believe the leader is flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and set that ship as the primary target. Since it’s a sizable and aggressive squad, a surprise attack seems like a smart play. They often pass by <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, which has an emission cloud to hide in. Be smart and patient then strike when the time is right. 

Unless you fancy yourself a real ace, it’s probably best to bring some friends. Maybe you can entice folks by letting them know they can pick through the wreckage for valuables once the deed is done.

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to sweeten the pot.

Stows out.

title: Protection against ~mission(TargetName|Last)
description:
Reports indicate that ~mission(Location|Address) has come under attack from a group of armed individuals led by a notorious outlaw named ~mission(TargetName). There have been multiple reported deaths and injuries, so Citizens for Prosperity has been looking for qualified combat operatives to provide some support. 

Though we don't advocate conflict resolution through violence, we believe that the group will disperse if ~mission(TargetName|Last) is not there to lead them.

Head over as soon as you can. Lives are on the line.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Assistance needed at ~mission(Location)
description:
We received a distress call from ~mission(Location|Address) saying that they're being robbed by a small group of outlaws. ~mission(Location|CaveSize) Though remote, this outpost is a crucial piece of CFP's infrastructure in the area so we need to take it back.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Defend ~mission(Location) from Outlaws
description:
We learned that ~mission(Location|Address) is under threat of attack by outlaws and has asked for assistance. We need someone to protect them and drive away the outlaws. 

Make sure you stay close after their initial attack. Too often, outlaws win fights just by sending more bodies than anyone can reasonably defend against, so make sure you fight off any reinforcements before leaving the area. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Call for Help: ~mission(Location)
description:
We've received a distress call from ~mission(Location|Address). A group of unknown assailants have launched an attack. There have been multiple deaths reported and we need to reclaim the outpost.

I know this is far from your current position, but we're desperate to secure the area and get the outpost back and running again.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Call for Help: ~mission(Location)
description:
We've received a distress call from ~mission(Location|Address). A group of unknown assailants have launched an attack. There have been multiple deaths reported and we need to reclaim the outpost.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Reclaim Headhunter Outpost
description:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for security personnel to take a former CFP outpost that's currently serving as a hideout for Headhunters to launch attacks throughout the system. 

Located near ~mission(Location|Address), reclaiming this outpost will allow CFP to provide greater support to local efforts to build stability.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Reclaim XenoThreat Outpost
description:
Despite our efforts to promote non-violence, local outlaw groups continue to attack our organization. XenoThreat recently assaulted ~mission(Location|Address) and chased out our volunteers that had been working there.

We're looking to enlist combat personnel to retake the outpost. Ideally we could work something out to encourage them to move on, but XenoThreat quickly resorts to violence to solve all their issues so there will undoubtedly be a fight.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Reclaim Headhunter Outpost
description:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for security personnel to take a former CFP outpost that's currently serving as a hideout for Headhunters to launch attacks throughout the system. 

Located near ~mission(Location|Address), reclaiming this outpost will allow CFP to provide greater support to local efforts to build stability.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Defenders needed against Headhunters
description:
We received an emergency comm from ~mission(Location|Address) reporting that they are currently under attack by a group of Headhunters. We know our presence in the system has upset the Headhunters, but it hardly excuses this unprovoked attack.

If available, please gather your gear and head out. Just understand that Headhunters are experienced fighters and will not back down easily.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Protecting outpost from XenoThreat
description:
XenoThreat forces launched an unprovoked attack near ~mission(Location|Address). We're looking for any available combat operators to go and provide support. 

If you haven't dealt with them before, it's important to know that XenoThreat are trained fighters so this will not be an easy fight, but it's a necessary one.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Attack on CFP outpost
description:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any available combat operators to ~mission(Location|Address). A group of outlaws have launched an unprovoked attack and our security personnel are desperately in need of support.

Please dispatch to ~mission(Location) with all urgency and good luck.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Defenders needed against Headhunters
description:
