Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Headhunter attack on ~mission(Location)
description:
A distress call just came in from ~mission(Location|Address) claiming that a large Headhunter force has just attacked our outpost there. There have been multiple deaths and injuries from those who managed to flee the scene. We're looking for any available security personnel to head there and retake the outpost.

Witness accounts identified the attackers as elite Headhunter enforcers, so watch yourself out there and bring help if you can. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: ~mission(Location) needs assistance
description:
Headhunters have launched an unprovoked attack against ~mission(Location|Address). Although we don't support the use of violence, Citizens for Prosperity won't let innocent people die. We need qualified security personnel to retake the outpost.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Protect ~mission(Location) from XenoThreat Incursion
description:
Urgent!

XenoThreat is mobilizing for a massive incursion to wipe ~mission(Location|Address) off the map. You’re their only hope of enduring this assault and protecting them from XenoThreat’s cruelty.

I know I’m asking you to put yourself in the line of fire, but this system won’t change unless people like you are brave enough to take on these dangers. No amount of credits could measure up to how much good you’d be doing by stepping in.

If you’re willing and able to take on this mission, make sure to take some allies with you. XenoThreat will certainly send in stronger reinforcements once they realize they’re taking losses.

We believe in you.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Protect ~mission(Location) from XenoThreat Raid
description:
Urgent!

XenoThreat is targeting ~mission(Location|Address) to send a message to other settlers about what happens if they accept our support. 

If you’re able to fend off the attackers, I’m sure they’ll send additional forces, so you’ll need to dig in for multiple assaults. Since XenoThreat has a lot of resources at their disposal, you should think about recruiting others to help you keep everyone safe.

We’re all counting on you.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Defend ~mission(Location) from Outlaws
description:
We learned that ~mission(Location|Address) is under threat of attack by outlaws and has asked for assistance. We need someone to protect them and drive away the outlaws. 

Make sure you stay close after their initial attack. Too often, outlaws win fights just by sending more bodies than anyone can reasonably defend against, so make sure you fight off any reinforcements before leaving the area. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Help defend ~mission(Location) from Headhunters
description:
We just received a frantic comm from ~mission(Location|Address) and are looking for any available combat specialists to help repel a Headhunter attack. There are still hostiles on site and there are reports of several casualties so we need this handled quickly.

I will provide all relevant data upon acceptance. Thank you for your assistance.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Protect ~mission(Location) from XenoThreat Attack
description:
We’ve learned that XenoThreat is about to launch an attack on ~mission(Location|Address). If they are successful, the number of casualties is expected to be high. I’m hoping that with your aid in defending them, we can make sure that doesn’t happen.
 
We know from past encounters that XenoThreat sends several raiding parties to carry out their attacks, so make sure you don’t leave the outpost until you’ve fought off all the reinforcements. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Alert: ~mission(Location) under attack
description:
We need any available security personnel to report to ~mission(Location|Address). A group of armed individuals have attacked one of our outpost clusters and we're in desperate need of help. Although the group seems to be unaffiliated with any of the known gangs, we've received word that their leader is ~mission(TargetName), a local outlaw with a vicious reputation.

Please head out as soon as you can and secure the area by taking out the outlaws and ~mission(TargetName|Last).

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Outlaw attack at ~mission(Location)
description:
Several CFP clusters near ~mission(Location|Address) just got hit by a group of outlaws led by ~mission(TargetName). We're looking for any available combat specialists to help retake the outposts.

I can provide the locations upon acceptance but we need to clear out the main outpost and satellite installations from all hostile forces and take out ~mission(TargetName|Last) as it's unlikely that they will not cease their hostilities if they escape.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Need multiple CFP outposts retaken
description:
The outlaw presence here has become much bolder of late and a lot of people are getting hurt. We've recently lost several clusters around ~mission(Location|Address). While we don't like to have to resort to violence, the board has acknowledged that these locations are crucial to establishing stability in the system and authorized the use of a security detail to retake them.

We're also aware that the embedded hostiles are being led by ~mission(TargetName) who's had a history of attacking CFP interests. The board would like ~mission(TargetName|Last) dealt with to prevent future attacks.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Taking back from the Headhunters
description:
We are currently looking for any qualified and available security operatives to head out to ~mission(Location|Address) and reclaim a CFP installation that had been taken by Headhunters. 

The group that's currently occupying the outpost is being led by ~mission(TargetName), a Headhunter of some note who's had a history of aggression against locals and CFP volunteers.

We need all Headhunters secured and ~mission(TargetName|Last) taken out.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Retaking Outposts from Headhunters
description:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any available security operatives to retake several former CFP installations near ~mission(Location|Address) from Headhunter control. These clusters were violently taken from us by ~mission(TargetName) and resulted in the deaths of many volunteers.

Bringing these outposts back under our control will help provide more stability to the system. Reports indicate that ~mission(TargetName|Last) tends to hide behind their rank and file, so they will likely appear once you've cleared out most of the hostiles.

XenoThreat are trained and motivated so they will not give up easily.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Reclaiming Clusters from Headhunters
description:
Citizens for Prosperity's board just authorized funds to hire security personnel to retake several clusters near ~mission(Location|Address) that have since fallen into the hands of the Headhunters. While we tried to just accept the loss, it's become apparent that they are crucial to our ongoing operations in the system.

You'll need to clear out each of the locations that will be provided but more importantly, you'll also need to take out ~mission(TargetName), who's in charge of the hostiles on site.

These Headhunters are heavily embedded and have a history of violence, so you should prepare accordingly. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Reclaiming Outposts from XenoThreat
description:
Looking for any available security personnel to reclaim several clusters previously lost to XenoThreat aggressors. Located near ~mission(Location|Address), they had been seized in brutal attacks led by ~mission(TargetName), a notorious XenoThreat lieutenant.

We're looking to take these clusters back so we can reestablish operations and continue our good work. You'll need to clear all the hostiles still on-site as well as ~mission(TargetName|Last).

Just a reminder, that XenoThreat are highly trained and quick to fight, so prepare accordingly.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Campaign to reclaim XenoThreat outposts
description:
Although Citizens for Prosperity is committed to change through non-violent means, it's become apparent that exceptions might have to be made. CFP safe zones near ~mission(Location|Address) were recently and violently taken by XenoThreat forces under the command of ~mission(TargetName).

We're looking for any available combat operatives to help take these outposts back. This will undoubtedly be a difficult endeavor as XenoThreat are highly trained and eager to fight, so you should prepare accordingly.

Aside from clearing each cluster of XenoThreat forces, you will need to take out ~mission(TargetName|Last), who's loss will certainly make the system safer.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Call for Help: ~mission(Location)
description:
We've received a distress call from ~mission(Location|Address). A group of unknown assailants have launched an attack. There have been multiple deaths reported and we need to reclaim the outpost.

I know this is far from your current position, but we're desperate to secure the area and get the outpost back and running again.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: ~mission(Location|Address) needs help
description:
We just received reports of a massive attack against ~mission(Location) by a large group of armed individuals led by ~mission(TargetName), a notorious outlaw who has been threatening Citizens for Prosperity personnel for months. Details are still yet to be confirmed but we know there have been multiple casualties.

Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any qualified security personnel to go and retake the outposts from these hostile elements. Our understanding is that ~mission(TargetName|Last) tends to hide behind their soldiers, but will emerge if you take enough of the rank-and-file out.

While we don't like to resort to violence, management can see no other way of resolving this situation and continuing our good work in the system.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: @cfp_eliminateallff_title_001
description: @cfp_eliminateallff_desc_001

title: Establishing Security
description:
Welcome to the system, not sure if you're familiar with our organization but Citizens for Prosperity are a non-profit organization dedicated to bringing security and civilization to unclaimed systems.

If you're looking for work in the system and would like to help achieve our goal, we are looking for anyone with combat experience to help secure <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that has been taken over by a group of outlaws.

We've tried to work with them but have only been met with violence and threats.

Once complete, we can offer you a variety of new job opportunities in this system and beyond.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: @cfp_eliminateall_rockcracker_title_001
description: @cfp_eliminateall_rockcracker_power_desc

title: @cfp_eliminateall_rockcracker_title_001
description: @cfp_eliminateall_rockcracker_mainenance_desc

title: @cfp_eliminateall_rockcracker_title_001
description: @cfp_eliminateall_rockcracker_warehouse_desc

title: See What’s Out There
description:
Headhunters want some intel on what’s happening around territory. We’ve already set up some monitoring satellites, but nothing beats a good ol’ patrol. You up for it?

If so, get on over to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. Start by scanning that region and then we’ll guide you to a few more spots that we want info on. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

- Stows

title: Scout and Scan
description:
Headhunters have been expanding, but still need help getting a lay of our new territory. I’ve got a run to check spots we want scanned ready to go. 

This one kicks off at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and will look at a few more locations after that, but I’ll update you as we clear them out. Not expecting you to run into any trouble but no guarantees. Trouble seems to follow us.

Get this done and I'll toss the main contractor <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> as a thanks.

Stows out.

title: Space Patrol
description:
The local Clip wants current intel on several of our sectors. Not sure what they’re looking for but I’m not about to ask. My job is to find someone willing to swing through and scan these locations. You available? 

All you need to do is head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD, run a scan, and if it’s clear, move to the next spot. If you run into any issues, take care of it. 

Ain’t sound too tough now does it? Plus, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks. 


Stows out.

title: Looking For Trouble
description:
I’ve noticed an uptick in attacks on Headhunter ships and it's got me feelin' jumpy. Got an important resupply shipment that we can’t afford to lose, and need help determining what route to send it. I’ve strung together a few potential spots that I’d set up in if I was gonna hit ‘em. Any chance you could visit and clear out any lowlifes that may be hiding there? 

The route starts at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you scan it and clear whatever’s there, I’ll send you to a few other areas that could work. I’ve been hearing people have been rolling through these spots, so would be smart to <EM4>bring a friend</EM4> to watch your back.

You make it to the end and I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks. 

- Stows

title: Stand Our Ground
description:
We’re getting pushback from folks who don’t seem happy that we’re here. Folks have gotten keen to our haunts and started sending out squads to hit our ships. You down to visit a few of those spots to show that we won’t be scared off? 

If so, start by seeing what’s around the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. From there I’ll guide you to a few other hotspots that we need checked. Better get your shit in order before heading out. I'd recommend loading up on ammo and convincing <EM4>two friends</EM4> to join the patrol.

You do this for the Headhunters and I'll see to it that the main contractor gets a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4>. 

Stows out.

title: Hunt Some Heads
description:
Got some asshole’s trying to push us out of the system. You up for pushing back?

See, there are some folks who really don’t want us here, and have started sending out hunting parties of five to seven ships, often with a bigger gun ship, to places where we’re building up our presence. Time for us to show that we’re here to stay.  

I’ve strung together a few spots starting at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD where we’re seeing the most hostile encounters. Need you to visit each one and scan to see if we can bait them into a fight.

Know this is going to be a hard one, so don't be cocky and try to go it alone. If I were you, I'd bring at least <EM4>three friends</EM4> onboard for support. To make it worth your while, I'm promising a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor that pulls it off. 

- Stows

title: See What’s Out There
description:
Headhunters want some intel on what’s happening around territory. We’ve already set up some monitoring satellites, but nothing beats a good ol’ patrol. You up for it?

If so, get on over to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. Start by scanning that region and then we’ll guide you to a few more spots that we want info on. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

- Stows

title: Scout and Scan
description:
Headhunters have been expanding, but still need help getting a lay of our new territory. I’ve got a run to check spots we want scanned ready to go. 

This one kicks off at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and will look at a few more locations after that, but I’ll update you as we clear them out. Not expecting you to run into any trouble but no guarantees. Trouble seems to follow us.

Get this done and I'll toss the main contractor <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> as a thanks.

Stows out.

title: Space Patrol
description:

Ain’t sound too tough now does it? Plus, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks.

title: ~mission(TargetName) Vanished
description:
I’ve got people left and right askin’ me if I know what happened to ~mission(TargetName). Now personally, I’d be more than happy to see ‘em gone for good, but for whatever reason they got friends in high places demanding answers.

I can’t spare any of my people to go on a wild goose chase, so I'm looking for the perfect candidate to go over to ~mission(Location|Address) and find out what happened to ~mission(TargetName|Last). You’ll get paid if you find where they are.

10 credits says they got way too high and passed out in a dark corner somewhere.

-Smokey

title: Small Purchase Order: Ship Mined Ore
description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Due to changes in our sourcing pipeline, Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to purchase a variety of refined materials from independent miners operating in the area. While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal. While you're there, feel free to read the first part <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #1: Basic Overview</EM4> if you want a refresher on how to get the materials.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Please note that in an effort to expedite future use of these materials, <EM4>they must be refined before delivery</EM4>. This can be done at any refinery, the locations of which can be found in your Starmap.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required refined materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

title: @covalex_recovercargo_veryeasy_title
description:
Hi,

So I had a contractor who was supposed to deliver some stuff for us but has completely gone off the radar. I've pinged their ship and I've got no idea what's happened but they're floating around somewhere over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. If you could head over there recover the cargo and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> you'd be doing me a huge favor.

Don't forget to bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move all the cargo. Oh and a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

title: Small Covalex Shipment Needs Recovering
description:
Hiya,

I've got a client who's been messaging me all morning about a shipment they were supposed to receive and when I checked up on the cargo it turns out that it's sitting completely still in the middle of space.

This is obviously bad for a number of reasons, and not just because I had to spend 20 minutes getting yelled at. Can you head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and see what happened? The original contract called for a ship that could carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> so make sure you've got that and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>.

Once you've got the cargo, can you make sure it's delivered to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>? Thanks a bunch.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

title: Med. Covalex Shipment Needs Recovering
description:
Hey El here,

Got a weird one for you. I was checking the delivery stats for the past week and noticed some discrepancies. Seems we have a couple of deliveries marked as fulfilled but the cargo trackers are still showing as active.

One of these is located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> so I was hoping you could fly over and get to the bottom of this. The order says the hauler was using a ship that could carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> so make sure you have the same. A <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> is a must for this one too.

That cargo needs to be delivered yesterday, so as soon as you've got it take it to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I'll get your payment sorted for you.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator

'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

title: Large Covalex Shipment Needs Recovering
description:
Hi, it's El.

Need a hauler for a job ASAP. One of our contractors had a "personal emergency" and had to ditch their ship and it seems like they're not coming back. Not ideal, really.

Good news is the cargo is still intact, at least according to the tracker. It'd be a huge win for me if you could finish the job by grabbing the cargo at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and bringing it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Seems like this was a pretty big one, you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it all. Really appreciate your help.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. title: Bulk Covalex Shipment Needs Recovering
description:
Hi,

Here's the situation. After spending an hour on comms talking to the hauler, trying to help them diagnose what's wrong with their ship, it's been decided that we now need to get someone to head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and complete the delivery.

This is a pretty big one. You'll need a ship that can store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and unless you're super strong a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to shift it all.

I would really appreciate if we could just get this one done. Take the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we can put this all behind us.

title: Recover VIP Covalex Shipment
description:
Hey,

Only looking for contractors who are the best of the best for this one. One of our most valued clients is expecting an incredibly important shipment which is now seriously overdue.

Here at Covalex, we pride ourselves on treating all of our clients equally, offering outstanding levels of service regardless of what we're delivering. That being said, if we lose this contract someone's gonna be in hot water and I really can't afford for that person to be me.

The tracker is reporting that the last contractor's ship is over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Don't take any chances with this one, you'll need a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to collect it all.

Deliver the shipment to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we can put this whole mess behind us. And you'll make a sizeable heap of credits in the process. Not bad, right?

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Good news is the cargo is still intact, at least according to the tracker. It'd be a huge win for me if you could finish the job by grabbing the cargo at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and bringing it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Seems like this was a pretty big one, you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it all. Really appreciate your help.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

title: Bulk Covalex Shipment Needs Recovering
description:
Hi,

Here's the situation. After spending an hour on comms talking to the hauler, trying to help them diagnose what's wrong with their ship, it's been decided that we now need to get someone to head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and complete the delivery.

This is a pretty big one. You'll need a ship that can store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and unless you're super strong a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to shift it all.

I would really appreciate if we could just get this one done. Take the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we can put this all behind us.

title: Recover VIP Covalex Shipment
description:
Hey,

Only looking for contractors who are the best of the best for this one. One of our most valued clients is expecting an incredibly important shipment which is now seriously overdue.

Here at Covalex, we pride ourselves on treating all of our clients equally, offering outstanding levels of service regardless of what we're delivering. That being said, if we lose this contract someone's gonna be in hot water and I really can't afford for that person to be me.

The tracker is reporting that the last contractor's ship is over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Don't take any chances with this one, you'll need a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to collect it all.

Deliver the shipment to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we can put this whole mess behind us. And you'll make a sizeable heap of credits in the process. Not bad, right?

title: @headhunters_defendentitesandescort_ve_title_0
description: @headhunters_defendentitesandescort_ve_desc_0

title: ~mission(Contractor|OpenBountyTitle)
description: ~mission(Contractor|OpenBountyDescription)

title: Clear Outlaw Data Center
description:
After several attempts at convincing the outlaws at ~mission(Location|Address) to stop their assaults on Citizens for Prosperity aligned settlements, we have decided on a new course of action.

We want you to wipe out all the records they are storing on their servers. This setback should force them to reconsider their actions, or at the very least, give us time to assess further options.

Thanks,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Destroy Headhunter Stolen Data
description:
The Headhunters recently attacked one of our transports and were sadly able to get their hands on some secure data. Although the encryption on it is strong, its only a matter of time before they'll be able to access it.

Before that happens, we need you to go to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy all traces of the information from their servers.

You'd really be helping Citizens for Prosperity out if you can pull this off.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Take Outlaws at ~mission(Location) Offline
description:
We have gotten word that the outlaws at ~mission(Location|Address) have begun recruiting with the hopes of launching a raid against Citizens for Prosperity. 

In order to deescalate the situation before it gets out of hand, we would like you to disable their power generators and halt their expansion. 

Pull this off and it could save a lot of lives.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Limit Outlaw Operational Capacity
description:
There is a band of outlaws at ~mission(Location|Address) who have increasingly become an issue for Citizens for Prosperity settlements in the sector.

While direct violence against the perpetrators would potentially be effective, it is not in the spirit of our mission here. Instead, we would like you to take the generators near their stronghold offline. This should limit their operational capacity while hopefully preserving life. 

I like to think that today's outlaws are tomorrow's productive members of society.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Destroy Outlaw Data Servers
description:
Citizens for Prosperity have been monitoring a very dangerous outlaw group at ~mission(Location|Address) and we believe that they are in midst of planning a major attack which could throw the whole system into upheaval.

In order to protect all the progress we've made here, we would like you to raid their compound and destroy all the servers housing their plans. 

This should at least provide us with enough of a reprieve for them to reconsider their offensive.

Thank you,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Take Headhunter Stronghold Offline
description:
With the recent aggression perpetrated by the Headhunters against our people, Citizens for Prosperity has been arranging a full operation that should hopefully deal them a significant blow. 

However, before that can happen, we need to by some more time to finish our preparations. If you could destroy the power generators at ~mission(Location|Address) it should stall the Headhunters long enough for us to ready our counter attack. 

Your assistance will be critical to our success,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Destroy Headhunter Stolen Data
description:
The Headhunters recently attacked one of our transports and were sadly able to get their hands on some secure data. Although the encryption on it is strong, its only a matter of time before they'll be able to access it.

Before that happens, we need you to go to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy all traces of the information from their servers.

You'd really be helping Citizens for Prosperity out if you can pull this off.
 
Lima Endicott

Citizens for Prosperity

title: Destroy XenoThreat Logistic Data
description:
We got a bit of a problem that I'm hoping you can solve for me. One of our informers has revealed that XenoThreat has been amassing data on Citizens for Prosperity operations throughout the system. 

This information, if used correctly, could put our people at serious risk. The best solution is for you to completely destroy the servers where the data is being stored at ~mission(Location|Address).

With their trove of information wiped out, it should give our people a fighting chance.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Disable Outlaw Stronghold at ~mission(Location)
description:
Following a series of raids against Citizens for Prosperity aligned settlements, we believe we have traced those responsible back to ~mission(Location|Address).

Attacking them directly will pose too great of a risk and most likely encourage aggressive reprisals. Instead, we believe that if their power generators were to be disable it could force them to settle somewhere else.

Do you think you could handle it for us?
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Disable Outlaw Stronghold at ~mission(Location)
description:
Following a series of raids against Citizens for Prosperity aligned settlements, we believe we have traced those responsible back to ~mission(Location|Address).

Attacking them directly will pose too great of a risk and most likely encourage aggressive reprisals. Instead, we believe that if their power generators were to be disable it could force them to settle somewhere else.

Do you think you could handle it for us?
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Eliminate Fuel Stores
description:
We've been having escalating issues with the outlaws at ~mission(Location|Address) and can no longer stand by and watch as their aggressive actions hurt our community. 

We are wary of launching a full scale assault, but believe that if their fuel stores are wiped out, it would deter them from further hostile actions. 

If you're able, I'd appreciate you handling the destruction of the fuel personally. A ship capable of launching missiles would probably make the most sense, but I leave that up to you.

Thanks,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Halt Narcotics Operation
description:
Citizens for Prosperity has been working hard to improve people's lives across the system, but an already difficult task becomes near impossible when drugs get involved. We've recently seen a dealer specifically targeting our most vulnerable and have experienced setbacks across the board. This needs to stop.

We would like you to go to ~mission(Location|Address) and put a permanent end to their production line.

Do this and we can hopefully get our people back on track. 
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Wipe Headhunter Data Servers
description:
With increasing frequency, members of the Headhunters gang have been targeting Citizens for Prosperity settlements when our patrols are too far to offer assistance. 

To accomplish this, they have been using intel gathered on us that is being stored at ~mission(Location|Address). By destroying these servers and the information they contain, we should be able to significantly hamper the Headhunters' ability to move against us.

Thanks for the assistance,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Destroy XenoThreat Data Servers
description:
One of the Citizens for Prosperity members who have been serving as a XenoThreat informer has let us know that the data servers located at ~mission(Location|Address) our housing a trove of information vital to the gang's operation. 

If you were able to destroy these servers on our behalf it would be a huge win for the security of the entire system.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Destroy XenoThreat Logistic Data
description:
We got a bit of a problem that I'm hoping you can solve for me. One of our informers has revealed that XenoThreat has been amassing data on Citizens for Prosperity operations throughout the system. 

This information, if used correctly, could put our people at serious risk. The best solution is for you to completely destroy the servers where the data is being stored at ~mission(Location|Address).

Citizens for Prosperity

title: Reduce Outlaw's Operational Readiness
description:
There is a group of outlaws at ~mission(Location|Address) that have become increasingly brazen in their attacks on Citizens for Prosperity assets in the system. 

To minimize loss of life, we want to first try convincing them to move on to somewhere else by disabling their generators and destroying their fuel reserves. 

Hopefully, that should be enough to convince them to move on to greener pastures.

Thanks,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Eradicate All Traces of Headhunter Data
description:
We're just putting the full picture together now, but so far we've learned that a Headhunter by the name of ~mission(TargetName) recently stole some sensitive data that if exposed will be detrimental to Citizens for Prosperity's cause. 

We need to ensure that all traces of the stolen data are eradicated. This means taking out all the Headhunter servers at ~mission(Location|Address) as well as tracking down ~mission(TargetName|Last) to stop them from further disseminating the information.

Your help is much appreciated,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Assistance Needed Against XenoThreat Raid
description:
The XenoThreat have mercilessly attacked our people and they are now in desperate need of combat support and medical supplies.

If you're available, you'll need to pick up the supplies at ~mission(Location|Address) first before heading to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Once on site, it is important that you neutralize all the hostiles before completing delivery of the supplies.

Additionally, to help prevent an incident like this happening again, we believe that having you destroy the XenoThreat servers at <EM4>~mission(Location1|Address)</EM4> would act as a further deterrent.

Thanks,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: <= UNINITIALIZED =>
description: <= UNINITIALIZED =>

title: Seeking Experienced Combat Pilots
description:
Citizens for Prosperity is in need of pilots with dogfighting experience. If you’re looking to put your skills to the test, I have a mission here for you to try. 

A civilian ship has requested combat support near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Head there and show us that you have the skills to excel in these types of missions and we’ll put you to good use.  

Please be aware. This mission is not a training exercise. This is a real encounter, so please do your best to save the ship in distress. 

Good Luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Pilot in Distress
description:
It seems one of the routes that we had thought relatively safe has proven otherwise. Outlaws have attacked one of our pilots over at ~mission(Location|Address) and they won't make it much longer without support. 

I'd appreciate it if you could fly there as quickly as possible and help them deal with these attackers.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Pilot Seeking Combat Support
description:
One of our pilots had just picked up a shipment of supplies near ~mission(Location|Address) when they were attacked by some vicious shipjackers. 

We just received their distress beacon and I'm hoping you can go provide them combat support.

Any assistance you could give would make all the difference.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Ship Needs Emergency Assistance
description:
A Citizens for Prosperity affiliated ship was attempting to deliver some supplies to ~mission(Location|Address) when they were attacked by the recipients who didn't want to pay for their purchase and chose violence instead.

I'll instruct our traders to be more careful about who they deal with in the future, but for now, I would really appreciate you lending them a hand in fighting off these attackers. 

Appreciated,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Convoy Caught in Brutal Attack
description:
We just received word that a convoy of Citizen for Prosperity affiliated ships have been targeted by outlaws and that our people are in dire need of assistance. 

If you are available, we need combat ready pilots at ~mission(Location|Address) to defend our people. Note that at this dire time, we cannot afford even a single lost ship and expect with your assistance for all of our people make it out alive.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Respond to Distress Beacon
description:
A Citizens for Prosperity convoy on a resupply run dropped a distress beacon near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. They’re not answering any comms, so I assume the situation is serious. That convoy has some skilled pilots, so if they’re not responding then they definitely need the help.

We’ll compensate you to support that convoy.  

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Come to Aid of Convoy
description:
I’m getting reports that a Citizens for Prosperity convoy carrying vital supplies is currently under attack at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. It’d be a big blow to our operations if we lost that cargo. 

If you’ve got the combat skills to go up against highly aggressive hostiles, we’re more than willing to pay for your help. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher

title: Assist Retreating Ship
description:
One of our people is currently under attack at ~mission(Location|Address). They have attempted to elude their attackers to get to safely, but the outlaws have proven too skilled for them to break away. 

We need you to fly there, engage with the attackers, and then destroy the nearby fuel reserves. The hope is that this display of destruction will dissuade them from continuing pursuit.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher

A Citizens for Prosperity convoy transporting urgently needed supplies took a riskier route in order to save time and are savagely being attacked by the XenoThreat. Your combat skills are urgently needed to aid in their defense.

Head to ~mission(Location|Address) as soon as you can. We'll see you well compensated for your assistance.

title: Med. Purchase Order: Hand Mined Materials
description:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>~mission(System) </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

~mission(Hint_Location) For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>~mission(Hint_Tool)</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for rare materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

There are only a few known locations where these materials can be sourced, mainly from now defunct Hathor Group sites on <EM4>Daymar and Aberdeen</EM4>. title: Small Mining Order: Sadaryx
description:
CONTRACT: Mining Order
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
One of our prospecting teams recently confirmed that the asteroids which house QV Breaker Stations throughout Nyx's Keeger Belt contain a rare ore type, Sadaryx.

However, owing to the difficulty in access these stations and the inherent risks involved, we are seeking external mining crews to handle the extraction.

We do not have a confirmed location of where the Sadaryx deposits are located within the station, but would recommend starting with the cave sections where minerals naturally form. If you get really lucky, you may even find some crystals in storage that were mined by the old QV work crews.

<EM4>TERMS*:</EM4>
Your crew will need to gain access to a <EM4>QV Breaker Station</EM4>, collect the required <EM4> Sadaryx ore</EM4>, and deliver it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

This will require a <EM4>Multi-Tool with a Mining Attachment</EM4> and a basic understanding of hand mining.

Our prospecting teams have reported that these stations may have been infiltrated by outlaws. Caution is advised.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

title: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling
description:
Hi,  
 
This is Petra Ling, and I’m proud to offer you a new and exciting opportunity to partner with Ling Family Hauling. When my parents started this company, their goal was to provide fast and reliable courier deliveries around the greater Crusader area. It quickly became a success, and as our reputation grew, so did our operations.  
 
Now, under my stewardship, Ling Family Hauling is taking the next big step – cargo hauling. Demand for this new service is growing faster than I expected, and that’s great news for both of us.   
 
If you’ve ever wanted to be a hauler, then I can make your dreams come true. Best way to learn something is by doing it, and I’ve got a haul of <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> that needs to go from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.  

No prior experience is necessary, but here’s a few things to keep in mind. All pick-ups and deliveries must be done at a freight elevator or autoloaded. You will need a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to move them around. 
 
Upon successful completion of this delivery, you will be promoted to a ‘trusted contractor’ status and more hauls will become available to you.     

 
Sincerely,  
Petra Ling  
Managing Director of Cargo Operations 
Ling Family Hauling 

 

 

 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

title: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling
description:
Hi, 

Guess the folks at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> are planning a party and need help acquiring everything in a timely manner. You’ll need to make multiple pick-ups for this one, including one in Nyx to grab some Jynx gin. Not sure if you’ve ever had the stuff, but it’s a Nyx specialty. Some folks can’t get past that it glows pink, but I love it. Got a truly unique kick to it.

Here are the pick ups:  

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

~mission(MultiToSingleToken)     

Please remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, as you’ll be handling cargo containers up to <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4>.  

  
Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

title: Ling Family ~mission(ReputationRank) Cargo Haul - ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Scale
description:
Hey, 
 
Any chance you’d be willing to do a haul into Pyro? I know it can get dangerous there but this is for a good cause. A group of new CFP members have moved to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and had a tough time adjusting to life in the system. They all left stuff behind in Stanton, because their transporter didn’t have room, so we’ve been hired to pick it all up and bring it to them.      

Here are the pick ups:   

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)   

~mission(MultiToSingleToken) 

CFP leaders hope that bringing them this stuff will make the system feel more like home. Let’s make sure this one goes down smoothly. Remember to equip your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, and a ship that can fit <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. 
 

Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator

description:

Normally Reyes schedules our hauls, but she’s gone for the day, and I just got a comm inquiring about a simple, direct run from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. The cargo is a load of fruit that will lose its value if it spoils. We don't want to anger this client, so would appreciate it if you knocked this out in a timely manner.  

Here’s some other details you should know. The largest container used is <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4>, so don’t forget your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>. 

 
Sincerely,  
Petra Ling

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: HAULER REQUIRED
description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Resource Drive
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: A. Carmichael
RISK ASSESSMENT: Low

To solve the regen crisis, the Empire has put out a call for resources and Hurston Dynamics intends to answer. Whichever company donates the most wins government sponsored benefits, and we have no intention of losing.

As a first assignment, you are being tasked with making a small cargo delivery. More lucrative and complex work will follow the successful completion of this contract.

This assignment requires a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>multi-tool with a tractor beam attachment</EM4>. Once you finished your preparations, head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, collect the cargo from the freight elevator, and deliver it to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>.

The Second Life initiative requires us to publicly declare Hurston’s contributions. This information, along with the other corporations' contributions is available in the <EM4>Second Life Resource Drive</EM4> section of your Journal. Be aware that milestone bonuses are available for contractors who fulfil delivery quotas.


** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: MATERIALS REQUIRED
description: @gobling_hurston_resourcegathering_desc

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: SMALL CARGO RETRIEVAL
description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Resource Drive
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: A. Carmichael
RISK ASSESSMENT: Moderate

According to our trackers, an important shipment of cargo appears to have stopped moving over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

The pilot isn’t answering, so we assume they’ve been compromised. My superiors have written this off as a loss, but if any of the materials can be recovered, we are prepared to compensate you. Any standard <EM4>tractor beam</EM4> should be fine to facilitate the transfer of cargo to your ship after any hostile ships have been dealt with. Expect to find between <EM4>50-55 SCU</EM4> of various box sizes.

Bring what you find to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. I’ll send a member of our team to inspect them.

If the abandoned vessel is still intact, and you have an available pilot with you, you could avoid having to transfer that cargo and just fly it back.


** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: LARGE CARGO RETRIEVAL
description: @gobling_hurston_recovercargo_l_desc

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: SMALL STOLEN CARGO RETRIEVAL
description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Resource Drive
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: A. Carmichael
RISK ASSESSMENT: Low

Following a recent theft, we have learned that the outlaws responsible have distributed the stolen goods amongst various hideouts. As such, we are coordinating several strike teams to target each stash and take back our resources. 

Your assignment will be to recover the portion being stashed at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Handle these criminals and deliver the <EM4>~mission(ItemsToRecover) cargo boxes (all ~mission(MaxBoxSize) SCU or smaller)</EM4> to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. Staff will process the cargo once delivered.

This operation’s success hinges on all contractors recovering their assigned cargo. As a result, you will be credited for the total amount retrieved from all outposts.


** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: SMALL VESSEL UNDER ATTACK
description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Resource Drive
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: A. Carmichael
RISK ASSESSMENT: Moderate

Urgent request. A Hurston contractor is being attacked by a group of outlaws at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Hurston would usually avoid diverting resources on a case like this, but management has prioritized every delivery in this resource drive.

Dispatch immediately to their last known position and <EM4>defend them until they can repair their quantum and escape</EM4>. I will approve compensation payment once they’ve delivered the materials and credit you with the cargo’s safe arrival.


** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Resource Drive
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: A. Carmichael
RISK ASSESSMENT: High

One of our transporters is currently under attack at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Normally, the loss in cargo wouldn’t be worth the expense of hiring combat support, but they’re carrying a significant amount of mining materials that Hurston needs.

I need someone who can go and defend the transport ship <EM4>until they're able to complete repairs and escape</EM4>. Do not underestimate these outlaws, <EM4>bring combat support to not make a bad situation worse</EM4>. Assist with this, and I’ll see you get credit for their delivery.


** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Resource Drive
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: A. Carmichael
RISK ASSESSMENT: Low

Open contract for a medium-sized hauling run. Looking for a qualified pilot who can head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> with a ship that can haul <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>, and a <EM4>qualified crew of haulers</EM4>.

Once collected from the freight elevator, drop the cargo off at a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. Our team will take care of the rest.
