description: @gobling_hurston_haulcargo_l_desc

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: CARGO HAULER NEEDED
description:
In response to the ongoing regen crisis, Imperator Addison has just announced the Second Life initiative, a coordinated government-led effort to find a solution as quickly as possible.

As part of that initiative, Crusader Industries and the other governing corporations of the Stanton system have been asked to contribute towards this important endeavor by gathering vital resources, with incentives and rewards being offered to the corporation that provides the most SCU of materials.

To win, we need hardworking, effective people like yourself to complete contracts for us. To get you started, we were hoping you could transport a shipment of the sought-after materials. Once you have completed this, we will be able to offer you a variety of work to further support us.

You will need a ship that can handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>multi-tool with a tractor beam attachment</EM4>. Once you’re ready, please head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, collect the cargo from the freight elevator, and deliver it to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>.

In the interest of fair competition, each company is required to publicly disclose their contributions. You can track this information, including who is leading in the competition, under the <EM4>Second Life Resource Drive</EM4> section of your Journal. Those who personally contribute significant efforts to Crusader’s totals will be eligible to receive additional rewards.

With your help, I know Crusader can make a difference.


Denver Samuels
Contractor Liaison Officer
Crusader Industries

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: URGENT MATERIALS NEEDED
description:
Crusader still needs your help with the ongoing Resource Drive. Only by working together can we help end the regen crisis.

Your work so far has made a real difference, but we need continuous deliveries of the below refined materials to help with the Empire’s Second Life initiative. Due to the increase in demand, you won’t be able to purchase these in commodity markets, but they can still be mined. Below is list of the materials, suggested locations to find them, and the price we're offering:

- <EM4>Copper</EM4> (surface of Daymar) - <EM4>803 aUEC</EM4> per SCU
- <EM4>Tungsten</EM4> (surface of Wala) - <EM4>1080 aUEC</EM4> per SCU
- <EM4>Corundum</EM4> (asteroids near CRU-L3) - <EM4>810 aUEC</EM4> per SCU

Once mined, we would recommend refining at <EM4>CRU-L1’s Ambitious Dream Station</EM4> as it is near our drop off facility, however any refinery will suffice.

The refined ore can be delivered directly to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. Just submit this contract when you’re satisfied with the amount of resources delivered.

If you're an inexperienced miner but still would like to contribute, consider looking at URW's <EM4>“The Fundamentals of Mining”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal for support.

As a reminder, each company is required to publicly disclose their contributions. You can track this information, including who is leading in the initiative, under the <EM4>Second Life Resource Drive</EM4> section of your Journal. As an incentive, Crusader will grant additional rewards when you’ve satisfied delivery thresholds.

Thank you for helping Crusader make a difference.


Denver Samuels
Contractor Liaison Officer
Crusader Industries

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: SMALL CARGO SHIP RECOVERY
description:
A contractor of ours has abandoned their ship at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and we need someone to recover their cargo immediately.

Expect to find between <EM4>50-55 SCU</EM4> of various box sizes, so a <EM4>standard multi-tool with a tractor beam attached </EM4> should suffice for moving everything to your hold. It’s likely that there are still hostile forces in the area, but please recover as much of the cargo as possible, every contribution, great or small, matters. We’ll pay you for as much as you can retrieve.

Once you’ve found the cargo, safely transport it to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. Our team will be sure to process it swiftly.

If you can find another pilot, it may be more convenient to fly the cargo ship directly, rather than having to transfer the cargo between ships. I’ll leave the details to you.

Take care.


Denver Samuels
Contractor Liaison Officer
Crusader Industries

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: LARGE CARGO SHIP RECOVERY
description:
One of our contractors, who was due to deliver a large shipment of cargo for us, has been forced to abandon their ship at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

Trackers are indicating that the cargo is still intact, but we’ve been unable to contact the pilot. We have reason to suspect there may be hostile forces onsite. We’re looking for a pilot with a large hauling ship to head out there and bring the cargo back.

These resources are crucial to helping us win the UEE’s incentive program, so try to recover as much as possible. Expect to find between <EM4>100-125 SCU</EM4> of various box sizes. You’ll need <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it. If you are unable to retrieve all of it, we can only offer a partial payment for what you bring us. <EM4>We highly recommend bringing back-up for this one</EM4>, for your own sake.

Once obtained, take the cargo to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. We’ll take care of the rest.

When you find the deserted ship, if you think you or your co-pilot would be able to fly it back instead of extracting the cargo, that might be easier for you.

Be safe out there.


Denver Samuels
Contractor Liaison Officer
Crusader Industries

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: SMALL GOODS RECOVERY
description:
A small transport ship of ours has been intercepted by outlaws and its contents were stolen.

The good news is we’ve managed to track down some of these outlaws to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and are looking for contractors with combat experience to deal with them and recover our <EM4>~mission(ItemsToRecover) cargo boxes (all ~mission(MaxBoxSize) SCU or smaller)</EM4>. You’ll be working as part of a team covering multiple locations, so it’s crucial that everyone brings back as much of their assigned cargo as possible. Also, be on your guard, these outlaws aren’t likely to part with the cargo easily.

Once you’ve recovered the cargo, take it to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. Our logistics team will make sure it gets processed.

If you’re able to do this, we’ll be sure to credit you for the total amount of SCU recovered by all teams.

Good luck.


Denver Samuels
Contractor Liaison Officer
Crusader Industries

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: LARGE GOODS RECOVERY
description:
One of our transports was recently attacked by outlaws and while we’re relieved that the crew was spared, the cargo was stolen.

It’s of the utmost importance that we get the <EM4>~mission(ItemsToRecover) cargo boxes (all ~mission(MaxBoxSize) SCU or smaller)</EM4> back, as it contains a large amount of vital materials needed for the UEE’s resource contest.

Luckily, the outlaws that took our goods haven’t noticed that our trackers are still intact. Our cargo is being held at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

These outlaws are highly dangerous, so please arm yourself accordingly and <EM4>consider bringing allies</EM4>. Ideally, you’ll be able to recover all the cargo, but considering how dangerous the situation is, we will offer partial payment for whatever you’re able to retrieve.

When you’ve recovered the cargo, safely transport it to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. Once it’s delivered, our team will handle it from there.

Take care of yourself out there.


Denver Samuels
Contractor Liaison Officer
Crusader Industries

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: DEFEND SMALL CARGO SHIP
description:
To all contractors with combat pilot experience: we need your help urgently.

A small cargo vessel of ours is currently under fire from a group of outlaws at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We need a capable pilot to head out there and <EM4>help defend them as they prepare to quantum</EM4>.

They don’t have much time. The resources they’re carrying, however small, will make a difference in the UEE’s call for resources. If they can deliver them, we’ll be sure to compensate you appropriately.


Denver Samuels
Contractor Liaison Officer
Crusader Industries

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: DEFEND LARGE CARGO SHIP
description:
Putting out an urgent call to all trusted contractors.

One of our large hauling ships transporting resources intended for the Second Life Initiative is currently under attack by a group of outlaws and needs help.

The ship has sustained some damage, but they’re holding on for now. We need a contractor with combat experience who can <EM4>defend them long enough to allow them to get their quantum system back online and escape</EM4>.

Our system was tracking them to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> before we lost contact so I would start there. Due to the presence of a sizeable hostile force, we also <EM4>strongly advise bringing combat support with you</EM4>.

We’re desperate for help on this. If they’re able to complete their delivery, I’ll make sure you get credit for whatever SCU they drop off.


Denver Samuels
Contractor Liaison Officer
Crusader Industries

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: SMALL SHIPMENT
description:
Thank you for your hard work so far.

We have a small shipment of resources that need to be collected from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and delivered to us.

We’re looking for any capable pilots with a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>multi-tool with a tractor beam attachment</EM4>.

After picking up the cargo from the freight elevator, deposit it on a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. A member of our team will be on site to receive it.

All the best,


Denver Samuels
Contractor Liaison Officer
Crusader Industries

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: MEDIUM SHIPMENT
description: @gobling_crusader_haulcargo_m_desc

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: HEAVY SHIPMENT
description: @gobling_crusader_haulcargo_l_desc

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: DELIVER MATERIAL DONATION
description:
ArcCorp needs your help.

Under Imperator Addison’s new Second Life initiative, they’ve introduced a government program that will reward whichever company gathers the most resources to help with the regen crisis. ArcCorp is eager to win, and to do that we need plenty of reliable and dependable contractors.

If you can knock out this easy hauling job and show you’re competent, then I can start offering you some more complicated work next.

For this job, you’ll need a ship that can take <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>multi-tool with a tractor beam attachment</EM4>. Once you’re ready, head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, grab the cargo from the freight elevator, and deliver it to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. Easy, right?

If you want to keep track of how ArcCorp is stacking up against the competition, you can go to the <EM4>Second Life Resource Drive</EM4> section of your Journal. If you do really well and help us get to the top, I’ve been given permission by my superiors at ArcCorp to reward the hardest working contractors with some extra stuff on top of whatever credits you earn.

Come work for ArcCorp and be part of the winning team.


Ella Tieno
Contractor Liaison Officer
ArcCorp

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: BRING US MATERIALS
description: @gobling_arccorp_resourcegathering_desc

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: RECOVER SMALL SHIPMENT
description:
El here.

Bit worried about one of our contractors who’s been ghosting me and hasn’t completed their delivery of resources for the UEE initiative.

I need someone to head out to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> where they were last seen and bring back that cargo for us.

It was only between <EM4>50-55 SCU</EM4> of various box sizes, so it shouldn’t be too hard for you to move them if you have a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>, but that doesn’t mean you should take this job lightly. I’m a little worried there’s a reason our pilot isn’t responding. Be sure to keep an eye out for any hostiles in the area.

Get the cargo to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. I’ll ensure it gets to the right place.

Actually, if you have another pilot with you, you might find it simpler to have one of you fly the cargo ship instead. Your call though.

Thanks for the assist,


Ella Tieno
Contractor Liaison Officer
ArcCorp

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: RECOVER LARGE SHIPMENT
description: @gobling_arccorp_recovercargo_l_desc

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: GET OUR SMALL CARGO BACK
description:
Hi, it’s El.

Looking for a decent enough contractor who isn’t afraid to take on some outlaws and recover the cargo they stole.

Since my boss is breathing down my neck about the numbers we’re pulling for this Second Life thing, we’re organizing multiple teams to hit all of the gang’s stash houses. You’re being assigned to go to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, deal with whatever’s going on over there, and bring the <EM4>~mission(ItemsToRecover) cargo boxes (all ~mission(MaxBoxSize) SCU or smaller)</EM4> stashed there back.

When you’ve got the stuff, take it to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. Our staff will get it logged for you.

If you can do your part and get as many boxes back as possible, we’ll make sure you’re given credit for everything the whole team brings back.


Ella Tieno
Contractor Liaison Officer
ArcCorp

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: GET OUR LARGE CARGO BACK
description: @gobling_arccorp_recovercargofps_l_desc

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: SMALL CARGO SHIP NEEDS HELP
description:
Sending out an urgent request to any available contractor with combat pilot experience.

A small transport ship of ours is currently being attacked by a group of outlaws at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

There’s a huge push for each delivery to help us to win this Second Life initiative, so we need someone to get over there, sort those outlaws out, and allow our transporter time to escape.

Needless to say, we’ll pay you if our hauler manages to deliver the goods and you’ll get credited for the SCU.

Gotta go,


Ella Tieno
Contractor Liaison Officer
ArcCorp

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: LARGE CARGO SHIP NEEDS HELP
description:
Outlaws have hit an ArcCorp transport ship over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and they need urgent help defending it.

The cargo aboard is of vital importance to our standing in the Second Life resource drive, and we can’t afford to lose it. The captain and crew said they’re doing their best to hang on and get their quantum drive repaired, but honestly, I don’t think they have a chance at escaping unless they get some help. If they do make it back in one piece, I’ll make sure you get shared credit for the delivery.

Don’t underestimate these outlaws. <EM4>Bring as much firepower as you got and some backup</EM4> if you can.


Ella Tieno
Contractor Liaison Officer
ArcCorp

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: SMALL CARGO NEEDS HAULING
description:
El here.

We need a hauler who can pick up a couple of pieces of cargo for us ASAP.

You’ll just need a ship that can handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>. If you've got one, get over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, scoop it all up from the freight elevator, and bring them to us. Drop the cargo off at a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>.

It’s as easy as that!

Thanks and good luck.


Ella Tieno
Contractor Liaison Officer
ArcCorp

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: MEDIUM CARGO NEEDS HAULING
description:
Hey it’s El.

Need a quick turnaround on this so I’ll get right to it.

One of our haulers miscalculated how much storage they had and has left a bunch of cargo over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. We need someone with a ship that can handle <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> to pick them up from the freight elevator for us.

Don’t come unprepared like the last contractor. You’ll need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and probably <EM4>another crew member</EM4> if you want to avoid spending all day moving boxes.

Grab the cargo and take it to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>.

Go team.


Ella Tieno
Contractor Liaison Officer
ArcCorp

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: LARGE CARGO NEEDS HAULING
description: @gobling_arccorp_haulcargo_l_desc

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: TRANSPORTER NEEDED
description:
Here at microTech, we are committed to supporting the Empire and its people through these turbulent times. That’s why we’re delighted to announce that we will be participating in Imperator Addison’s Second Life initiative and competing side by side with the other corporations of Stanton to provide the resources needed to end the regen crisis once and for all.

We’re looking for highly skilled contractors that can help support us in our work. If you believe you’re able to do this, we would welcome you to complete this preliminary hauling contract before providing you with additional work.

You will need a ship able to transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>multi-tool with a tractor beam attachment</EM4> for this delivery. The shipment is waiting to be collected from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and should be delivered to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>.

The public declaration of each corporation's donations is a key part of this initiative. To access this information, please consult the <EM4>Second Life Resource Drive</EM4> section of your mobiGlas Journal. As an added reward, microTech will provide bonuses to contractors who meet productivity goals.

Let’s work together for the betterment of Humanity.


Aster Remmington
Contractor Liaison Officer
microTech

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: ONGOING MATERIAL ACQUISITION
description: @gobling_microtech_resourcegathering_desc

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: SMALL CARGO RESCUE
description:
It seems that a contractor of ours had an issue with their delivery and abandoned their cargo over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

This cargo is incredibly important to the resource drive and we need them recovered.

Once you’re ready, head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> with the appropriate equipment (like a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>) and retrieve the cargo. Expect to find between <EM4>50-55 SCU</EM4> of various box sizes. 

Also, in order to guarantee the cargo’s safety, be on the lookout for any hostiles in the area. Once secured, deliver the resources to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. My colleagues will secure it.

You may even find that the cargo ship is still operational, so if you have another pilot with you, it may be worth using that ship to deliver everything. We’ll leave that decision with you.

Kind Regards,


Aster Remmington
Contractor Liaison Officer
microTech

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: LARGE CARGO RESCUE
description: @gobling_microtech_recovercargo_l_desc

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: SMALL CARGO THEFT
description:
A group of outlaws have been targeting our smaller transport ships and as a result, a number of crucial resources that are needed for the UEE’s drive have been stolen from us.

Our trackers are showing that these outlaws have spread the cargo across several locations. We need someone who can work as a part of a wider recovery team and retrieve the portion of the shipment being stashed at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. The outlaws there will be heavily armed, so plan accordingly.

Once you have the <EM4>~mission(ItemsToRecover) cargo boxes (all ~mission(MaxBoxSize) SCU or smaller)</EM4> in your possession, deliver them to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. In addition to the specific materials you personally return, you will share credit for all the stolen items recovered from other sites.

Looking forward to hearing of your success.


Aster Remmington
Contractor Liaison Officer
microTech

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: LARGE CARGO THEFT
description: @gobling_microtech_recovercargofps_l_desc

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: SMALL SHIP UNDER ATTACK
description:
Got an urgent contract: a small cargo ship of ours is currently under attack by outlaws.

Our team was able to pinpoint their location to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, but they’ve stopped responding to comms.

Head to their location and see if you can <EM4>keep the outlaws occupied long enough for our hauler to escape</EM4>.

If the hauler is able to escape, I will personally ensure you are credited for any cargo they deliver.

Good luck and do your best.


Aster Remmington
Contractor Liaison Officer
microTech

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: LARGE SHIP UNDER ATTACK
description:
This one is urgent. A transport ship of ours is currently under attack. They were able to share their last known location of <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> shortly before losing contact.

Since this is a high-risk situation, <EM4>we strongly suggest you bring backup</EM4>. I have every confidence that you and your crew will be able to <EM4>occupy the outlaws long enough for the ship to complete repairs and escape with its cargo</EM4>.

Outside of the contract’s payment, you’ll receive credit for the resources they deliver.

Looking forward to hearing of your success.


Aster Remmington
Contractor Liaison Officer
microTech

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: SMALL CARGO TRANSPORT NEEDED
description:
An influx of donations has left us short staffed, meaning we have an abundance of small tasks for competent haulers.

We’re looking for a contractor with a ship able to transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> to collect a delivery from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

Once acquired, deliver them to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. Logistics will handle the processing.

Awaiting your response,


Aster Remmington
Contractor Liaison Officer
microTech

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: MEDIUM CARGO TRANSPORT NEEDED
description:
We’re in need of a hauler with a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> for an immediate contract.

You’ll need to provide your own <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to handle containers of this size. The cargo is awaiting collection from the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and should be delivered to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>. Bringing <EM4>additional crew to help with the haul is advised</EM4>.

All the best,


Aster Remmington
Contractor Liaison Officer
microTech

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: LARGE CARGO TRANSPORT NEEDED
description: @gobling_microtech_haulcargo_l_desc

title: Jorrit Dossier: Lab Sample
description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
In going through the files, I’ve seen a couple of allusions to a specific lab sample that would potentially be useful to have our people analyze. Not sure where it is exactly, but if you hunt around Onyx Facility you should be able to find the sample and bring it to me.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Onyx Facility Research Wing</EM4> and <EM4>track down the Lab Sample</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

title: Patrol Travel Lanes
description:
We need someone with combat experience to patrol a travel lane for us. Over the years, we’ve found that it's good to get out there and make ourselves visible. Sometimes a pilot like yourself traveling through an area is enough to deter any potential outlaws. But in case you run into any that are feeling a bit more ambitious, a ship ready for combat is recommended.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you’ve scanned all the waypoints and ensured that the route is secure, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

description:

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>

description:
We’ve identified a sector that’s been increasingly riddled with outlaw attacks and we think that if we begin to actively patrol the area we can turn things around. We’d recommend gathering at least <EM4>two wingmen</EM4> to head out there in combat-ready ships and confront any hostile forces you might encounter.

title: Patrol Extremely Dangerous Sector
description:
After weeks of seeing crime rates increase, we’ve been able to identify a sector that we believe to be the source of the outlaw activity that has been leeching into the surrounding areas. While it would be too much to expect to eradicate all threats, we believe that by sending combat patrols into the area we might be able to start reversing this worrisome trend. Our in-house combat analysts recommend bringing around <EM4>three wingmen</EM4> in combat-ready ships to confront any hostile forces you might encounter.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. After all of them have been secured, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>

title: Demolition Mission
description:
I’m looking to send a strong message to the crew over at ~mission(Location|Address) and know the perfect way to do it - property damage.

All you need to do is head on over, destroy a few things here and there, and really drive home an important lesson about respecting your betters. 

Do that for me and I’ll be feeling very happy. And generous.

Interested?

title: Demolition Mission
description:
I’m looking to send a strong message to the crew over at ~mission(Location|Address) and know the perfect way to do it - property damage.

All you need to do is head on over, destroy a few things here and there, and really drive home an important lesson about respecting your betters.

title: ~mission(TargetName)’s Time Has Come
description:
We’ve had our sights set on taking out ~mission(TargetName) for a while now, but we’ve never been able to find the right moment. Enough waiting. You’re going to create the right moment for us.

Head to ~mission(Location|Address) and take out a bunch of lowlifes running around the ~mission(Location). Kill enough of those losers, and ~mission(TargetName|Last) will have no choice but to come face you themselves. That’s when you take ‘em out and earn yourself a nice fat payday.

title: Scrap ~mission(TargetName)
description: I ain’t got time to waste so I’ll get straight to the point - ~mission(TargetName) needs to be dead and I want you to do it. You can find them over near the ~mission(Location) at ~mission(Location|address). They won’t be alone, but don’t get distracted by those other useless piles. You only get paid for taking out ~mission(TargetName|Last).

title: Scrap ~mission(TargetName)
description: I ain’t got time to waste so I’ll get straight to the point - ~mission(TargetName) needs to be dead and I want you to do it. You can find them over near the ~mission(Location) at ~mission(Location|address). They won’t be alone, but don’t get distracted by those other useless piles. You only get paid for taking out ~mission(TargetName|Last).

title: ~mission(Contractor|SalvageContractorTitle)
description: ~mission(Contractor|SalvageContractorDesc)

title: ~mission(Contractor|SalvageContractorTitle)
description: ~mission(Contractor|SalvageContractorDesc)

title: ~mission(ship) clean up
description:
Got a particular salvage job that we could use some extra hands on. 

We need you to find a ~mission(ship) that got punched out around ~mission(location). Security’s already searching for it and if they find it, they’ll ID it for sure and we’ll be in loads of trouble.

So, we want you to make sure that can’t happen. Either tow the ship out of the search area or rip the entire hull off so nobody can tell who it belonged to. Whatever you decide, keep your mouth shut about this. 

We’ll cred you up and anything you scrap is yours to keep. But if security finds the ship before you’re done, we’ll all be screwed and you won’t get paid so don’t disappoint.

title: Interested in Building a Better Future?
description:
To all available contractors,

Rayari Incorporated is looking for independent contractors to provide additional support in our efforts to push the boundaries of science, agriculture, and medicine in the Empire and beyond. 

A research initiative at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> is in desperate need of resources, so we are looking for a reliable contractor to obtain and deliver these crucial components.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "The Guide to Stanton Wildlife" in your Journal.

Rayari offers competitive wages along with the knowledge that you're building a better universe.

Let’s grow together,

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

title: Additional Resources For Research
description:
To all available contractors,

Rayari scientists are hard at work trying to solve the issues with failing regen tech. Currently, their efforts are hindered by a lack of materials which they believe could be essential for their experiments.  

In particular, our scientists at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> have had to put their work on hold after running out of those resources. With a restock from our normal provider not possible for months owing to short supply, we’ll pay a premium to anyone who can assist with restocking the materials.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "Explorer's Guide to Harvestables" in your Journal.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

title: Need Resource for Research\n
description:
To all available contractors,

Our research team at at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> is working tirelessly on solving the current ‘Regen Crisis’ and addressing the issue of unstable imprints. Their work has produced promising results, but a lack of a key resource is impeding their ability to run further experiments. 

We’ve received word from our supplier that increased demand combined with lower mining yields means that we won’t receive our scheduled shipment for another few months. Our research team can’t wait that long, and we’re hoping you can help.      

The resource is hard to come by, but we have it on good authority that the old Hathor mining facilities were built in areas with a high concentration of the ore. Since Hathor went defunct not long after establishing their operations in- system, there’s a good chance that activating one of these mining lasers could provide you with what we need.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

Clinical Research Outsourcing

title: Vital Resources Needed For Research
description:
To all available contractors,

Rayari scientists are hard at work trying to solve the issues with failing regen tech. Currently, their efforts are hindered by a lack of three resources essential for their experiments: <EM4>saldynium, jaclium, and carinite</EM4>.  

In particular, our scientists at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> have had to put their work on hold after running out of those resources. With a restock from our normal provider not possible for months owing to short supply, we’ll pay a premium to anyone who can assist with restocking the materials.

Though we haven’t been able to do thorough scans, there’s a strong belief among our teams that Hathor’s defunct Orbital Laser Platforms were built above areas with a high concentration of these resources. Reactivating these OLP could be your best hope of acquiring what we need.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

title: Collect Irradiated Kopion Horns
description:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are dedicating all our energy to stopping the regeneration technology crisis in its tracks, but for our scientists to continue their efforts they need resources that the company's suppliers have been unable to deliver. 

There is a sizeable population of kopions that have been exposed to radiation near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. Rayari is seeking an contractor to collect <EM4>irradiated kopion horns</EM4> and deliver them to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Due to the scarcity of this resource, we are prepared to pay a high service fee. 

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

title: Obtain Irradiated Valakkar Pearls
description:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are stopping at nothing to halt the ongoing regeneration crisis, but to continue their efforts our scientists need a rare resource that the company's suppliers cannot obtain. 

Rayari is seeking an experienced contractor to gather <EM4>irradiated valakkar pearls</EM4>, which can be extracted from adult valakkar that have been extensively exposed to radiation. Our scans have found a qualifying population inside the storm near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. Because these animals are highly dangerous, Rayari is prepared to generously compensate anyone who can assist with gathering the pearls. 

Once attained, please take these valuable resources to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

title: Gather Irradiated Valakkar Fangs
description:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are dedicating all our energy to stopping the regeneration technology crisis in its tracks, but to continue their efforts our scientists need materials that the company's suppliers cannot obtain. 

Rayari is seeking an experienced contractor to gather <EM4>irradiated valakkar fangs</EM4>, which can be extracted from adult valakkar that have been extensively exposed to radiation. Our scans have uncovered the existence of a qualifying population inside the storm near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. 

Because these animals are highly dangerous, Rayari is offering premium pay to anyone who can assist with collecting the fangs.  

Once attained, please take these valuable resources to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

title: Collect Irradiated Valakkar Eggs
description:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are working day and night to solve the current regen crisis, but to continue their efforts our scientists need rare resources that the company's suppliers cannot deliver. 

We are therefore seeking a contractor to secure an <EM4>irradiated valakkar egg</EM4>. Our scans have confirmed several radioactive storms with known a valakkar presence on Pyro I, you can find a shuttle near <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4> that will take you inside the storm. One more thing, analysis indicates that these eggs will decay over time, the state of the egg shouldn't affect our research but sooner would be better.

Due to the health risks associated with radiation exposure that will be needed to deliver a viable sample, Rayari is ready to pay well for anyone who can safely secure and deliver this item.

Once attained, please take this valuable resource to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

title: Yellow Level Contract: Limiting Potential Threat
description:
A bunch of outlaws have been harassing our client and recently things have taken a turn for the worse. They've taken over their property and we've exhausted all other options.

We need a decent pilot to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and take out their fuel tanks. If you can cut off their supplies, you can pave the way for the client to take back their property.

This shouldn't be a tough one. You might run into a ship or two and maybe a few turrets, but you've been authorized to use lethal force. All we need for you to do is get in there, get the fuel tanks, and get out.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Yellow Level Contract: Disrupt Operations
description:
We've just received the location of an outlaw outpost where some up-and-coming criminals have been hanging out. Now, our client says there's no reason to engage these folks directly. Instead you will be targeting their supply lines.

Fly on over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and take out their fuel stores while dealing with any minimal resistance they may put up. It will be your call on how much you engage with the hostile forces, just don't forget that your main objective is ensuring those fuel tanks are out of action.

This is a yellow level contract so pay will be proportionate.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Orange Level Contract: Take Out Fuel Supplies
description:
We're in need of a sharp contractor for a hit and run operation. Client says some local thugs have been congregating in concerning numbers and we have been tasked with disrupting their base of operations.

Get on over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and take out their fuel tanks. If you're successful we can set these folks plans back a while, and most importantly, without having to deal with them directly.

Reports are showing there's a couple of ships buzzing around the area and some defense turrets. Just focus on the fuel tanks and you should be alright.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Orange Level Contract: Destroy Outlaw Infrastructure
description:
An opportunity has presented itself for a client to take action against a group of criminals who have been harassing their business.

According to reports, this group of outlaws are currently laying low at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. The client thinks this is a good time to catch them off guard and bring them to justice. The job is to take out their fuel tanks and putting an end to their smuggling operations once and for all.

These folks are not to be underestimated. You better bring some backup and fly low to avoid the turrets. Priority as always is the fuel tanks.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Red Level Contract: Fuel Container Demolition
description:
Foxwell have been hired by a client to take part in a multi-stage operation on a known outlaw base at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and need a strong pilot to play their part in this.

You, and whatever additional support ships you arrange, will be tasked with taking out the fuel tanks located there to set the stage for the rest of the operation to follow. 

Unfortunately, this place is swarming with ships and anti-air turrets. So make sure you and your people are ready, and remember, the fuel tanks are your priority. No need to be a hero.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Red Level Contract: Destroy Outlaw Infrastructure
description:
We are looking for a highly competent mercenary team to assist with a challenging demolition for a VIP client.

The outlaws operating at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> has been identified as a threat of growing concern in the area and to help deal with this situation your team is being tasked with taking out the fuel tanks at the location. 

However, it won't be as easy as just slipping in and out - expect to deal with multiple hostiles and turrets that will be expecting you. The stronger your crew the better your chances at completing this operation successfully.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Vanduul-Tech Smugglers
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Unknown
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: InterSec has been enlisted by the UEE to gather intel on a group of <EM4>black marketeers dealing in Vanduul parts</EM4>, that have been linked to the illegal Vanduul experiments happening at ASD’s Onyx Facility. The UEE is eager to understand and put an end to their operations.

Based on evidence extracted from the ASD facilities, we’ve potentially managed to track down the location of one of their storage sites.

Once accepted, head over to the old <EM4>QV Planet Services Logistics station</EM4> and we’ll be in touch.


Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

title: Retrieve Additional Smuggler Intel
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: InterSec needs your services once again.

The intel you previously gathered has been invaluable in identifying several prominent buyers of the illegally-obtained Vanduul parts. However, since then the Shattered Blade have continued their operations and the UEE is requesting that we <EM4>update our intel.</EM4>

We believe more information can be retrieved from the storage facilities located at the old <EM4>QV Logistics station.</EM4>

The operation parameters haven’t changed since your last mission: find the <EM4>encrypted data</EM4> and use the <EM4>decryption key</EM4> to decipher and upload the list to us. The Shattered Blade will have reinforced the area since the last time, so expect resistance.

Good luck. We’ll be in touch.


Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

title: ~mission(Contractor|PrisonerBreakTitle)
description: ~mission(Contractor|PrisonerBreakDescription)

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Rank - Direct ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Cargo Haul
description:
Hiya, 

Looking for a hauler willing to make a run to Ruin Station. Know hauls to Pyro can give some people pause, but this is one we do regularly to help supply the station. I’ve also confirmed that everything on the cargo manifest is above board. 

If you’re interested, the cargo is ready for pick up at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.  Make sure you bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> otherwise it might be a little rough.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Rank - Direct ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Cargo Haul
description:
Hi, 

There’s a bunch of cargo at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that needs to be moved to Levski. The People’s Alliance has a standing order for this stuff because they desperately need it, but it’s not easy to get in Nyx. Funny how they don’t want to be part of the UEE but still rely on us for their survival.  

Anyway, you’ll need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> to knock this one out. 

~mission(Contractor|SignOff) 
 
Ella Tieno

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Rank - ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Cargo Haul
description:
Hi, 

Several Citizens for Prosperity outposts in Pyro need supplies. It seems like we regularly do runs like this for them, but this one looks like it might be a bit riskier. A CFP rep let me know that outlaw activity around these sites has spiked recently, but they desperately need these outposts restocked, so we’re going ahead with the delivery. <EM4>Just a head’s up that you could run into trouble, so come prepared</EM4>.       

All the cargo’s waiting at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and here’s where it’s heading:  

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)  

According to the manifest, the largest cargo container you’ll need to deal with is <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4>. Aside from that, remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.    

~mission(Contractor|SignOff) 
  
Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Rank - ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Cargo Haul
description:
Hi, 

Our client took down a Valakkar and processed it into organics. They've got buyers lined up and waiting for the stuff at a few different locations, so I need someone to go to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, grab it all, and then deliver it to the following spots:    

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

~mission(SingleToMultiToken)  

According to the manifest, the largest cargo container you’ll need to deal with is <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4>. Don’t forget to bring your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>. Not sure how you’d move this stuff without it.    

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)   

Ella Tieno

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Rank - Direct ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Cargo Haul
description:
Hiya, 

Here’s the deal, I need someone good for a special run. We’ve got an important client that’s threatening to take their business elsewhere, because their deliveries are consistently missing cargo. They’re demanding that 100% of the cargo be delivered on this run, or they won’t pay. Since this was before my time and my supervisor wants to show that it won’t happen again, they agreed with this. Anyway, I think you might be a good fit. 

If you’re willing to take that risk too, here are all the pertinent details. The cargo can be collected from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and delivered to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Looks like the largest cargo container you’ll need to handle is <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize)</EM4>, so be sure to bring a ship big enough and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to help you move those containers around.  
 
~mission(Contractor|SignOff) 

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Rank - Direct ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Cargo Haul
description:
Hiya, 

Looking for a hauler willing to make a run to Ruin Station. Know hauls to Pyro can give some people pause, but this is one we do regularly to help supply the station. I’ve also confirmed that everything on the cargo manifest is above board. 

If you’re interested, the cargo is ready for pick up at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.  Make sure you bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> otherwise it might be a little rough.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

title: ~mission(ReputationRank) Rank - Direct ~mission(CargoGradeToken) Cargo Haul
description:
Hi, 

There’s a bunch of cargo at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> that needs to be moved to Levski. The People’s Alliance has a standing order for this stuff because they desperately need it, but it’s not easy to get in Nyx. Funny how they don’t want to be part of the UEE but still rely on us for their survival.  

Anyway, you’ll need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> to knock this one out. 

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

title: Help Headhunters Prospect
description:
Guess some folks just can’t dogfight. Sent a young prospect out on patrol, and am now being barraged with comms about how they’re barely hanging on. Had them update me with the details about who they’re up against and I damn near fell outta my chair laughing.    

If this kid can’t handle a People’s Alliance ship, they sure ain’t ready for flight assignments. Appreciate it if you could save their hide anyway.

If you’re free, could you head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and show ‘em how it’s done?

-Stows

title: Headhunter Needs Help
description:
You busy? A promising prospect was doing a special run for me but ran into trouble with the People’s Alliance around <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. This one’s on me. Knew they weren’t the best dogfighter but thought they could do this without running into any other ships. 

Told ‘em to hold tight and do everything they can to stay alive until support gets there. Shouldn’t be too much trouble for someone with your skillset.  

-Stows

title: Backup Needed Now
description: Some People’s Alliance members with a death wish decided to target one of our ships. Need someone to hustle over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and show ‘em what happens when you mess with the Headhunters.\n\nStows out.

title: Bring Down the Hammer
description:
Sent ships to investigate a distress beacon only for it to turn into an ambush by the People’s Alliance. They’ve been fighting like hell to get away but can’t seem to extract themselves.

Let’s get ‘em some help on the double. Think you can go on over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to give ‘em some support?

-Stows

title: Rally to Help Clips Convoy
description:
One of our Clips is in a tight spot. Just got a comm from ‘em saying their convoy is being swarmed by the People’s Alliance and they need help on the double. Well, they said it in a more colorful way than that. All I’ll say is that I don’t want to hear what they’ll say to me if they don’t survive and are forced to regen. 

Situation must be serious if this Clip is freaking out. Really need you to get to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> immediately, and ensure that they make it out alive.

Stows out.

title: Looking for a Damn Hero
description:
Got ourselves in a real mess here. A Headhunters ship on an important mission got attacked near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Can’t get too into the specifics but it’s absolutely vital that they survive. The People’s Alliance know this too because they’re throwing everything they can at ‘em.

Not gonna pull any punches. This is a serious-ass situation that many wouldn’t survive. If you do, I’ll sing your praises and make sure you’re paid well.   

-Stows

title: Headhunter Pilot in Trouble
description:
Just got word that a Headhunter over near ~mission(Location|Address) got roped into a fight and now they can't see it through. The idiot wants me to save their sorry ass.

Guess I'm a soft touch, because I'm actually going to pay you to do it for me. What do you say? Wanna save a moron's life?

-Stows

I've got a stack of credits for you if you manage to save all of them.

description:
Seems we got some upstarts trying to muscle in our operations by hitting a Headhunter ship near ~mission(Location|Address). Not sure how they expected to get away with it.

They need to learn the hard way that's not how things work in Pyro. You up for heading over there and teaching these bastards a lesson?

- Stows out

title: Headhunter Ships in Big Trouble
description:
Turns out some double-crossing assholes set us up. We were supposed to meet for a deal, but they attacked our ships instead. Now my people got a fight on their hands, and I'll be honest, I'm not sure they're gonna make it out alive.

Would be good if they had some extra firepower on their side. Think you could hurry over to ~mission(Location|Address) and take out a few of these lying lowlifes for me?

Will make it worth your while, but only if all the Headhunters make it out in one piece.

- Stows Out

description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has requested that Hockrow compile a complete dossier on infamous scientist <EM4>Dr. Logan Jorrit</EM4>. Believed responsible for the incidents at Associated Science & Development’s Lazarus site, the client is eager to get a broader view of Dr. Logan and his research.

Contract Investigator Actions: 
Gain access to ASD’s shuttered <EM4>Onyx Facility</EM4> where Dr. Jorrit was formerly the Lead Scientist.  Once there, locate and <EM4>access the research lab’s personnel files</EM4> so that we can get an overview of what was going on there.

Additional Notes:
The QT beacon to the site was deactivated when the facility went dark so you'll have to fly the last leg manually.

While ASD has formally closed the facility, caution is still advised. Not only may the labs themselves be hazardous, but the surrounding area shows signs of recent visitors. Scavengers or squatters may be on site.

I've also managed to wrangle an employee ID code for you so as long as you're on the job, you'll be able to access the computers there. 

Additionally, Onyx Facility only has large hangars available, so plan your travel appropriately.

title: Jorrit Dossier: Access Engineering Files
description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
From the personnel files recovered at the Onyx Facility, we have now learned that Dr. Jorrit has recently visited the site and accessed files while there. The next step will be to follow this lead and try to learn exactly what Dr. Jorrit was doing in his old lab.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>access Dr. Jorrit’s recent files</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
I've found a work around for the QT issue so you'll be able to travel directly to the site from now on.

Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

title: Jorrit Dossier: Access Research Files
description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update:
The files you found in Engineering confirm that Dr. Jorrit is actively pursuing something at the site, but it is still unclear what the doctor is up to. I’m hoping that if you can find the data he was accessing in Research it will provide further clarity.


Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Research</EM4> wing to locate and <EM4>access Dr. Jorrit’s recent files</EM4> .

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Once you accessed these files, I'll be sending you <EM4>5 Secure Drives</EM4> with copies of whatever data we've gathered so far. You can collect them at your home location.

title: Jorrit Dossier: Updated Seismic Data
description:

Case Update: 
One of the biggest issue when it comes to ongoing investigations is intel growing stale. To help alleviate that, I’m going to have you head back into Onyx and grab the latest seismic sensor data. Would be good to see what the latest readings say.

title: Eckhart Security Job Op
description: ~mission(Description)

title: Capture Arlington Gang Member Les Arlington
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ~mission(Contractor|ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell,  Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

An anonymous comm has tipped us off that Les Arlington, child of gang leader Maltrox Arlington, had been spotted picking up a delivery at a Covalex transfer center. We will provide you with the coordinates of where we believe their current whereabouts are.

Les is an experienced pilot who has been flying for almost as long as they’ve been walking and usually serves as the gang’s get-away pilot. It may be worthwhile to bring extra support ships in order to cut off any attempts at escape.

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Capture Arlington Gang Member Nicks Cantwell
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ~mission(Contractor|ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

We have received word that Nicks Cantwell, long-time acquaintance and confident of Maltrox Arlington, was spotted trying to purchase a high-density mining laser, the kind frequently used in past ship-jacking attempts to strategically breach hulls. We have provided coordinates for Nicks’ last known location.  

Nicks is a highly regarded munitions expert among criminal circles and often leaves a path of destruction in his wake. It is advised to bring an increased level of firepower to this encounter.

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

description:

*********

Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington was flagged by automated security systems at an R&R after being involved in a drunken brawl. Weepy was able to clear the station before response teams arrived, but we have been able to track him down to where we currently think he’s holed up.

Weepy is gang leader Maltrox Arlington’s uncle and main enforcer. His anger issues combined with a long history of substance abuse make him a true wildcard. Expect him to put up significant resistance when cornered by you and your mustered forces.

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Capture Arlington Gang Member Oslo Arlington
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ~mission(Contractor|ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

Recently a security terminal was illegally accessed using a unique custom cryptokey that had been utilized in a heist last year by one Oslo Arlington, the younger sibling of gang leader Maltrox Arlington. While we we’re unable to positively confirm if the terminal was hacked by Oslo or not, we feel it is worth investigating.

Extremely intelligent, tech savvy and a renowned strategist, Oslo has proven difficult to capture in the past. If this lead does result in finding Oslo, a well coordinated tactical strike team would be advantageous to a successful engagement. 

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Capture Arlington Gang Member Kass Dent
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ~mission(Contractor|ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

Two bank guards were reported missing last week. A few hours ago, their bodies turned up in a trash heap in Magnus with their biometrics stolen. Thankfully, a nearby dumpling cart had a security camera that captured the corpses being dropped. Facial recognition was able to ID one Kass Dent, romantic partner to Maltrox Arlington and parent of Les Arlington. Using the vid to construct a timeline, we have provided the coordinates of where Kass is currently believed to be hiding. 

Kass is suspected of a long list of murders, with these two only being the most recent. We recommend only bringing highly skilled wingman to try and keep the casualty count at a minimum.  

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Capture Arlington Gang Leader Maltrox Arlington
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ~mission(Contractor|ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
__Background Information__
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell, Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

Maltrox Arlington has been keeping a low profile recently, but we think he's come out of hiding. A patrol was refueling at a station when one of their ships was boosted. Maltrox is the most likely suspect. While the regtag was temporarily deactivated, we have been able to trace the ship’s quantum signature and have provided you those coordinates.

A third generation criminal, the Arlington gang has been under Maltrox’s leadership for the past six years. Be aware, this is a smart, aggressive, and very dangerous target. The more resources you can bring to bear, the more likely it is that we can bring Maltrox in one and for all. 

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Terminate UEE Threat: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: ~mission(Location|Address)
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Heavy Gun-Ship
Briefing: An outlaw fleet lead by <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> has been planning a major strike against vital UEE infrastructure. InterSec has been tasked with dealing with this threat before their attack can be launched.

Gather a suitable amount of support craft and head to the engagement site. There you will have to engage with various squadrons before their leader will deem the situation dire enough to directly lead their forces. It is critical that they be neutralized in order to ensure the attack is stopped.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

title: Eradicate UEE Threat: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: ~mission(Location|Address)
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Capital Ship
Briefing: An outlaw fleet lead by <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> has been planning a potentially devastating strike against sensitive UEE targets. InterSec has been tasked with dealing with this threat before their attack can be launched.

After putting together a fighting force of your own, head to the site and engage with the hostiles there. Their leader will not risk entering into the fray themselve unless they feel their operation is suitably at risk. Stay at the site and take out hostile targets, until you can engage with the groups leader directly and put a stop to this heinous attack once and for all.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

title: Grab ‘n’ go
description:
Just got word of an abandoned ship with a fat stack of cargo ripe for the pluckin’. If you’re interested, you’ll need to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Word might have gotten around, so there’s probably some skags hanging around, but just ghost them and get the stash.

Bring the cargo to the freight elevator at ~mission(Destination|Address) and I’ll get you your creds.

Make sure you got a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> on you too, no idea how big or small that cargo is.

Stows out.

title: Taking what’s ours
description:
Managed to intercept a ship carrying some goods over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> but we hit a snag - our guys didn’t have enough space in their ships to store it. You wanna make some quick creds? Head over there and grab the stuff. Could be a few scavs there by now so be on your guard.

Just don’t forget to bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> as that shit’s heavy.

When you’re done, drop it off at the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we’ll take care of the rest.

Stows out.

title: Finish the job
description:
One of our pilots was supposed to bring a shipment back to us, but seems like he got into some trouble over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Either he got his brains blasted all over the cockpit, or freaked out and ditched his ship. For his sake, I hope it’s the first one so I don’t have the hunt this asshole down. What’s important right now is that our cargo’s just sitting out there.

If you’ve got a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a decent ship, can you head over there and get our stuff? Chances are the assholes who attacked my pilot are still there, and I’m betting they’re pretty tough.

If you get out alive, take the cargo to the freight elevator at ~mission(Destination|Address) and I’ll get you paid.

Stows out.

title: Jackpot
description:
Looking for a hauler to pick up some cargo for me. Thing is, there’s a catch.

The cargo’s in the back of an abandoned ship located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. As you may have figured, this ain’t our cargo, but it sure as hell doesn’t deserve to go to anyone else. I’ll be damned if those CFP assholes get their hands on it before we do.

Be lucky as hell if we were the first to know about this, but I’d wager there’s gonna be more ships swarming around there than flies on a kopian carcass. If you got some pals you can trust, bring them along and ghost those assholes. And don’t forget your <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> of course.

You manage to get that cargo and bring it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>, I can get you a nice cut of the sale.

Stows out.

title: Getting what we deserve
description:
Here’s the thing, I got a situation over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and need someone with a brain between their ears to sort it out for me. Former pilot of mine thought he could cut a deal with another gang and unsurprisingly it didn’t work out for him. Now my cargo is sitting idle and being guarded by a whole bunch of nullbrains waiting for their hauler to come pick it up.

Need you to head there with a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a strong crew to get my shit back before its gone for good.

Take it all to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I’ll give you a generous cut of the takings.

Stows out.

title: Worth the trouble
description:
This’ll be a fun one for you. We just got word that a transport ship has broken down at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Only problem is, every skag and their mother seems to know about it. Place is crawling with all kinds of outlaws trying to get their hands on the cargo onboard. That’s where you come in.

If you can get your best pilots together and <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> you can take out the competition and snag the cargo. It ain’t gonna be easy though. One of my scouts said the assholes guarding this ship have got some serious tech on them.  

I’ve already got a buyer waiting, you just need to take the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I’ll send you the creds.

Stows out.

I’ve already got a buyer waiting, you just need to take the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I’ll send you the creds.

Stows out.

title: Test Your Mettle
description:
Heahunters are on the lookout for motivated and competent contractors who can be trusted to do a wide range of work supporting our operations. If you think you have what it takes, I’ve got a mission here that’ll test your skills in several ways. 

A ~mission(Ship) transporting cargo for us is currently under attack at ~mission(Location|Address). Don’t think it’s looking good for our ship, but that cargo is too important to let fall into someone else’s hands. Need you to head to the location and deal with the attackers before they get away, then collect our cargo and take it to ~mission(Destination|Address). 

If you can handle this, then there'll be lots more work I can send your way.  

Stows out.

title: Gone But Not Forgotten
description:
Not sure what happened, but a ship moving some important supplies across the system disappeared around ~mission(Location|Address). Our crew at ~mission(Destination|Address) really needs that cargo for an upcoming operation. Any chance you could go looking for the ship and help complete the delivery?

Have no idea what happened, but my bet’s that they got ghosted. Maybe it’s just me, but I’d rather be a prepared pessimist and an ill-equipped optimist. 

- Stows

title: Get Our Shit!
description:
Someone with a death wish attacked one of our ships hauling some primo product. Our crew on the scene is outta commission, so we need someone to get there fast and recover the stash before those bozos make off with it. Any chance you can handle this for us?  
  
Looks like the attack went down at ~mission(Location|Address). Head over there and deal with the attackers before they get away. Then grab the goods from the ~mission(Ship) and take ‘em to ~mission(Destination|Address). Oh, and don’t be an idiot and get high on that supply, unless you want me to send someone after you next. 

- Stows

title: Search for Ship
description:
Just lost contact with a ~mission(Ship) on an important run. Before they went dark, the crew was convinced someone was following them, so I’d put money on them being under attack. 

Looking for someone to get their ass over to ~mission(Location|Address) to search for the ship and retrieve the goods. If I’m right, there will be some uninvited guests hanging around that will need to be dealt with too. Once you’ve secured the stuff, it needs to go to ~mission(Destination|Address).   

You down to crack a few skulls and lug some cargo. Sounds simple enough, right? 

Stows out.

title: Return Goods
description:
Just got a frantic comm from a ~mission(Ship) that cut out quite dramatically. Seems like they were dumb enough to get lured into a trap, even though I made it damn clear that getting those goods to ~mission(Destination|Address) was all they should worry about.   
 
Well, it looks like they failed. Trackers hidden in the cargo now show it at ~mission(Location|Address). Time to send in backup to reclaim our goods and teach a lesson to those who took it. You interested in delivering that message then delivering the goods?

- Stows

title: Get the Good Stuff
description:
Need someone to raid a base at ~mission(Location|Address) for us. Not sure exactly who’s dug in there, but they attacked one of our ships and took the drugs they were hauling. Really need that shit back. That batch is full of high potency stuff that’s worth a premium. 

Doubt they’ll want to give it back to you, so plan to take it by force. Then bring the goods to ~mission(Destination|Address). And don’t act like an idiot and get any ideas of what you could do with that stuff. Trust me, you don’t wanna get on my bad side. 

- Stows

title: Two Birds, One Stone
description:
An informant passed along some interesting news. XenoThreat are about to do a massive ammo resupply run for their forces, and in preparation, they’ve brought all that cargo to ~mission(Location|Address). Seems like a prime time to strike. You interested in killing a bunch of Xenos and then stealing their ammo for us?    

If so, get your shit in order and then clear that base. Once done, grab all the ammo and bring it to ~mission(Destination|Address). You’ll get paid well, and I’m sure we’ll find something fun to do with all that ammo. 

Stows out.

title: DEAD SAINTS - Trial Cargo Haul
description:
Call me Twitch. I run the Dead Saints. 

I doubt this is the first time you've heard of us, but in case you haven't, we do a lot of things, but one of them is transporting goods that need discreet handling. 

I got your info from one of my contacts. They say you've got the stuff we like in a hauler, which works for me, because we're looking for one. 

Here's my proposal – we're offering creds to the pilot that can transport some special cargo for us. Your ship’s hold will need room for <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and you'll need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for loading and unloading. All you have to do is get everything from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> without getting security involved. 
 
If you can pull the job off, the Saints will have more contracts for you down the line. 

-Twitch

title: DEAD SAINTS - Trial Cargo Haul
description:
